news.Title: Prediction: This Memory Supercycle Growth Stock Could 3X by 2030
news.Content:
After a huge run over the past year, Micron Technology 's (NASDAQ: MU) stock has been kicked to the curb. The stock lost as much as a third of its value in the weeks after the company reported one of the most extraordinary earnings reports you'll ever see (It has since recovered some of the loss and now trades down about 19% from its recent high).

The natural assumption would be that the stock's valuation just got too high, and it was priced for perfection. However, that is far from the case. In fact, the stock now trades at a forward price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio of just 3.3 times fiscal 2027 analyst earnings estimates (Micron's fiscal 2027 ends August 2027). On the surface, that is a remarkably cheap valuation for a company that just tripled its quarterly revenue and saw its gross margin expand from 36.8% a year ago to 74.4%.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Given Micron's valuation and growth, the stock potentially tripling by 2030 isn't a stretch by any means. However, achieving this will take much more than simple multiple expansion. First, we have to look at how Micron got here and why it trades at such a low multiple.

Is Micron's situation cyclical or structural?

The memory market that Micron operates in has historically been very cyclical, with big boom and bust periods. While Micron makes both DRAM (dynamic random access memory) and NAND (flash), its main business is DRAM, which makes up about 80% of its revenue. The company essentially is part of an oligopoly in the DRAM market along with Korean companies Samsung and SK Hynix, although it has historically been more of a follower in the space.

The DRAM market has exploded with the rise of artificial intelligence (AI), and AI chips, like graphics processing units (GPUs), need to be packaged with a specialized form of DRAM called high-bandwidth memory (HBM) to optimize their performance. HBM has strong unit economics and high demand, which has led the big memory makers to dedicate much of their manufacturing capacity to it. At the same time, HBM requires upward of 3 times the wafer capacity as ordinary DRAM, which has created an overall DRAM market shortage. This has led to skyrocketing DRAM prices, which are boosting Micron's revenue and gross margin.

The question then is, when does this cycle end, or will it? HBM demand should ultimately follow AI chip demand, given how they are linked, although we'll see how advancements such as Alphabet 's TurboQuant compression algorithm could eventually impact that. Meanwhile, Micron and its competitors are working with HBM customers to secure long-term agreements with minimum volume commitments and quarterly pricing adjustments, which should reduce some of the cyclicality of its business.

Story Continues

Micron has something to prove

Micron has already shown it can move from a follower to a leader in the memory space by being in mass production with its HBM4 for Nvidia 's new Vera Rubin platform. Now it needs to show that it's not just the beneficiary of a cyclical boom, but that its business today is much more grounded in structural growth drivers. It should be able to do that by signing more stable, long-term contracts for HBM.

For its stock to triple from here, Micron doesn't need another strong earnings report; it needs to demonstrate that it is a long-term AI winner that deserves an AI infrastructure stock multiple.

news.Title: The Stock Market's "Trump Slump" Likely Isn't Over -- and There's a Big Reason Why
news.Content:
From a statistical standpoint, the stock market has generally thrived under President Donald Trump. Although volatility has picked up at times, the widely followed Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJINDICES: ^DJI) , benchmark S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) , and tech-powered Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQINDEX: ^IXIC) gained 57%, 70%, and 142%, respectively, during his first, non-consecutive term. Dating back to the late 1890s, it's among the highest annualized returns under any president .

However, Trump's second term has been far shakier for Wall Street. Since late February, all three indexes have swooned, with the Dow and Nasdaq Composite officially entering correction territory , as of the closing bell on March 27.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

While history shows that meaningful pullbacks and stock market corrections are attractive buying opportunities for long-term investors, there's a glaring reason to believe that the ongoing "Trump slump" in equities isn't over.

Donald Trump's actions may force the Fed's hand

To be fair, the stock market entered 2026 with several headwinds, some of which have absolutely nothing to do with President Trump.

For example, the stock market began the year at the second-priciest valuation since January 1871, according to the S&P 500's Shiller Price-to-Earnings (P/E) Ratio (also known as the Cyclically Adjusted P/E Ratio, or CAPE Ratio). The five previous times in which the Shiller P/E exceeded 30 during a continuous bull market were eventually followed by declines of at least 20% in one or more of Wall Street's major stock indexes. In other words, history has made clear that premium valuations aren't sustainable over long periods.

Additionally, there's been concern about an artificial intelligence (AI) bubble forming and subsequently bursting. Every game-changing technology since the mid-1990s has endured an early innings bubble-bursting event, and it's unlikely that AI is the exception to this unwritten rule.

While Donald Trump isn't responsible for the stock market's historical priciness or a possible AI bubble-bursting event, his actions related to the Iran war are directly influencing other variables that could spell serious trouble for Wall Street.

Story Continues

On Feb. 28, U.S. forces, following Trump's command, and Israel commenced military operations against Iran. Shortly after attacks began, Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz to virtually all oil exports. The Energy Information Administration notes that approximately 20% of the world's liquid petroleum needs pass through the Strait of Hormuz daily.

The law of supply and demand teaches that when the supply of an in-demand good is constrained, its price will rise until demand tapers off. Crude oil prices have skyrocketed since the start of the Iran war, pinching consumers' wallets at the pump and threatening to raise production costs for businesses.

The bigger issue at hand for Wall Street isn't that consumers are forking over extra income to fuel their vehicles. It's the impact of a crude oil price shock on the prevailing inflation rate.

One of the key reasons the stock market has been able to maintain its historically pricey valuation, aside from promises of rapid growth thanks to AI, is the expectation that the Federal Reserve will cut interest rates several times in 2026. But the U.S. inflation rate has been above the central bank's long-term target of 2% for 59 consecutive months, and it's expected to jump significantly when the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics releases the March inflation report on April 10.

According to the Federal Reserve Bank of Cleveland's Inflation Nowcasting tool, the trailing 12-month inflation rate is projected to jump from a reported 2.4% in February to 3.16% in March. This increase, along with the stickiness of President Trump's tariffs in the goods sector, could force a shift in the Fed's monetary policy. We may be talking about interest rate hikes , which would be awful news for an already jittery stock market.

Regardless of whether the Iran war ends quickly or drags out, the inflationary effects will be felt for several quarters to come.

Wall Street's Trump slump can be long-term investors' time to shine

While most investors aren't thrilled to see red arrows next to their top holdings, stock market pullbacks, corrections, bear markets, and even elevator-down moves are perfectly normal and akin to the price of admission for investing on Wall Street.

Typically, investors aren't going to be able to predict when these downturns will begin, how long they'll last, or where the bottom will be. But the one near-constant with stock market pullbacks, corrections, and bear markets is that they're relatively short-lived.

Stock market cycles are inevitable, but they're not proportionate. Analysts at Bespoke Investment Group found that the average S&P 500 bull market has lasted approximately 3.5 times longer than the typical S&P 500 bear market, dating back to the start of the Great Depression in September 1929: 1,011 calendar days vs. 286 calendar days.

Additionally, a refreshed data set from Crestmont Research demonstrates the power of time and conviction on Wall Street. Crestmont examined the rolling 20-year total returns of the S&P 500, including dividends, dating to the start of the 20th century. Even though the S&P wasn't officially incepted until 1923, analysts were still able to gather total-return data from components in other major indexes from 1900 to 1923.

Crestmont Research ended up with 107 rolling 20-year periods of annualized total return data (1900-1919, 1901-1920, and so on, through 2006-2025). Researchers found that all 107 timelines generated a positive annualized total return. Hypothetically (since index funds didn't begin trading in the U.S. until 1993), if an investor had purchased an S&P 500-tracking index anywhere between 1900 and 2006 and simply held this position for 20 years, they made money every time .

Although inflation worries are clearly mounting for a historically pricey stock market, the long-term future for equities and the U.S. economy remains bright.

news.Title: Nvidia Stumbled in the First Quarter: Here are My Top 3 Nvidia Predictions for the Second Quarter
news.Content:
Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) has been a surefire ticket to gains for investors for quite some time. The artificial intelligence (AI) chip giant has increased by more than 500% over the past three years, and this isn't just due to optimism about future earnings; Nvidia has been delivering AI-driven growth throughout the AI boom, with revenue and net income climbing in the double and triple digits.

But in the first quarter of this year, Nvidia stock fell into the doldrums, declining about 6%. This isn't a deep decline, but it represents a clear shift in momentum. The reasons behind this movement have been varied, some directly related to Nvidia and others more closely related to the general investing environment. For example, investors have wondered whether the pace of AI spending will continue at current levels -- this spending is a key revenue driver for Nvidia. And investors have also worried about geopolitical instability and the war in Iran, elements that weigh on the overall economy.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Now, as we begin the second quarter of the year, it's a great time to give this once hot stock a second look and consider what's to come. Here are my top three Nvidia predictions for the second quarter.

1. Nvidia will start reporting China sales

Since 2022, Nvidia has struggled with U.S. export controls concerning the particularly promising market of China. The company was able to sell a specially designed chip to that market, though -- until early last year. The U.S. halted exports entirely, bringing Nvidia's revenue there to zero. (In the prior fiscal year, China represented 13% of Nvidia's overall revenue.)

Good news arrived in recent months, though, with the U.S. giving Nvidia the nod to export its H200 chips to China. It wasn't initially clear when exports would begin, but last month, Nvidia chief Jensen Huang said the company had received orders from China and was launching manufacturing to serve those orders.

My prediction is Nvidia will start shipping chips to China and recording revenue in the second quarter, so this key market may be on its way to significantly contributing to Nvidia's growth.

2. The company will make more AI deals

Nvidia has been striking AI partnerships left and right over the past few quarters. For example, this fall the company signed an agreement to work with Nokia , even investing in the telecom giant, and this unlocks the opportunity for Nvidia to play a central role in the telecom of tomorrow. As part of the deal, Nvidia is developing AI for telecom as the industry transitions to 6G from 5G.

Story Continues

And just recently, Nvidia joined forces with semiconductor company Marvell Technology -- the partnership brings Marvell's technology into the Nvidia ecosystem, offering customers greater flexibility as they build out their platforms.

These moves are key because they secure Nvidia's position as a future AI winner: These deals progressively expand the company's role in AI, involving it in every aspect of the AI story and therefore also growing the revenue opportunity.

I predict Nvidia will make more of these AI deals, and others may come as soon as the second quarter.

3. Nvidia stock will soar

Today, Nvidia's stock is trading at only 21x forward earnings estimates, making it look like a value stock -- yet at the same time, this company is growing in leaps and bounds. Analysts expect revenue in the current quarter to soar about 77%.

This situation should prompt growth investors to pile into Nvidia stock -- and even some value investors may pick up a few shares at the current level.

So, investors might rush to get in on Nvidia at today's interesting price, but they also may be looking ahead to growth drivers -- such as the company's launch of its Vera Rubin platform later this year, the widespread use of agentic AI, and the development of robotics. All of this is why I predict that investors may return to Nvidia in the second quarter, and the stock will roar higher.

news.Title: Samsung Elec likely to report stupendous surge in quarterly profit to record level
news.Content:
By Hyunjoo Jin

SEOUL, April 3 (Reuters) - Samsung Electronics, benefiting from red-hot chip prices stoked by the AI boom, is expected to book a six-fold jump in operating profit for January-March - a quarterly record and just shy of what it earned for all ‌of the past business year.

Bolstered by what it calls an "unprecedented supercycle" for memory chips, Samsung is projected to flag on Tuesday a ‌profit of 40.5 trillion won ($26.9 billion) on a 50% climb in revenue, according to an LSEG SmartEstimate drawn from 29 analysts.

More from Yahoo Scout

Is the memory chip shortage expected to continue?

How might Middle East war impact Samsung's growth?

What challenges face Samsung's non-memory chip businesses?

What's driving Samsung's record quarterly profit expectations?

By comparison, last year, the world's biggest maker of memory chips ​logged 43.6 trillion won in operating income.

Some analysts are even more bullish, with Citi, for example, forecasting 51 trillion won.

"You couldn't ask for things to be better," said Ko Yeongmin, analyst at Daol Investment & Securities, referring to the strength in the memory chip market.

HEADWINDS FROM THE WAR

Despite the expected huge jump in earnings, investors are likely to focus on any clues as to what extent the war in the Middle East might impact Samsung's growth momentum.

Samsung, however, does not ‌usually say much about its outlook until it gives ⁠a more detailed earnings breakdown which is due later in the month.

The war has raised energy costs and threatens to disrupt supply of key production materials, which in turn may force Big Tech firms to roll back their investments ⁠in artificial intelligence data centres.

There have also been some signs of an easing in spot prices for DRAM (dynamic random access memory) chips as device manufacturers have hiked prices of smartphones , computers and other products, denting consumer demand.

These concerns, as well as the unveiling of memory-saving technology from Google called TurboQuant last month, have contributed to a ​selloff ​in memory chip stocks, with Samsung's shares losing 14% since the war began on ​February 28.

That said, the shares are still up 50% this ‌year, buoyed by Big Tech AI investment plans worth hundreds of billions of dollars.

BUT THERE'S STILL A CHIP SHORTAGE

Some experts remain upbeat about the outlook, noting that there is a severe shortage of memory chips.

"We have seen a cooling (in memory chip spot prices) over the last 3-4 weeks yes. We do believe it's temporary," said Tobey Gonnerman, president of semiconductor distributor Fusion Worldwide.

"The demand and backlog remains strong," he said, adding that it would be a long time before memory manufacturing could meet total demand.

Market researcher Trendforce also expects conventional contract prices for DRAM chips to continue to surge. They doubled in ‌the first quarter from the previous quarter and are forecast to climb 58-63% during ​the April-June period.

Story Continues

Samsung Electronics co-CEO Jun Young-hyun told shareholders last month the chipmaker is working ​with major customers to shift to contracts of three-to-five years to ​shield them from potential fluctuations in demand.

THE OTHER BUSINESSES

While Samsung's memory chip division will account for the lion's share of ‌its profit, its other businesses are expected to struggle.

Analysts said ​Samsung's contract chip manufacturing business, which ​competes with TSMC, is set to stay in the red. The division, however, recently got a boost from a partnership with Nvidia that will see it build new AI inference processors.

The smartphone and flat-screen divisions are both likely to see profits slump by about half in ​the first quarter due to higher memory costs and ‌fierce competition, according to Kiwoom Securities.

Samsung may also have to grapple with rising wage costs, as its labour unions in South ​Korea have called for a revamp of its bonus scheme and have threatened to strike in May.

($1 = 1,507.4300 won)

(Reporting by Hyunjoo ​Jin; Additional reporting by Heekyong Yang; Editing by Miyoung Kim and Edwina Gibbs)

news.Title: 蘇威元：台積電2奈米最強後盾! 這檔特化股3大利多集結
news.Content:
論壇中心／綜合報導

台積電供應鏈本土化浪潮持續推進，特用化學族群股價競相攀高，資深分析師蘇威元在《財經週日趴》節目中指出，當同族群本益比普遍衝上數十倍甚至四百倍之際，有一檔與台積電共同研發26項電子級溶劑、去年營收創歷史新高的隱形供應鏈要角，本益比卻僅21倍，股價仍在百元親民價位，堪稱尚未被市場發掘的璞玉。

蘇威元指出勝一深耕特用化學領域，主力產品涵蓋清洗、蝕刻所需的電子級溶劑，26項產品全數與台積電客製化共同研發，隨台積電正式進入2奈米時代，相關溶劑需求大幅提升，公司毛利率也同步走高至35.33%。去年全年營收達20.43億元，創下歷史新高，基本面扎實。

在成長動能上，勝一高純度異丙醇產線預計今年上半年完成投產，二至三季進入送樣階段，法人估計今年EPS可達8元、明年上看9元，成長空間相當顯著。電子級溶劑營收佔比目前已達七成，且持續向八成移動，業務結構轉型方向明確。

與同族群相比，山太士本益比400倍、印能71倍、萬潤58倍、弘塑68倍，勝一僅21.15倍，估值明顯偏低。蘇威元總結，營收創高、本益比最低、成長動能明確，勝一是當前特化族群中最值得關注的蒙塵珍珠。惟股市投資仍存在風險，投資人應審慎評估自身風險承受能力，切勿盲目追高。

《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

原文出處： 財經週日趴(影)／蘇威元：台積電2奈米最強後盾！這檔特化股3大利多集結

news.Content: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) stock is expensive. There's no doubt about it. Shares trade at 14.2 times sales. Meanwhile, Rivian (NASDAQ: RIVN) -- another popular EV stock -- trades at just 3.3 times sales. I think Rivian's discounted valuation makes it a buy. But make no mistake -- Tesla can pursue growth opportunities that EV competitors like Rivian can only dream of right now. The company has a huge capital advantage over the competition, plus an existing infrastructure advantage ...

• AI is seen as a key enabler for achieving full vehicle autonomy and the robotaxi market.

news.Title: Better Quantum Computing Stock: D-Wave Quantum vs. Rigetti Computing
news.Content: Quantum computing has the potential to transform technologies such as artificial intelligence (AI). It can process complex data in minutes that would take centuries for a conventional computer. The sector sparked strong investor interest in 2025, but the "great rotation" of 2026 changed the situation. Wall Street shifted away from tech stocks with sky-high valuations this year, which includes the nascent quantum computing industry. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Quantum computing has the potential to transform AI, but the sector faced a 'great rotation' away from high-valuation tech stocks in 2026.
• Rigetti Computing (RGTI) uses gate-model technology and has a vertically integrated tech stack but reported declining sales ($7.1 million in 2025) and a significant operating loss ($84.7 million).
• D-Wave Quantum (QBTS) acquired Quantum Circuits to add gate-model capabilities and reported strong customer bookings ($30 million in January 2026) and 179% year-over-year sales growth to $24.6 million in 2025.
• Both companies are unprofitable, but D-Wave has a higher cash balance ($884.5 million) compared to Rigetti ($443.5 million).
• D-Wave is presented as the superior investment due to larger and growing revenue, higher cash balance, and stronger bookings.
news.Keywords: Quantum computing, AI transformation, Rigetti Computing, D-Wave Quantum, revenue growth, investment thesis

news.Title: 49-year-old Home Depot rival closes hardware store, no bankruptcy
news.Content: Independent hardware stores and cooperative chains like Do it Best , Ace Hardware , and True Value Hardware face extreme competition from major big-box home improvement centers like Home Depot and Lowe's , which have resulted in the smaller competitors closing their stores when they can no longer compete. Home Depot dominated the home improvement sector with 28% of the market in 2025, with Lowe’s capturing 17% of the market and Amazon generating ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Independent hardware stores face intense competition from big-box retailers like Home Depot (28% market share in 2025) and Lowe's (17%), as well as e-commerce giants like Amazon (11%).
• Central Center Hardware, a Do it Best member, is closing after 49 years due to these competitive pressures and proximity to a Lowe's store.
• The challenging housing market since 2023 has reduced demand for home improvement projects.
• Several other long-standing hardware stores have also closed recently.
• Amazon's increasing share in the home improvement sector is noted.
news.Keywords: Retail competition, Home Depot, Lowe's, Amazon, market share, housing market

news.Title: 中小型台股基金今年績效34%稱霸 法人揭震盪市況下「四大金律」投資關鍵
news.Content:
今年來，全球主要股票市場頻頻創新高，儘管 3 月遭遇中東戰事亂流，仍有不少股票基金績效表現搶眼。統計今年來投信發行的台股各類股票基金平均績效表現，其中以中小型上漲 34.1% 居冠，其次為科技型 32.74%，整體來看台股類型基金績效都打敗大盤。

群益投信研究團隊表示，投資基金以定期定額介入是最為簡單方便，也具風險分散、平均成本效果的投資方式，再搭配長期穩定投入、漲多停利、下跌不停扣、逢低再加碼之定期定額四大金律，讓投資更加事半功倍。對於看好的市場，投資人不妨以定期定額或分批進場的方式適度布局相關基金。

群益中小型股基金經理人周立民表示，台股近期呈現高檔震盪整理格局，觀察盤面資金流向可發現，市場並未出現全面撤出情形，而是由權值型標的轉向中小型與具題材支撐族群，形成明顯的結構性輪動，顯示市場資金仍持續尋找成長機會，尤其 AI 供應鏈內部的資金重新配置，使盤面維持活絡度。

整體而言，台股在資金輪動、基本面支撐與產業升級帶動下，短線雖有修正壓力，但中長期仍維持多頭區間，市場預期將在高檔區間整理，透過產業輪動與資金轉換延續成長動能，形成震盪中向上的盤勢結構。

群益創新科技基金經理人陳朝政表示，統計 2005 年以來台股歷經 5 個多頭行情，而電子科技創新股，也都成為台股多頭加速器，台灣科技創新領先全球脈動，因此過去 20 年台股多頭期間，電子指數漲幅都大勝大盤。今年市場氛圍仍將圍繞 AI 產業，算力需求提升刺激 CSP 大規模資本支出，形成持續且規模化的採購動能，推動 AI 伺服器快速成長。

展望台股後市，對電子產業獲利成長保持樂觀態度，在 AI 影響力持續擴大下，台灣最強的半導體與硬體相關概念股皆為最受惠的廠商，中長線而言，企業獲利回到成長軌道，台股基本面有支撐，對台股後市仍持正面看法。

1分鐘讀財經》南亞科營收飆560％！大咖卻示警：當心DDR4報價「提前反應」
news.Content:
小編今天（3）日精選5件國內外重要財經大事。記憶體大廠南亞科2日公告3月合併營收181.70億元，月增16.42％、年增560.04％，連續第五度改寫單月歷史新高；累計第一季合併營收490.87億元，年增582.91％。在此波舊世代記憶體報價急漲帶動下，南亞科營運表現持續升溫，成為市場觀察DDR4後市走向的重要指標。

【1】南亞科3月營收飆升560％

隨DDR4漲勢凌厲，市場對後段行情看法出現分歧。外資大摩認為，DDR4在第二季過後，漲價動能可能逐漸降溫，若後續大陸業者長鑫存儲擴大供給，2027年報價壓力恐提前被市場反映，連帶使南亞科評價面臨修正空間。

【2】16檔非電族群 成資金避風港

川普於美國1日晚間就美伊戰爭發表演說，台股2日以重挫602點回應，戰事中東仍是市場一顆不定時炸彈，惟食品、貿易百貨、橡膠及金融等四類股指數逆勢漲，大量（3167）等16檔非電族群各擁題材，成資金避風港。

【3】氦氣喊漲 半導體成本壓力大

中東地緣政治風險持續升溫，美國總統川普再度預告未來2至3周「極其猛烈」打擊伊朗，加上近期澳洲近期受熱帶氣旋影響，影響全球8％液化天然氣（LNG）供應。半導體業界分析，氦氣雖在晶圓製造成本占比不到1％，但其在蝕刻與製程冷卻環節不可替代，據悉，不論是半導體用6N電子級氦氣或EUV專用氦氣於2日都有逾5％漲幅，供應鏈成本壓力漸增。

【4】IMF、世銀、IEA組隊 應對伊戰衝擊

中東衝突引爆全球能源危機，嚴重衝擊全球經濟現況。為穩定局勢，國際貨幣基金（IMF）、世界銀行與國際能源總署（IEA）1日共同宣布成立協調小組，將竭盡全力，應對戰火對經濟和能源造成的重大衝擊。

【5】川普擬課鋼鋁25％、藥品100％關稅

外傳川普政府醞釀對鋼鋁關稅體系進行重大調整，將現行「按金屬含量計算」的制度，改為對所有含鋼鋁的衍生產品一律課徵25％關稅，此舉被解讀為，在維持貿易保護基礎下對「優化執行面」的作法，無獨有偶，另據傳川普也擬對藥廠祭出100％的關稅。而對鋼鋁和藥品的關稅新制，最快本周內公布。

news.Title: Hashgraph CEO warns permissionless systems pose compliance risks
news.Content: Crypto projects spent years chasing users with token incentives, apps and speculation. Now, some of the industry's biggest pitches are starting to sound more like enterprise software sales. That was the message from Hashgraph CEO Eric Piscini in a recent interview with TheStreet Roundtable , where he argued that the crypto market is moving away from user acquisition ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Hashgraph CEO Eric Piscini believes the crypto market is shifting towards enterprise software sales rather than user acquisition.
• Hashgraph focuses on enterprise adoption for payment, organizational, and supply-chain use cases.
• Major companies like Google have increased comfort with blockchain due to credibility and the involvement of recognizable firms.
• Piscini highlights compliance as a key reason for preferring permissioned systems, citing risks associated with anonymous validators (e.g., transaction fees going to entities like North Korea).
• The future of crypto adoption may involve blockchain integrating into the backend of business systems, prioritizing reliability and compliance.
news.Keywords: Hashgraph, crypto, enterprise adoption, blockchain, compliance, permissioned systems, Google

news.Title: 台股盤前／戰火變數未解！台指夜盤上漲372點　台股反彈看油價是否持穩
news.Content:
財經中心／余國棟報導

美股週四（2）日呈現震盪整理格局，市場一度因伊朗與阿曼可能協商荷姆茲海峽通行機制而回穩，但隨後仍受到中東戰火升溫與能源價格飆漲壓力影響。道瓊工業指數下跌61點，跌幅0.13%，但盤中一度重挫超過600點，顯示市場情緒仍高度不穩；標普500指數與那斯達克指數則小幅收紅，分別上漲約0.1%與0.17%，費城半導體指數上漲0.40%，科技股相對抗跌。美股震盪收紅、台指期夜盤上漲372點，台股連假後(7)日有望止跌反彈，但中東局勢與油價飆升仍是最大不確定因素。

避險情緒升溫 戰事與油價成最大變數

市場避險情緒明顯升溫，VIX恐慌指數一度飆升至27.89，反映投資人對地緣政治風險高度戒備。油市更成為最大焦點，西德州原油（WTI）大漲11%，布蘭特原油站上108美元，而現貨布蘭特更飆破141美元，創下金融海嘯以來新高，能源成本壓力持續升高，恐對全球經濟與股市形成壓力。

台指期夜盤強彈 台積電撐盤成關鍵

從台股籌碼面來看，台指期夜盤上漲372點，顯示市場對短線反彈仍抱有期待；台積電期貨盤後上漲15元，成為穩盤關鍵指標。由於台積電權重占比高，其走勢將直接影響大盤開盤氣勢，若現貨市場同步延續漲勢，台股有機會出現技術性反彈。

此外，融資減少約7億元，顯示市場槓桿略為降溫，有助於減輕短線賣壓。籌碼面偏向整理後再出發的格局，不過仍需觀察外資動向。外資持續偏空操作，期貨淨空單仍維持高檔，近35000口空單水位，短線反彈恐仍伴隨壓力。

連假期間變數未解 操作須留意風險控管

影響台股後市的關鍵，仍在於國際局勢發展。美國總統川普演說對伊朗發出強硬言論，甚至暗示可能加大軍事行動，市場對戰事升級的疑慮仍未消除。儘管傳出伊朗與阿曼有意協商，但整體局勢仍充滿不確定性。台股拚反彈看油價是否持穩。

另一方面，國際貨幣基金（IMF）也指出，今年全球降息空間有限，市場流動性未必如預期寬鬆，加上油價飆升恐推升通膨壓力，對股市評價形成壓力。油價飆漲也對航空、運輸類股將形成壓力，但能源、原物料族群反而可能受惠；科技股則因費半指數走揚，短線仍具支撐力。不過若市場避險情緒持續升溫，資金仍可能轉向防禦型資產。

整體而言，台股連假後雖有機會開高反彈，但在假期期間國際局勢未明朗前，盤勢仍偏震盪，投資人應避免過度追高，短線操作建議以低接為主，同時嚴控持股風險，靈活因應市場變化，才是目前較為穩健的策略。

news.Title: 上車零時差！搶占進場先機　台股爆量調額「有撇步」！
news.Content: 財經中心／師瑞德報導 2026年台股市場交投持續火熱，即便面臨美伊衝突等國際地緣政治劇烈震盪，投資人的交易需求依舊旺盛。根據統計，台股集中市場日均成交值已從2022年的2,422億元，一路攀升至2025年的4,160億元，寫下歷史新高。 在全民皆股的熱潮下，不少新開戶的小資族或ETF投資人常受限於初始電子下單額度，導致在行情劇震、欲進場承接時，因額度不足而錯失良機。為解決此痛點，永豐金證券宣布推出全新「線上調額」服務，主打免臨櫃、最快一天生效，並首創主動提示功能，成為投資人的最強後勤。 免請假、免紙本！全程線上化最快24小時補足火力 過去投資人若遇到交易額度不足，往往需要親自向公司請假跑櫃檯，或是準備繁瑣的紙本財力證明簽署，流程緩慢且不便。永豐金證券正式打破此門檻，投資人現在只需透過「大戶投APP」、「iLeader」或「新理財網」等三大電子下單平台，動動手指即可在線上提出申請。 更重要的是，系統已整合政府MyData平臺資料，在客戶授權下，可直接將永豐銀行的帳戶存款與證券庫存視為財力證明，省去繁瑣的上傳步驟，最快僅需1個工作天即可生效，讓資金調度無縫接軌。 委託失敗即時救援！首創APP主動警示橫幅引導 為了不讓投資人在下單當下才發現「額度被鎖」而焦慮，永豐金證券特別在「大戶投APP」中將調額導引整合進實際交易流程。當投資人的委託紀錄因額度不足導致失敗時，系統會立即在「錯誤訊息」下方跳出「調整交易額度」按鍵，實現一鍵跳轉網頁申請。 此外，系統若偵測到交易失敗紀錄，也會在APP列表頂端主動顯示「警告橫幅」，提醒投資人盡快補足額度火力，確保在下一次大行情來臨時，不再因行政程序而錯失進場紅利。 視覺化儀表板現身！資金水位、剩餘額度一目瞭然 除了事後救援，事前的資金管理更是投資勝出的關鍵。永豐金證券於「大戶投APP」下單匣工具列中，獨創開發了「視覺化額度儀表板」。投資人只要點選「額度」按鈕，畫面便會以直觀的半圓形儀表板呈現當日「已用額度」與「剩餘額度」，讓投資人對目前的資金水位能「一眼看透」。 在美伊政經局勢不明、盤勢隨時可能出現劇烈波動的環境下，這項數位工具能協助投資人更精準地規劃交易策略，掌握每一波市場噴發的投資機會。 三立新聞網提醒您：

news.Title: 下一檔飆股！台股選股新視角　證交所的「暗示」要看懂
news.Content:
財經中心／師瑞德報導

台灣資本市場資金長期集中於半導體與AI等大型權值股，然而許多具備深厚技術與穩健獲利的中小型企業，同樣蘊藏豐厚的投資機會。為協助投資人發掘隱形冠軍並掌握產業趨勢，證券交易所近期積極推廣「台灣璞玉指數」，並攜手台灣經濟研究院與資策會，按月發布前瞻產業洞察報告，提供市場更多元的選股方向與投資視角。

璞玉指數抗跌防禦力佳 開拓中小型股投資藍海

觀察全球市場，美國中小型股投資體系發展成熟，而台灣中小型股ETF資產規模占比目前尚不足1%，顯示市場仍具備可觀的發展潛力與投資紅利。璞玉指數專注於篩選基本面良好且獲利配息穩定的中小型企業，不僅長期年化殖利率達4.9%優於加權報酬指數的4%，在面對國際局勢動盪的綠色跌勢中更展現出強大防禦韌性。

數據顯示近期中東地緣政治緊張期間，大盤跌幅約6.5%，璞玉指數僅微跌約2.5%，是投資人平衡資產配置、穩健參與台股成長的優質參考標的。

聚焦三大高成長領域 精準掌握產業轉單與升級紅利

除了指數化投資工具，證交所首波推出的前瞻產業研究報告，更為投資人梳理出三大具備高含金量的重點領域。首先在數位雲端產業，受惠生成式AI帶動自動化資安攻擊頻率增加，資安防護需求大爆發，台灣業者憑藉研發與代理優勢，預期產值將維持高成長。

其次是電動機械領域，儘管全球電動車市場競爭白熱化，但台灣供應鏈受惠於非紅供應鏈移轉效益，在關鍵零組件與電驅動系統領域將迎來顯著轉單商機。最後在生技醫療方面，因應全球糧食需求與減碳政策，農業生產極需提升資源利用效率，帶動全球生物型農化產品市場需求強勁，預估年複合成長率可達13.7%。

每月定期發布產業洞察 掌握官方專區最新動態

證券交易所將持續扮演資本市場的推手，透過前瞻產業研究報告計畫的推動，落實投資人保護與教育，引導更多資金挹注於創新企業。證交所承諾將持續優化籌資環境，穩步朝向打造亞洲創新籌資平臺，為臺灣資本市場注入經濟發展動能與國際競爭力。

未來每個月將針對前瞻產業發布計3至5篇的產業研究報告，歡迎可於證交所創新板官網之「投資人教育列車-前瞻產業研究報告」 ( https://ww

news.Title: 日韓巨頭夾擊台積電！三星「黑科技」出手 Rapidus誓言只輸半年
news.Content:
台積電為全球晶圓代工龍頭，後頭追兵來勢洶洶，日本Rapidus喊話目標在1奈米的時候，只落後台積電半年；三星也打算啟用「叉型片Forks heet」技術，在相同的空間塞入更多電晶體，預計在2030年之前完成1奈米製程的研發。

綜合外媒報導，三星晶圓代工部門目標在2030年以前完成1奈米製程研發，並進入量產階段，由於1奈米製程的電晶體密度是2奈米的兩倍，三星打算從現行的環繞式閘極（GAA）架構轉入叉型片（Forks heet）結構。

三星打算在奈米片之間加入絕緣層，提升電晶體的密度，進而達成改善功耗與效能的目標。三星的2奈米製程進入量產階段後，已經拿到特斯拉AI6晶片的訂單，受到市場高度關注。

日本Rapidus也以台積電為目標提升技術，技術長石丸一成受訪時表示，目標在1奈米製程的時候，落後台積電的時間縮小至半年左右。目前Rapidus預計在今年年底為客戶試生產2奈米晶片，預計2027年量產。

銜接2奈米與1奈米的1.4奈米，則預計在2026年完成開發，並預計於2029年量產。Rapidus將維持現有的研發模式，與IBM展開深度合作，約有一半的工程師在美國參與研發。

就目前狀況而言，台積電仍具有一定的領先優勢，2奈米已經於去年底量產，預計在今年快速爬坡，營收貢獻有望超越3奈米，A14製程1.4奈米則預計在2027年底試產，2028年下半年量產，並預計在2030年之前完成1奈米的研發。

news.Title: 超級比一比！6檔台股主動式ETF　大漲27%的是他
news.Content:
財經中心／師瑞德報導

在全民理財風潮與追求超額投資收益的雙重驅動下，台灣主動式台股ETF市場正以前所未有的速度蓬勃發展，正式邁入新的里程碑。根據投信投顧公會與集保結算所的最新統計數據，截至本周，隨著新兵主動兆豐台灣豐收(00996A)正式掛牌加入戰局，全台台股主動式ETF的總檔數已擴增至12檔。

更令人矚目的是，整體市場熱度爆表，總受益人數在本周一舉衝破歷史性的百萬大關，來到1,040,887人，這已是主動式台股ETF連續第23周刷新歷史最高紀錄，顯示投資人對於「選股不選市」、追求經理人主動操作優勢的投資方式接受度大幅提升，主動式ETF已成為當前市場最炙手可熱的投資新寵。

績效王選股爆發力驚人！00992A 大漲27.13%領跑

深入分析單檔ETF的表現，本周市場呈現「遍地開花」的熱絡景象。包括主動群益科技創新(00992A)、主動第一金台股優(00994A)、主動復華未來50(00991A)、主動統一台股增長(00981A)、主動野村台灣50(00985A)以及新掛牌的主動兆豐台灣豐收(00996A)在內，共有6檔主動式ETF的受益人數同時創下掛牌以來的歷史新高。

在投資人最為關心的核心指標：投資績效方面，主動式ETF憑藉經理人靈活的選股策略與產業洞察，展現了強勁的「吸金」與「吸睛」實力。綜合附圖數據與市場最新市價統計（截至3月31日），在績效排行榜上，由群益投信發行的主動群益科技創新(00992A)表現最為耀眼。

受惠於AI晶片巨頭輝達(NVIDIA)股價持續創高帶動全球科技股氣勢，00992A經理人精準佈局台灣AI關鍵供應鏈，使其今年以來（YTD）的累計漲幅高達27.13%，不僅大幅領先同期台股大盤指數表現，更在全體主動式台股ETF中勇奪績效冠軍寶座。強勁的績效也換來超高人氣，00992A同時蟬聯人氣王，顯示「績效即人氣」的市場鐵律在主動式ETF市場依然適用。

市場現結構性輪動 攻守兼備靈活應對變局

針對當前台股盤勢與布局策略，群益投信台股主動式ETF團隊發表了最新的市場觀察。投信表示，儘管近期中東地緣政治風險再度升溫，令國際股市震盪加劇，但這正考驗著投資工具的適應力。相較於被動追蹤指數的傳統ETF，台股主動式ETF擁有攻守兼備的靈活操作特性，經理人可根據市場變化迅速調整持股，正是投資人在震盪市況中可多加運用的利器。

觀察近日台股盤面的資金流向，投信團隊指出一個重要趨勢：市場資金並未全面撤出，而是由過去過度集中的權值型標的，靈活轉向具有實質業績支撐、基期較低的中小型股與具備題材支撐的族群。這種明顯的「結構性輪動」顯示市場資金仍持續在尋找成長機會。特別是龐大的AI供應鏈內部，資金正進行重新配置與尋找基期更低的標的，這使得整體盤面維持高度活絡，有利於主動型經理人發揮選股優勢。

投資策略！聚焦規格升級與降息循環機會

news.Title: 熱門股／券商土洋大對決！17檔台股目標價出爐
news.Content: 財經中心／師瑞德報導 台灣證券市場迎來多家本土及外資券商對上市櫃公司的最新評等與目標價調整。根據永豐金證券法人業務部最新編製的報告，日系和美系券商對特定科技股展現出強烈的樂觀看法，與部分個股面臨目標價下調形成鮮明對比，市場投資氣氛顯得冷熱不一。 重磅利多！外資大幅調高旺宏與貿聯-KY目標價 在「目標價調整」表格中，最吸睛的莫過於記憶體大廠旺宏（2337）和連接器大廠貿聯-KY（3665）。美系摩根大通（JP Morgan）在最新的研究報告中，對旺宏展現高度肯定，將其目標價從原本的100元大幅上調至165元，評等維持「優於大盤」，這使得其潛在漲幅高達42.9%。 日系大和證券（Daiwa）則對貿聯-KY投下信心一票，將其目標價從2245元上調至2545元，潛在漲幅達46.3%，評等維持「買進」。此外，瑞銀（UBS）也上調了致茂（2360）的目標價至1900元。 金融與傳產動態！台新新光金獲凱基上調評等 金融股方面，台新新光金（2887）獲得本土凱基證券（KGI）的青睞，評等從先前的看法被上調至「優於大盤」。高盛證券（Goldman Sachs）雖然微幅調高其目標價至19.8元，但仍維持「中立」評等。國泰金（2882）目標價也被元大和高盛微幅調高。傳產股方面，統一（1216）被大和證券下調目標價。 科技股看法分歧 晶片龍頭多空論戰 上銀評等獲調高 晶片龍頭聯發科（2454）面臨市場多空看法分歧。雖然摩根士丹利（MS）對聯發科的看法轉趨保守，將其目標價下調至1988元，但野村證券（Nomura）在3月31日的評等調整中，將聯發科評等上調至「買進」（Buy）。 同樣面臨目標價下調的科技股還有聯電（2303）、京元電子（2449）、台特化（4772）和晶心科（6533），其中晶心科被大和證券大幅下調目標價。相較之下，上銀（2049）被摩根士丹利將評等上調至「優於大盤」。 市場回顧：旺矽獲大幅看好 納入研究範圍本日無變動 回顧3月31日的調整，本土券商永豐金證券大幅調高旺矽（6223）目標價至4215元，潛在漲幅17.2%，顯示本土法人對半導體測試設備股的看好。在納入研究範圍調整部分，報告註明本日無調整。投資人應關注券商對個別產業的看法轉變，以作為未來佈局的參考依據。 三立新聞網提醒您：

However, one research firm believes the market is overreacting and that the TurboQuant development will have little impact on memory demand. Analysts at Bernstein believe HDD demand won’t budge ...

• Memory stocks experienced a drawdown after Alphabet (GOOGL) announced its TurboQuant algorithm, which could solve memory bottleneck issues.
• Bernstein believes the market is overreacting, with minimal impact expected on HDD and slight impact on NAND memory demand.
• SanDisk (SNDK) stock has returned 1,371% over the last 12 months due to restricted supply and massive AI workload demand.

news.Keywords: Memory stocks, Alphabet, TurboQuant algorithm, SanDisk, AI demand, Bernstein, revenue growth

news.Title: 戰火殺不死台股！5檔高含積人數逆勢創高　散戶早就偷偷撿
news.Content:
財經中心／余國棟報導

3月台股飽受中東戰火衝擊，好壞股通通跌，不過，隨川普「二週停戰說」利多出鞘，帶旺台股護國神山台積電及高含積量ETF股價補血復甦，除股價飆升外，其中，更有5檔高含積量ETF三月獲投資人超前部署、低接資金默默吃貨，激勵受益人數再攀歷史新高!

根據集保統計，截至3/27止，持有台積電4成以上的台股高含積量ETF中，新光00904、元大0050、富邦0052、國泰00922與凱基009816共4檔，受益人數攀升至歷史新高，其中，受益人數最多的是元大0050，全台受益人高達約270萬人；為國人ETF最愛；績效方面，新光00904表現出線，今年來至3/31為止，累積含息報酬率達20.11%，超越台積電的13.92%，也大幅領先加權指數的9.53%，另外，富邦0052、元大0050、國泰00922等3檔，首季累積報酬率也贏過大盤，績效表現亮眼，吸引受益人數同步翻揚。

新光臺灣半導體30(00904)ETF經理人詹佳峯表示，台積電近期股價回落，不減未來兩三年基本面亮麗前景，加上又是台股政府護盤重心，預計隨美伊戰事劃下休止符後，未來股價仍有機會恢復基本面表現。更值得注意的是，當今全球AI需求熱潮持續火熱，帶旺最直接受惠的是全球半導體產業，正迎來新一輪漲價週期，表示半導體行業正從去庫存週期，轉向量價齊升的新階段，結構性的投資機會正在浮現。

半導體繼存儲晶片價格攀升後，類比晶片、功率元件及晶圓代工也紛紛啟動漲價潮，詹佳峯預估，半導體行業價格上行趨勢明確，次產業鏈的廠商獲利空間，將隨著漲價傳導效應逐漸展開，背後代表電子產業下游需求回暖，提供半導體整體庫存出清、供給端產能出現擴張，整體景氣熱度持續回升等基本面利多。儘管最近Google新發布的AI記憶體壓縮技術TurboQuant出現，引發市場對未來儲存設備需求減少的擔憂，造成記憶體股價走跌，不過，從未來AI發展歷程來看，台股半導體供應鏈未來數年仍持續受惠AI基建升浪。

中東地緣政治衝擊，屬市場短線利空因素，造成台股短線波動劇烈，台新投信ETF投資團隊分析，事後來看，都是提供投資人長線逢回加碼優質資產的布局良機，尤其是台股，自2023年進入AI時代以來，每遇地緣衝突事件，盤勢拉回期間從事後來看，多是投資買點，例如2023/10/11哈瑪斯攻擊以色列，攻擊發生後3個月，台股反彈5.5%，6個月後上漲25%；另外，2024/4/15伊朗攻擊以色列，攻擊發生3個月後，大盤反彈約18.1%，6個月後上漲16.2%，顯示全球地緣政治衝突事件，不影響全球AI大趨勢格局。

三立新聞網提醒您：

內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

投資一定有風險，基金投資有賺有賠，申購前應詳閱公開說明書。

news.Title: 神山領頭 台股4月法說連發
news.Content:
美國總統川普「勝利宣言」無用，台股在清明長假前夕賣壓出籠，加權指數開高走低、再失守33K大關，惟隨時序進入第二季，台美股市也將迎來全新一輪業績密集公布期，權王台積電（2330）16日法說會準備重磅登場，成本波台股法說行情領頭羊，連假後台股4月共有南亞科（2408）、台達電（2308）、友達（2409）等29家法說連發，牽動市值於50兆元，吸引市場目光。

時序邁入第二季，台股4月法說會行情準備開跑，市場期待上市櫃業績面亮眼表現有望為行情打上強心針。權王台積電搶先宣布將在16日舉行法說會，為本月台股關鍵大事件，而統計清明連假後截至4月底，台股共將迎來29家公司法說會陸續登場，合計總市值達53.82兆元，其中台積電、台達電、南亞科、兆豐金、緯創、群聯、光寶科、力積電、亞德客-KY、友達等多檔指標股均入列，為2026年第二季法說會行情拉開序幕。

展望4月，永豐投顧總經理黃柏棠分析，台股上半月行情主要關注中東戰事發展，下半月行情焦點則是落在將於4月中旬登場的台積電法說會。現階段台積電股價拉回主要是受到戰事風險影響，但基本面亮麗展望不變，目前內外資圈預估台積電第二季業績季成長幅度，可望自先前的7％拉高至雙位數百分比，故預期台積電法說會將是台股4月行情關鍵轉折點，在法說會利多推動下，將帶動台股反彈。

關注台積電法說會亮點，華南投顧董事長呂仁傑、台新投顧總經理黃文清認為，台積電4月法說會可聚焦七大重點，包括第二季預估業績成長幅度、N2量產進度與良率爬波速度、全年營收指引、資本支出計畫是否調整、AI及新應用市場需求展望、海外擴廠進度、中東衝突對相關原物料造成的衝擊。

news.Title: 南亞科3月營收飆升560％
news.Content:
記憶體大廠南亞科2日公告3月合併營收181.70億元，月增16.42％、年增560.04％，連續第五度改寫單月歷史新高；累計第一季合併營收490.87億元，年增582.91％。在此波舊世代記憶體報價急漲帶動下，南亞科營運表現持續升溫，成為市場觀察DDR4後市走向的重要指標。

隨DDR4漲勢凌厲，市場對後段行情看法出現分歧。外資大摩認為，DDR4在第二季過後，漲價動能可能逐漸降溫，若後續大陸業者長鑫存儲擴大供給，2027年報價壓力恐提前被市場反映，連帶使南亞科評價面臨修正空間。

相較之下，本國法人看法仍偏正向。本國法人認為，在AI伺服器、資料中心及工控應用需求持續擴張下，DRAM新增產能開出仍有限，短期供不應求格局不易扭轉。

南亞科現階段受惠DDR4供給吃緊與價格上揚，營運彈性明顯放大，若後續伺服器與工控等高附加價值應用比重持續提升，仍有助支撐獲利表現。

從基本面來看，南亞科除營收持續創新高之外，日前宣布辦理私募，引進鎧俠、SanDisk、SK集團旗下Solidigm及Cisco等策略投資人，並同步簽訂長期DRAM供應協議，也替後續營運增添想像空間。

市場解讀，南亞科未來供應產品方向，應以企業級SSD所需的buffer DRAM為主，藉由策略客戶入股與長約綁定，進一步深化與全球企業級SSD客戶的合作關係。

南亞科此舉不僅是單純募資，更具備強化供應鏈地位與鞏固客戶關係的雙重意義。一方面可取得資金，支應先進製程與設備投資；另一方面，也有助於提升其在DDR4 buffer DRAM供應鏈中的戰略角色。

整體來看，儘管外資大摩對DDR4後段行情轉趨審慎，但法人仍認為，在供需偏緊、長約支撐及新產能尚未大量開出前，南亞科仍具相對優勢，後續營運動能與策略合作效益，仍是市場關注焦點。

news.Title: 台股基金績效佳 科技類最夯
news.Content:
今年來全球主要股票市場頻頻創新高，也讓股票基金績效長紅。統計今年來投信發行的國內外各類股票基金平均績效表現，整體來看，國內股票型遠勝海外股票基金，檢視各類台股基金表現平均報酬至少2成起跳，其中台股基金以科技型上漲34.47％居冠，一般股票型、中小型台股基金也都有超過3成的平均報酬。

主動群益科技創新（00992A）暨群益創新科技基金經理人陳朝政表示，統計2005年以來台股歷經五個多頭行情，而電子科技創新股，也都成為台股多頭加速器，台灣科技創新領先全球脈動，因此過去20年台股多頭期間，電子指數漲幅都大勝大盤。今年市場氛圍仍將圍繞AI產業，算力需求提升刺激CSP大規模資本支出，形成持續且規模化的採購動能，推動AI伺服器快速成長。

展望台股後市，對電子產業獲利成長保持樂觀態度，在AI影響力持續擴大下，台灣最強的半導體與硬體相關概念股皆為最受惠的廠商，中長線而言，企業獲利回到成長軌道，台股基本面有支撐，對台股後市仍保持正面看法。

玉山投信市場策略部協理葉家榮指出，AI供應鏈中最重要的硬體設備就是伺服器，不僅決定AI演算法的執行速度和精準度，同時也影響了整個AI系統的穩定性，其中最關鍵的中、上游廠商皆屬於台灣供應鏈，挹注台股多頭最為受惠。根據Trendforce預估，預期全球AI Server比重持續提升，至2026年預估將達17.2％，出貨量年增率將高達21％。

凱基台灣精五門基金研究團隊指出，AI台廠供應鏈持續受惠於AI基礎設施的投資熱潮，隨著AI伺服器的機櫃組裝日益順暢，散熱、滑軌、機殼及電源供應器等零組件廠商在第一季有望繳出淡季不淡的表現；而通用型伺服器市場也同步迎來復甦，台灣相關硬體供應鏈的獲利前景樂觀。

投信法人普遍認為，各國持續投入AI基礎設施的建置，AI供應鏈族群具備獲利優先受惠的優勢，惟若中東緊張情勢延續，短期內恐將透過油價與運輸成本推升全球通膨壓力，進而干擾終端消費需求與企業的投資信心，建議投資人參與股市成長的同時，做好資產配置應對市場波動。建議投資人以定期定額介入台股基金的方式參與，不但最為簡單方便，也具風險分散效益。

news.Title: 川普反覆 台股力守季線
news.Content:
美國總統川普戰事演說不如預期且態度強硬，加上清明連假來臨，台股搭上「川普號大怒神」，加權指數急轉直下，終場下跌602點或1.82％收32,572點，前日上漲1,451點吐回近半數，並失守5日、10日及33K，月線得而復失，國家隊銜命力守季線。

富邦投顧董事長陳奕光指出，此次演說形同美伊談判破局，原市場預期川普將宣布退出，結果出現反轉，下周清明節後盤勢關鍵，在地緣政治風險是否降溫、通膨數據變化以及企業財報表現三大變數，牽動資金動向與市場信心。

陳奕光建議，透過美國10年期公債殖利率作為通膨預期指標，推演未來可能會出現的四種情境：若殖利率升至4.44％以上，加權指數恐回測31,529點前低；若升至4.6％至4.8％，不排除下探30,000點關卡。

目前美債殖利率落在4.1％至4.4％，預估大盤將於31,000至34,000點震盪。隨財報季展開，台積電16日法說會登場，成為市場重要風向球。

外資2日再度轉為賣超386億元，並鎖定台積電大舉提款171億元，台積電終場下跌45元收1,810元，跌破10日線與月線；外資自美伊開戰的3月起至今，累計賣超台股9,836億元，即將突破兆元，外資是否賣過頭，也引起市場高度關注；八大公股行庫則轉買超79.31億元撐盤。

華南投顧董事長呂仁傑表示，市場對於美伊衝突忍受期約一個月，若能在一個月內達成停戰或取得決定性進展，台股第二季仍有望反彈挑戰前高；如延宕至4月中旬仍無停戰或緩解跡象，市場恐劇烈震盪，建議逢低分批承接長期趨勢向上AI受惠股。

第一金投顧董事長黃詣庭則說，清明連假後的台股開市，將反映2日與6日的美股表現，川普對伊朗之前預告的最後通牒為4月6日，屆時發言將牽連長假後的表現。

news.Title: 神山領頭 台股4月法說連發
news.Content:
美國總統川普「勝利宣言」無用，台股在清明長假前夕賣壓出籠，加權指數開高走低、再失守33K大關，惟隨時序進入第二季，台美股市也將迎來全新一輪業績密集公布期，權王台積電（2330）16日法說會準備重磅登場，成本波台股法說行情領頭羊，連假後台股4月共有南亞科（2408）、台達電（2308）、友達（2409）等29家法說連發，牽動市值於50兆元，吸引市場目光。

時序邁入第二季，台股4月法說會行情準備開跑，市場期待上市櫃業績面亮眼表現有望為行情打上強心針。權王台積電搶先宣布將在16日舉行法說會，為本月台股關鍵大事件，而統計清明連假後截至4月底，台股共將迎來29家公司法說會陸續登場，合計總市值達53.82兆元，其中台積電、台達電、南亞科、兆豐金、緯創、群聯、光寶科、力積電、亞德客-KY、友達等多檔指標股均入列，為2026年第二季法說會行情拉開序幕。

展望4月，永豐投顧總經理黃柏棠分析，台股上半月行情主要關注中東戰事發展，下半月行情焦點則是落在將於4月中旬登場的台積電法說會。現階段台積電股價拉回主要是受到戰事風險影響，但基本面亮麗展望不變，目前內外資圈預估台積電第二季業績季成長幅度，可望自先前的7％拉高至雙位數百分比，故預期台積電法說會將是台股4月行情關鍵轉折點，在法說會利多推動下，將帶動台股反彈。

關注台積電法說會亮點，華南投顧董事長呂仁傑、台新投顧總經理黃文清認為，台積電4月法說會可聚焦七大重點，包括第二季預估業績成長幅度、N2量產進度與良率爬波速度、全年營收指引、資本支出計畫是否調整、AI及新應用市場需求展望、海外擴廠進度、中東衝突對相關原物料造成的衝擊。

news.AI_Summary:

news.Keywords: ETF splits, share splits, investment allocation, ETF comparison, growth stocks

news.Title: Amazon must negotiate with Staten Island warehouse workers, NLRB says
news.Content: By Greg Bensinger SAN FRANCISCO, April 2 (Reuters) - Amazon must negotiate with a labor union representing some 5,000 workers at a ‌company warehouse on Staten Island, the National Labor Relations Board ruled ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon must negotiate with a labor union representing approximately 5,000 workers at a Staten Island warehouse, according to the National Labor Relations Board (NLRB).
• The NLRB ruled that Amazon engaged in unfair labor practices by refusing to bargain with the Amazon Labor Union.
• Amazon stated it disagrees with the ruling and plans to appeal, expressing confidence that an unbiased court will overturn it.
• The union, which aligned with the Teamsters, called the ruling a 'historic victory'.
• Amazon has previously resisted organized labor, citing high wages and direct negotiation with employees.
news.Keywords: labor union, NLRB ruling, unfair labor practices, negotiation, appeal, worker rights

news.Title: Apple Just Turned 50 Years Old. Is the AAPL Stock Cake Stale or Sweet?
news.Content: Apple (AAPL) just crossed a milestone few tech companies ever see, hitting its 50th anniversary on April 1, 2026, five decades after Steve Jobs and Steve Wozniak turned a garage project into one of Wall Street’s most-watched stocks. Over that span, a hypothetical 100-share allocation at Apple’s IPO price in 1980 would now be worth more than $5.5 million, showing the power of its long-term return story in the public markets. More News from Barchart Why Oppenheimer Is Betting on Monolithic Power Stock Alongside Nvidia and Marvell Here This Dividend Stock Has Been Steady Amid ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple (AAPL) celebrated its 50th anniversary, with a hypothetical IPO investment now worth over $5.5 million.
• However, AAPL stock is down 6% year-to-date in 2026, underperforming the S&P 500 and tech sector.
• Apple's market capitalization has been surpassed by Nvidia (NVDA), raising questions about its AI and services pivot.
• The company reported Q1 revenue of $143.8 billion (up 16% YoY) and EPS of $2.84, with a 12.95% payout ratio supporting its dividend.
• Apple is expanding US manufacturing and partnering with Alphabet (GOOG) to integrate Google's Gemini models into its products.
news.Keywords: Apple, stock performance, AI pivot, services growth, revenue growth, Alphabet partnership, manufacturing expansion

news.Title: Amazon is Considering a $9 Billion Deal to Acquire Satellite Communications Company Globalstar. Here's Why Amazon, Apple, and Tesla Investors Should Pay Attention.
news.Content: The space race is heating up in recent days, and in more ways than one. The launch of Artemis II this week to fly around the moon has captured the imagination of Wall Street and Main Street alike, and investors are taking a fresh look at the intersection of stocks and space . Further stoking this interest is word that Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) may be looking to expand its satellite business. The company is in discussions to scoop up $9 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon is reportedly in discussions to acquire satellite telecommunications company Globalstar for $9 billion.
• This potential acquisition could bolster Amazon's satellite business, Project Kuiper, which aims to launch over 3,000 satellites.
• Globalstar currently operates 24 LEO satellites and plans to expand to 32.
• The deal could have implications for Apple, which invested $1.5 billion in Globalstar in 2024.
• Tesla CEO Elon Musk is also a major player in the space race with SpaceX's Starlink service.
news.Keywords: satellite communications, acquisition talks, Project Kuiper, LEO satellites, space race

news.Title: Oracle Stock Hasn't Been This Cheap in 3 Years -- But Is It a Buy Right Now?
news.Content: The stock market is in the throes of a sell-off, with major U.S. indexes like the Nasdaq-100 and the Dow Jones Industrial Average plunging by more than 10% from their record highs as of March 30. Ongoing geopolitical tensions in the Middle East have sent oil prices soaring, which is stoking fears of an economic slowdown here in the U.S. But one stock in particular started sinking long before the Middle East conflict began. Oracle (NYSE: ORCL) has built some of the world's best data centers for developing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Oracle's stock has plummeted 57% from its September peak, trading at its cheapest level since early 2023.
• The company's Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) segment surged 84% YoY to $4.9 billion in Q3 fiscal 2026.
• Oracle has a massive remaining performance obligations (RPO) backlog of $553 billion, up 325% YoY.
• Concerns exist about OpenAI, a major customer, fulfilling its $300 billion RPO commitment due to its financial losses.
• Geopolitical tensions and rising oil prices are also contributing to market weakness.
news.Keywords: stock decline, OCI growth, RPO backlog, customer concentration risk, geopolitical impact

news.Title: Tesla's Vehicle Deliveries Are Down 14% From Last Quarter. Is It Time to Consider These 2 EV Competitors?
news.Content: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) published its latest update for vehicle production and deliveries before the market opened this morning, and the report suggested ongoing headwinds for the company's core electric vehicle ( EV ) business. While the company produced 408,386 EVs last quarter, it posted only 358,023 vehicles in the quarter -- falling short of the average analyst estimate's call for 370,000 vehicles delivered in the period. Notably, a previous report from the company had estimated that it would deliver 365,645 vehicles in Q1. Tesla's Q1 deliveries were ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla produced 408,386 EVs in Q1 but delivered only 358,023, missing analyst estimates of 370,000.
• Deliveries were up 6% year-over-year but down 14% sequentially from Q4 2025, indicating potential demand issues.
• Chinese EV manufacturers like BYD and Nio are showing strong growth, impacting Tesla's performance.
• BYD exported over 321,000 vehicles in Q1, with its international deliveries nearly matching Tesla's global total.
• Nio reported strong year-over-year growth, delivering 83,465 vehicles in Q1.
news.Keywords: delivery miss, sequential decline, EV competition, Chinese EV market, demand issues

news.Title: Applied Digital Just Borrowed Another $2 Billion. Its Biggest Customer Is $21 Billion in Debt.
news.Content: Applied Digital (NASDAQ: APLD) just added $2.15 billion in new debt at a 6.75% interest rate. That brings total debt to roughly $5 billion, up from just $468 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Applied Digital has increased its debt to approximately $5 billion, up from $468 million a year ago.
• The company has a $16 billion pipeline of contracted lease revenue, with $11 billion coming from CoreWeave.
• CoreWeave, an AI cloud computing company, carries over $21 billion in debt and lost $1.2 billion last year.
• CoreWeave depends heavily on OpenAI, which projects $14 billion in losses for 2026.
• Applied Digital's pipeline relies on the solvency of CoreWeave and OpenAI, creating a significant risk.
news.Keywords: debt increase, contracted lease revenue, customer solvency, AI company losses, financial risk

news.Title: Stifel Warns of Tesla Stock Fallout
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Tesla ( NASDAQ:TSLA ) shares could face pressure after first-quarter deliveries fell short ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Stifel suggests Tesla's stock could face pressure after missing Q1 delivery expectations (358,023 vs. ~365,000 forecast).
• Tesla's energy storage deployments were 8.8 GWh, below the expected 14.4 GWh.
• Rivian exceeded Stifel's delivery estimates by 4% (10,365 vehicles) and reaffirmed its full-year guidance.
• Stifel views Tesla's results as likely negative for its stock, while Rivian's performance appears modestly positive.
• Elevated gasoline prices could potentially support higher EV sales.
news.Keywords: delivery miss, energy storage miss, stock pressure, competitor performance, EV sales outlook

news.Title: 鴻海跌跌不休　散戶哀嚎接刀！杜金龍揭露「悲觀地板價」：沒守住恐再殺
news.Content:
財經中心／李宜樺報導

台股近期震盪加劇，尤其權值股「二哥」 鴻海 （2317）更是跌跌不休，2日股價一度跌至191.5元，終場以193元作收，讓全台140萬名股民心碎不已，不少人哀號「攤平到躺平」。股市老先覺杜金龍在 三立財經台iNews《94要賺錢》 節目中直言，鴻海目前已淪為弱勢股，且大盤創新高時它卻逆勢破底，建議投資人這段時間要懂得「換股救星」，別讓辛苦攢下的血汗錢在跌勢中蒸發。

鴻海跌跌不休沒底線 專家杜金龍揭百萬股民心聲

杜金龍指出，鴻海近期股價疲軟，關鍵在於外資瘋狂提款，光是二月份就大賣超過三十萬張。即便去年賺進13.61元、配息5.4元創下歷史新高，但換算下來殖利率僅約3%，對市場缺乏驚喜感。杜大師坦言，現在的鴻海「該漲不漲」，甚至在台股挑戰新高之際先行破底，對於這140萬名「海粉」來說，現在的操作與其死守，不如適度調整持股比例。

news.Title: The Neocloud Supercycle Is Here. This Growth Stock Could Be Its Biggest Winner.
news.Content: The artificial intelligence (AI) boom has created the need for specialized data centers powered by graphics processing units (GPUs), which are better suited to run AI workloads such as training large language models (LLMs) and running inference applications. These neoclouds don't just provide the latest and fastest GPUs; they also feature high-speed connectivity and specialized ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The demand for neocloud AI infrastructure, including specialized data centers, is experiencing a supercycle.
• Applied Digital is constructing two data center campuses in North Dakota with 700 MW capacity, with 600 MW already leased.
• CoreWeave has leased 400 MW from Applied Digital for 15 years, contributing to a $16 billion potential lease revenue pipeline.
• Applied Digital has a roadmap to build 4.3 GW of AI data centers, anticipating strong demand growth.
• The company's stock has surged 350% over the past year, with analysts forecasting solid growth.
news.Keywords: neocloud supercycle, AI data centers, leased capacity, lease revenue pipeline, growth forecast

news.Title: Cisco's Gross Margin Contracts Sequentially: Is Growth Getting Harder?
news.Content: Cisco Systems ’ CSCO gross margin has contracted sequentially over the trailing four quarters. In the second quarter of fiscal 2026, CSCO reported a non-GAAP gross margin of 67.5% compared with 68.1% in the first quarter of fiscal 2026, 68.4% in the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025 and 68.6% in the third ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cisco's gross margin has contracted sequentially for four quarters, with a 120 basis point decrease year-over-year in Q2 fiscal 2026.
• Non-GAAP product gross margin was impacted by mix and higher memory costs, partially offset by productivity improvements.
• Cisco expects Q3 fiscal 2026 gross margin to decline sequentially by 150 basis points due to memory costs and AI revenue mix.
• The company expects Q3 revenues between $15.4 billion and $15.6 billion, with non-GAAP earnings of $1.02 to $1.04 per share.
• Cisco expects to take AI orders exceeding $5 billion and recognize over $3 billion in AI infrastructure revenues from hyperscalers in fiscal 2026.
news.Keywords: gross margin contraction, memory costs, AI revenue mix, revenue guidance, earnings guidance

news.Keywords: AI partnership, GPU processing, network edge, AI inference, analyst sentiment

news.Title: 川普關稅政策一年後 投資人重新思考「美國例外論」
news.Content:
《CNBC》周四 (2 日) 報導，美國總統川普去年 4 月 2 日宣布大規模關稅措施，並稱為「解放日」，一年後全球投資人正重新檢視「美國例外論」，資金配置也出現變化。當時政策對中國商品課徵 34%、歐盟 20%、越南 46% 關稅，引發全球市場劇烈震盪，美股、美債與美元同步承壓，市場一度出現「拋售美國」交易潮。

一年來，隨著川普政策反覆、貿易與地緣政治風險升溫，美國資產持續出現波動，投資策略也從「美國優先」轉向更多元配置。市場甚至出現「避開美國的投資策略」(Anywhere But the USA, ABUSA) 與「川普總是臨陣退縮」(Trump Always Chickens Out, TACO) 等交易概念，反映投資人對政策不確定性的調整。

資金轉向分散配置 非美市場表現領先

數據顯示，自「解放日」以來，巴西、英國與日本股市表現均優於標普 500，部分新興市場更成為資金布局焦點。AJ Bell 分析指出，上海綜合指數、南韓 Kospi 與日經 225 指數的報酬率均超越美股主要指數，顯示資金正逐步分散至美國以外市場。

此外，MSCI 美國指數過去一年上漲約 14%，低於 MSCI 全球指數 18% 的漲幅。市場人士指出，川普「美國優先」政策促使歐洲加大國防與基礎建設支出，並縮小美歐成長差距，進一步支撐歐洲資產評價。

政策不確定性升高 「美國例外論」面臨挑戰

分析人士認為，關稅政策、對聯準會獨立性的挑戰，以及中東與拉丁美洲軍事行動等因素，正削弱投資人對美國市場的信心。Evelyn Partners 策略主管 Daniel Casali 指出，市場正重新評估美國資產的吸引力，尤其是在政策決策更趨反覆的情況下。

deVere Group 執行長 Nigel Green 則表示，資金並未全面撤出美國，但新增資金流向已出現變化，投資人更傾向配置印度、日本與東南亞市場，同時針對政策風險進行避險。

施羅德（Schroders）多重資產主管 Dorian Carrell 指出，伊朗戰事、民間信貸市場壓力與人工智慧 (AI) 資本支出上升等因素，也推動投資人重新思考資產配置，部分機會正轉向歐洲與日本等市場。

儘管如此，專家仍認為，美國市場長期優勢尚未消失。卡薩利指出，美國經濟仍具備較強的成長動能與創新能力，但未來資金配置將更強調分散與風險管理。「美國例外論仍存在，但已不再是理所當然。」

news.Title: US Lawmakers Propose Crackdown on Chip Tool Sales to China
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- US lawmakers unveiled legislation that seeks to crack down on exports of chipmaking tools to China, especially from allies including the Netherlands and Japan, in a bipartisan effort to help Washington further constrain Beijing’s technology ambitions. The draft bill, introduced in the House on Thursday, would strengthen existing restrictions on semiconductor manufacturing equipment sales from firms like ASML Holding NV and Tokyo Electron Ltd. A companion version is expected to be released in the Senate later this month, according to people familiar with the matter. The goal is to subject these companies to the same, tougher curbs their ...
news.AI_Summary:
• US lawmakers have proposed legislation (MATCH Act) to crack down on chipmaking tool exports to China, including from allies like the Netherlands and Japan.
• The bill aims to subject foreign firms like ASML Holding NV and Tokyo Electron Ltd. to the same curbs as US rivals.
• It includes banning engineers from maintaining and repairing tools at certain Chinese facilities.
• The legislation would also introduce new controls affecting US firms like Applied Materials Inc., Lam Research Corp., and KLA Corp.
• The goal is to align allied restrictions and maintain a technological edge against China's AI chip production.
news.Keywords: export controls, chipmaking tools, China, multilateral alignment, supply chain security

news.Title: Why Aehr Test Systems Rallied This Week
news.Content: Shares of semiconductor testing company Aehr Test Systems (NASDAQ: AEHR) rallied 30.6% this week through Friday at 2:33 p.m. EDT, according to data from S&P Global Market Intelligence . news.AI_Summary:
• Aehr Test Systems (AEHR) rallied 30.6% this week following an order for its wafer test and burn-in machines from a new silicon photonics customer.
• This customer is innovating in silicon photonics, a technology expected to displace copper in AI data centers.
• Aehr's previous demand driver was chips for electric vehicles, but revenue fell as the EV revolution stalled.

news.Title: Why the Iran War Has Created a Buying Opportunity for Renewables
news.Content: The war in Iran, which escalated in a matter of weeks, has shown just how complex wars can be. They never go as planned, especially because all parties involved have a say, and one can never predict how the other will act. While no one doubted that the U.S. and Israel had an advantage over Iran from a military perspective, the conflict has proven difficult because Iran has used tactics to wage war on the global economy as a result of their influence over oil. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The war in Iran has highlighted global reliance on foreign oil, particularly from the Middle East.
• Disruptions through the Strait of Hormuz have caused crude oil prices to rise above $100 per barrel.
• Higher oil prices act as a tax on consumers and increase business costs, exacerbating inflation issues.
• The article suggests reducing reliance on foreign oil and increasing domestic energy production, favoring renewable energy sources.
• Artificial intelligence (AI) has driven demand for power to support data centers and infrastructure.
news.Keywords: Iran war, oil prices, energy security, renewable energy, AI power demand

news.Title: Google, OpenAI, Circle join hands for agentic payments
news.Content: Tech heavyweights and crypto firms are converging to build a new financial layer for the internet. But this one is designed not for humans. A coalition of major technology, payments and crypto firms is forming around a shared vision of enabling AI agents to transact seamlessly without human intervention. Companies including Google's parent company Alphabet (Nasdaq: ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (Google), OpenAI, and Circle are joining a nonprofit initiative supporting the x402 protocol for instant, automated payments by AI agents.
• The initiative aims to create neutral, interoperable rails for 'agentic commerce,' where software programs pay for services directly.
• Current payment rails are not optimized for the high frequency, low-cost transactions expected from AI agents.
• The x402 protocol enables direct settlement between machines, eliminating friction and reducing costs.
• Competing frameworks like the Machine Payments Protocol (MPP) are also emerging.
news.Keywords: AI agents, automated payments, x402 protocol, agentic commerce, payment rails

• This shift indicates a focus on providing practical AI tools for everyday use.

news.Title: Sandisk Was the Top-Performing S&P 500 Stock in Q1. Can SNDK Continue Its Run in Q1?
news.Content: The top-performing stocks in the S&P 500 ($SPX) over the last two years tell an obvious story. Markets have been dominated by AI stocks, but the nature of the companies doing the heavy lifting hasn’t been the same. First, it was AI enablers like Nvidia (NVDA), Broadcom (AVGO), and Palantir (PLTR) that drove market returns. By 2025, it was another step in the value chain, one dominated by storage and memory players, that generated the most returns. In 2025, for instance, Sandisk (SNDK) was the top-performing S&P stock. The shares returned 559% to investors, closely followed by other storage and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Sandisk (SNDK) was the top-performing S&P 500 stock in 2025 and Q1 2026, returning 559% in 2025 and 193% YTD in 2026.
• This outperformance is driven by restricted supply and massive demand for memory products due to AI workloads.
• The company's performance is a continuation of the AI value chain play, focusing on storage and memory players.
• Despite fears from Google's TurboQuant algorithm, the market is focused on the ongoing memory supply crunch.
• Major players require 2-3 years of capex to meet AI demand, and the current shortage is not price-sensitive.
news.Keywords: Sandisk, AI stocks, memory market, supply crunch, revenue growth, storage technology, S&P 500

news.Title: Coinbase, Stripe Back Competing AI Payment Protocols as 97M Transactions Logged
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Coinbase Global ( NASDAQ:COIN ), Cloudflare, and Stripe are moving quickly to position themselves at the center of a potential shift toward AI-driven payments, backing an open-source protocol called x402 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Coinbase, Cloudflare, and Stripe are backing the open-source x402 protocol under the Linux Foundation for AI-driven payments.
• The initiative includes participants like Microsoft, Google, Amazon Web Services, and American Express.
• The goal is to build a neutral and interoperable payment layer for autonomous software, as existing rails are not optimized for AI agents.
• The x402 protocol revives the 402 Payment Required status code for instant, automated transactions, largely using stablecoins.
• A competing initiative, the Machine Payments Protocol (MPP), backed by Stripe and Paradigm, is also gaining traction.
news.Keywords: AI payments, x402 protocol, autonomous software, stablecoins, payment rails

• Earnings are projected to expand at an annual rate of roughly 16% over the next three to five years.
• Microsoft holds a significant share (21%) of the cloud computing market, which is showing signs of reacceleration.
• Nvidia trades at roughly 23x forward earnings, a discount to its 10-year median multiple of 45.3x, with EPS projected to grow at 39.1% annually.

news.Content: 2026 has proven more challenging for equities than many anticipated, with former market leaders like the Magnificent Seven delivering a rare period of underperformance. More broadly, the group has traded sideways to lower over the past six months, weighed down by concerns around elevated valuations, aggressive AI-related capital spending, and, more recently, geopolitical tensions in the Middle East. Yet beneath the surface, the fundamental picture has remained intact. These companies have continued to deliver strong sales and earnings growth, largely in line with ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft shares are down over 23% year-to-date, trading at a discount to historical valuation (22.5x forward earnings vs. 10-year median of 29.4x).
• Earnings are projected to expand at an annual rate of roughly 16% over the next three to five years.
• Microsoft holds a significant share (21%) of the cloud computing market, which is showing signs of reacceleration.
• Nvidia trades at roughly 23x forward earnings, a discount to its 10-year median multiple of 45.3x, with EPS projected to grow at 39.1% annually.
• Apple trades at roughly 30.5x forward earnings, above its 10-year median of 25.4x, with earnings expected to grow at 12.6% annually.
news.Keywords: valuation compression, earnings growth, cloud computing, AI infrastructure, forward P/E

news.Title: Veteran Wall Street firm sends Micron stock a blunt warning
news.Content: For Micron Technology ( MU ), the problem is not the possible elimination of the AI boom. Instead, it's whether the best days are now over, with much of the potential already priced in. In a latest move, Citigroup cut its price target on Micron to $425 from $510 after spot prices for a mainstream DDR5 16GB DRAM product fell about 6% since Micron reported earnings on March 18. Citi maintained its Buy rating, but the message is landing. What is the message? Essentially, one of Wall Street 's favorite AI memory stocks can become unsettled when short-term pricing shifts ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Citigroup cut its price target on Micron Technology (MU) to $425 from $510, citing a 6% fall in spot prices for DDR5 DRAM.
• Micron reported record revenue of $23.86 billion (nearly tripled YoY) and non-GAAP earnings of $12.20 per share in fiscal Q2.
• The company guided fiscal Q3 revenue to about $33.5 billion, significantly above Wall Street expectations.
• Concerns exist that Google's new efficiency push could reduce memory demand, impacting Micron's ramped spending.
• Micron increased its fiscal 2026 capital spending plan by $5 billion to over $25 billion, primarily for expanding manufacturing.
news.Keywords: price target cut, DRAM prices, revenue records, memory demand concerns, capital spending increase

news.Title: Prediction: The $700 Billion Artificial Intelligence (AI) Capex Boom Will Create the Best Buying Opportunity of 2026 for These 3 Stocks
news.Content: There's been a lot said about the massive spending on artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure, with Meta Platforms , Alphabet , Amazon , and Microsoft alone expected to spend a collective $700 billion this year on new data centers and the equipment that fills them, such as chips, networking equipment, server racks, and cooling systems. But take a moment to absorb that number -- $700 billion. Fewer than 20 publicly traded companies worldwide have market caps that ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms, Alphabet, Amazon, and Microsoft are expected to spend a collective $700 billion on AI infrastructure this year.
• Nvidia is considered a key beneficiary of this AI capex boom, with projected AI infrastructure opportunity worth up to $4 trillion over five years.
• Nvidia's Q4 fiscal 2026 sales were $68.1 billion (up 73% YoY), and total fiscal 2026 revenue was $215.9 billion (up 65% YoY).
• Nvidia's stock is trading at a forward P/E of about 21, considered reasonably valued after a market capitalization loss of roughly $840 billion.
• Digital Realty supplies data centers and connection services, operating over 300 facilities globally.
news.Keywords: AI capex boom, infrastructure spending, Nvidia beneficiary, data centers, market capitalization

news.Title: Why Tesla Stock Is Down Today
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Tesla ( NASDAQ:TSLA ) shares fell about 3% on Thursday after missing Wall Street's ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla shares fell about 3% after missing first-quarter delivery targets, despite a rebound in China sales.
• The company reported delivering 358,023 vehicles globally in Q1, below the average analyst estimate of about 369,000.
• This figure represents a roughly 14% drop from the prior quarter, though deliveries were up about 6% from a year ago.
• Investors are focused on the sequential decline and missed expectations.
• Intensifying competition from rivals like BYD adds pressure, while AI and robotics efforts remain in early stages.
news.Keywords: delivery miss, sequential decline, China sales, AI efforts, competitive pressure

news.Title: The Forgotten Blue Chip Stock That's Been Quietly Compounding at 15%+ a Year
news.Content: When investors think of e-commerce giants , eBay (NASDAQ: EBAY) rarely tops the list. The lack of fanfare hasn't stopped the online marketplace from beating the market in the long term, though. As of April 1, the 30-year-old company has been compounding at 14.3% annually over ...
news.AI_Summary:
• eBay rarely tops the list of e-commerce giants but has consistently beaten the market over the long term, compounding at 14.3% annually over the last decade.
• The company focuses on connecting buyers and sellers of used goods rather than building enterprise-class AI tools.
• eBay returned approximately $3 billion to shareholders in 2025 through buybacks and dividends, reducing its share count by 62% since 2015.
• The pending acquisition of Etsy's Depop service aims to refresh its demographic, with management guiding for 6% GMV growth in 2026.
• Amazon is mentioned as a competitor in building enterprise-class AI tools.
news.Keywords: e-commerce, long-term compounding, shareholder returns, buybacks, dividends, demographic refresh

news.Title: Micron Sell-off Is a "Buying Opportunity" Says Mizuho
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Mizuho Securities said the recent declines in Micron Technology ( NASDAQ:MU ) and Sandisk ( ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Mizuho Securities views recent declines in Micron Technology (MU) and Sandisk (SNDK) as buying opportunities, arguing 'peak memory' fears are overblown.
• Analyst Vijay Rakesh maintains Outperform ratings with price targets of $530 for Micron and $710 for Sandisk.
• He cites examples where efficiency gains led to increased demand (Jevons paradox), like DeepSeek in 2025 and Google's TurboQuant algorithms.
• Key-value cache compression could enable larger models, faster inference, and spur more spending.
• The transition from copper to optical networking may also drive higher AI server capital expenditures.
news.Keywords: memory stocks, buying opportunity, Jevons paradox, AI efficiency, optical networking

news.Title: Apple's AI Strategy Is Pivoting. Here's Why That Could Be Great News for the Stock.
news.Content: How does the saying go? If you can't beat 'em, join 'em? After struggling for over a year to develop its own artificial intelligence (AI) assistant to truly compete with leading platforms like ChatGPT, Google's Gemini, and Anthropic, that's exactly what Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) seems to be doing. According to well-circulated reporting from Bloomberg 's Mark Gurman, citing "people ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple is expected to accommodate rival AI assistants within iOS 27, acknowledging challenges in developing its own AI assistant.
• This strategy could potentially boost iPhone sales by allowing users to integrate preferred AI apps.
• The move aims to maintain long-term growth and iOS market share gains against Android.
• Apple stock has experienced an 11.3% pullback from its December peak.
• Google is mentioned as a competitor in AI assistants and its mobile operating system (Android).
news.Keywords: AI strategy, iOS integration, iPhone sales, market share, stock pullback

news.Title: Bye Bye, NVDA! Cathie Wood Dumps Nearly $30 Million in Nvidia
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Cathie Wood's ARK Invest sold about $27.8 million worth of Nvidia ( NASDAQ:NVDA ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cathie Wood's ARK Invest sold approximately $27.8 million worth of Nvidia (NVDA) shares on March 26.
• The fund manager is rotating capital from large-cap AI hardware stocks into healthcare AI and cloud computing upstarts.
• This pivot reflects concerns about stretched valuations for AI infrastructure names amid market corrections.
• ARK is also adding OpenAI to three of its ETFs, providing exposure to the AI startup.
• Wood signals that the next phase of AI value creation may lie in application-layer intelligence and infrastructure leasing, rather than chipmaking.
news.Keywords: ARK Invest, Nvidia sale, AI valuation concerns, capital rotation, application-layer AI

news.Title: 台股大跌卻有人加倉　法人直接喊這2檔可以這樣撿！
news.Content:
財經中心／余國棟報導

儘管短期受戰爭噪音干擾，但台灣經濟基本面依然穩健，美伊戰爭全球金融市場經歷劇烈震盪。國泰投信分析，短期黑天鵝雖干擾持股信心，但基本面韌性仍強，建議投資人適時運用挑選台股龍頭企業之市值型ETF如國泰台灣領袖50（00922），另欲追求短期報酬、風險承受度較高的投資人，則可關注國泰臺灣加權正2（00663L），目標博取反彈行情。

國泰台灣領袖50（00922）經理人蘇鼎宇表示，00922追蹤「MSCI台灣領袖50精選指數」，核心選股邏輯在於篩選出具備市值規模、獲利能力，且在低碳轉型趨勢中具備產業競爭力的50檔龍頭股，不只看大市值，更重視企業的長期生存與轉型能力，剔除受碳稅衝擊較大的企業，成分股如台積電、鴻海、聯發科、中信金、國泰金等，都是引領台股市值向上的重要領袖。回顧近3個月績效表現為11.67%、近6個月績效表現為35.45%、近1年績效表現為39.18%、近2年績效表現為95.34%，近一周受益人數增加逾1.6萬人，創成立以來新高，在動盪市況下展現出強勁成長力與資金吸納能力。

蘇鼎宇補充，針對具備積極交易性格、想在市場重挫後追求放大獲利機會的投資人，則可善用國泰臺灣加權正2（00663L），捕捉市場超跌反彈，基金追蹤「臺指日報酬兩倍指數」，透過台指期複製大盤單日兩倍走勢，適合積極型投資人適時增持來追逐放大投資效益契機；00663L為全台首檔分割的槓桿型ETF，價格相對親民，降低進場門檻，幫助投資人資金運用更具效率。惟需提醒槓桿型產品具備「盈虧加倍」之特性，在放大獲利空間的同時，亦隱含波動幅度劇烈的風險，投資人須具備更敏銳的盤勢判斷力與風險控管能力，找尋時機適時加減碼。

自川普政府宣布對伊朗採取軍事行動以來，避險情緒迅速升溫，所幸半導體與AI應用等外需強勁，帶動國內經濟增長動能，在基本面良好的情況下，因非經濟因素導致的暴跌，往往是長線絕佳的買進點，呼籲投資人應避免過度恐慌而殺跌，建議採取分批進場策略，藉由00922佈局台灣核心領袖企業，亦可善用00663L把握短線超跌後的反彈契機，在景氣擴張期中共享台股長線的多頭果實。

三立新聞網提醒您：

內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

投資一定有風險，基金投資有賺有賠，申購前應詳閱公開說明書。

news.Title: 台股上市爆賺47兆！78%公司都賺錢　這些產業卻慘跌原因揭密
news.Content:
財經中心／余國棟報導

台灣證券交易所表示，本國上市公司及第一上市公司114年度財務報告計980家及89家（不含永冠-KY 1家未申報）。經統計前開全體上市公司114年度營業收入47兆6,494億元，較113年度成長5兆7,951億元，增幅13.85%；114年度稅前淨利5兆4,261億元，較113年度成長5,358億元，增幅10.96%。上市公司與去年同期比較營收與獲利均增長，反映出上市公司於國際動盪局勢中展現營運韌性與穩健的競爭力。

證交所表示，整體市場具獲利之上市公司計835家，約占78%，另較去年同期成長者計454家，約占42%。其中，獲利成長產業如半導體業，憑藉領先技術及多元供應鏈布局，成功把握AI市場商機，收穫豐碩。而電腦及週邊設備業、其他電子業則受惠AI伺服器及高效能運算之強勁需求，帶動獲利成長。

獲利衰退產業主要為航運業、水泥業及電機機械業。航運業受美國關稅政策與地緣政治風險影響，加上基期較高，獲利衰退。水泥工業因認列子公司災害損失，致獲利衰退。電機機械業則因認列訴訟賠償之損失，致獲利衰退。

三立新聞網提醒您：

內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

投資一定有風險，基金投資有賺有賠，申購前應詳閱公開說明書。

news.Title: 3 Undervalued AI Stocks to Buy Right Now
news.Content: Finding undervalued artificial intelligence (AI) stocks hasn't been possible for most of the AI build-out that has taken shape since 2023. However, with markets generally weak right now, there are fantastic investment opportunities everywhere. Three stocks that I have my eye on in April are Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) , Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) , and Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) . I think all three of these companies are ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft is considered undervalued, leaning into AI by spending on infrastructure and partnering with AI model creators.
• Azure's revenue was up 39% in Microsoft's latest quarter, indicating strong demand for AI computing power.
• Microsoft's stock is down over 30% from its all-time high, approaching its lowest P/E multiple in a decade.
• Nvidia is seen as a key supplier for AI computing power, with projected chip sales of $1 trillion by end of 2027.
• Nvidia trades at 20.6 times forward earnings, similar to the S&P 500, suggesting the market isn't pricing in significant future success.
news.Keywords: undervalued AI stocks, Microsoft Azure, Nvidia chip sales, forward P/E, AI computing power

news.Title: Why Tesla Stock Fell After Q1 Deliveries
news.Content: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) announced first-quarter vehicle deliveries today, and they weren't overly impressive. The company delivered nearly 360,000 electric vehicles (EVs) at the start of the year, but Wall Street expected even more. That wasn't the only disappointment, though. Tesla shares plunged on the news. Here are the other reasons the stock was ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla announced Q1 vehicle deliveries of nearly 360,000, missing Wall Street expectations.
• The company's energy storage business had disappointing Q1 results, with 8.8 GWh deployed, a sharp drop from 14.2 GWh last quarter.
• Analysts called the update 'underwhelming,' noting that rising oil prices should boost EV sales.
• Investors are focusing on Tesla's loftier goals related to self-driving robotaxis and AI technologies.
• All eyes are on when the company will roll out its driverless vehicle fleet.
news.Keywords: Q1 deliveries, energy storage, robotaxis, AI technologies, investor focus

Tesla shares plunged on the news. Here are the other reasons the stock was ...

• Tesla announced Q1 vehicle deliveries of nearly 360,000, missing Wall Street expectations.
• The company's energy storage business had disappointing Q1 results, with 8.8 GWh deployed, a sharp drop from 14.2 GWh last quarter.
• Analysts called the update 'underwhelming,' noting that rising oil prices should boost EV sales.
• Investors are focusing on Tesla's loftier goals related to self-driving robotaxis and AI technologies.
• All eyes are on when the company will roll out its driverless vehicle fleet.

news.Title: US Lawmakers Propose Crackdown on Sales of Chip Tools to China
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- US lawmakers unveiled legislation that seeks to crack down on exports of chipmaking tools to China, especially from allies including the Netherlands and Japan, in a bipartisan effort to help Washington further constrain Beijing’s technology ambitions. The draft bill, introduced in the House on Thursday, would strengthen existing restrictions on semiconductor manufacturing equipment sales from firms like ASML Holding NV and Tokyo Electron Ltd. A companion version is expected to be released in the Senate later this month, according to people familiar with the matter. The goal is to subject these companies to the same, tougher curbs their ...
news.AI_Summary:
• US lawmakers have proposed legislation (MATCH Act) to crack down on chipmaking tool exports to China, including from allies like the Netherlands and Japan.
• The bill aims to subject foreign firms like ASML Holding NV and Tokyo Electron Ltd. to the same curbs as US rivals.
• It includes banning engineers from maintaining and repairing tools at certain Chinese facilities.
• The legislation would also introduce new controls affecting US firms like Applied Materials Inc., Lam Research Corp., and KLA Corp.
• The goal is to align allied restrictions and maintain a technological edge against China's AI chip production.
news.Keywords: export controls, chipmaking tools, China, multilateral alignment, supply chain security

news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Amazon ( AMZN , Financials ) appears to be getting more serious about space and more directly ...
news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: What Does the Latest $14.2 Billion Deal Mean for Intel Stock?
news.Content: Semiconductor stocks have had a rocky start to 2026. AI chip darling Nvidia (NVDA) continues to soar, but old-school chipmakers like Intel (INTC) have been left behind. Investors are worried about PC demand, competition from AMD (AMD), and Intel’s costly factory buildout. Intel is now trying to change that story with a major move tied to its manufacturing future. The company said it will buy back the 49% stake in its Fab 34 joint venture in Ireland from Apollo for ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel is buying back Apollo's 49% stake in its Fab 34 joint venture in Ireland for $14.2 billion, giving it greater control over a key production asset.
• The deal is seen as a move to change Intel's narrative amid concerns about PC demand and competition from AMD.
• INTC shares have rallied recently, more than doubling over the past 12 months and showing 36% gains year-to-date.
• Intel's Q3 results showed early signs of stabilization, with revenue down 4% YoY but adjusted EPS ahead of expectations.
• The company is focusing on its foundry strategy and advanced nodes like Intel 3 and 18A for its comeback.

news.Title: Microsoft building its own high-powered AI models as it looks to slash dependence on OpenAI

news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: 台股暴漲誰最賺！主被動績效王前十名　市場資金全在追
news.Content:
財經中心／余國棟報導

市場預期中東戰事即將結束，美股四大指數全面大漲，激勵台股漲幅收盤大漲1451點，重返33000點大關之上，創史上第二大漲點，也帶動台股ETF飆翻天，4/1收盤績效前十強皆大漲5%以上，其中，台新臺灣優勢成長主動式ETF基金（00987A）是唯一漲逾7%，高居主被動ETF績效王。

台新臺灣優勢成長主動式ETF基金（00987A）經理人魏永祥表示，雖然股市短線面臨美伊戰爭衝擊而大幅震盪，但就歷史經驗來看，戰爭對股市影響多為短期，在台股漲多技術性修正以及融資減肥後，將反映企業基本面回到常軌上。就總經面分析，在科技景氣重心從消費性電子轉向AI資本支出，形成「結構性超級循環」，分析師預估台灣AI相關供應鏈 2026年在高基期下仍保持20~60%的盈餘高成長，紮實的基本面提供台股多頭續航的火種，操作上，首選台股主動式ETF，運用經理人主動選股策略，掌握一籃子強勢股漲升行情。

根據台新投信官網最新顯示，台新台灣優勢成長主動式ETF(00987A)前十大成份股為：台積電、奇鋐、旺矽、台燿、貿聯、台達電、群聯、健策、台光電、智邦，皆是今年來的強勢股，尤其4/1更是帶動大盤勁揚的領頭羊，也推升台新臺灣優勢成長主動式ETF基金（00987A）3月及今年來皆創下亮眼的績效表現。

三立新聞網提醒您：

內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

投資一定有風險，基金投資有賺有賠，申購前應詳閱公開說明書。

news.Title: The Market Is Choppy. Here Are 5 Sectors Holding Up Better Than the Rest.
news.Content: In 2025, all three of the U.S. stock market's major indexes -- the S&P 500 , Nasdaq Composite , and Dow Jones Industrial Average -- finished the year in the green, increasing 16.4%, 20.4%, and 13%, respectively. So far this year, it has been a completely different story. All of them are in the negative through March. Some sectors have started the year on a much more positive path than others. With ...

• Several sectors are outperforming the broader market, including Energy (up nearly 40%), Utilities (up 8%), Consumer Staples (up 7.5%), Materials (up 7.4%), and Industrials (up 1.4%).

news.Title: 3 Reasons SpaceX May Be a Risky Investment
news.Content: SpaceX played a pivotal role in transforming the space industry by way of its reusable rockets and Starlink satellite internet service. The swirling rumors of a SpaceX IPO are one of the few topics that have investors excited in an otherwise turbulent stock market. With that said, investors may need a reality check: Going public sometimes brings serious risks that aren't always obvious on the surface. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX's potential IPO faces scrutiny due to its high $1.25 trillion valuation, which is largely based on unproven future promises.
• Public market investors will focus on hard numbers like revenue growth from Starlink and profitability, which could lead to a stock nosedive if growth decelerates.
• The company's heavy reliance on Elon Musk's vision and divided attention across multiple ventures (Tesla, X, Neuralink) poses a significant risk.
• Regulatory hurdles from the FAA and FCC, along with execution risks inherent in space exploration (e.g., rocket failures), present further challenges.
• The article suggests that a SpaceX IPO likely carries risks that most investors would prefer to avoid.
news.Keywords: IPO risk, valuation, Elon Musk dependency, regulatory hurdles, space exploration

news.Title: This Tech ETF Is Down 16% From Its Peak. Here's Why I'm Still Buying.

news.Title: Amazon vs. Apple: Which Is the Better Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock to Buy Today?
news.Content: Artificial intelligence (AI) continues to be a driving force in the markets as the use cases for AI accelerate. Some of the newest ways people are using AI today are the agentic type, like having a large-language model (LLM) find the best flights or make a grocery order. As the opportunity evolves, it's expanding. According to Grand View Research, the AI market opportunity was $391 billion last year, and it's expected to increase at a compound annual growth rate of 30.6%, reaching nearly $3.5 trillion by 2033. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI market is rapidly expanding, projected to reach nearly $3.5 trillion by 2033, with a CAGR of 30.6%.
• Amazon (AMZN) plans to spend $200 billion in capital expenditures in 2026, primarily on AWS, to maintain its lead in AI development and cloud services.
• AWS offers a wide array of AI services and products like SageMaker, contributing to Amazon's strong overall growth (14% YoY sales increase in Q4 2025).
• Apple (AAPL) is taking a more prudent approach to AI, partnering with Alphabet for its Gemini LLM to power Siri, leveraging its existing ecosystem of 2.5 billion active devices.
• The article presents a comparison between Amazon's high-spending strategy and Apple's ecosystem-focused approach to AI, deeming Apple the more conservative option.
news.Keywords: AI market, cloud computing, capital expenditure, AWS, Apple ecosystem

news.Title: 1 Year Since the Liberation Day Tariffs: This Surprising Stock Has Been the S&P 500's Top Performer
news.Content: Reciprocal tariffs were announced a year ago, on what President Trump referred to as " Liberation Day" for the country. Tariffs were imposed on many countries that the president believed were being unfair to the U.S., and the initial market reaction was one of panic, with the S&P 500 proceeding to fall. In ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Sandisk (SNDK) has been the top-performing stock on the S&P 500 over the past year, up 1,200% since its spin-off from Western Digital.
• The strong performance is driven by high demand for flash memory due to AI and the need for high-speed storage solutions.
• In its most recent quarter, Sandisk reported revenue of over $3 billion (up 61% YoY) and net income jumped from $104 million to $803 million.
• The company expects revenue to climb as high as $4.8 billion in the current quarter.
• Despite its rally, Sandisk's valuation appears reasonable with a forward P/E of less than 13, suggesting potential for continued growth.
news.Keywords: flash memory, AI demand, revenue growth, net income, valuation

news.Title: Is Palantir Actually Undervalued? This Key Metric Says It Is

news.AI_Summary:

• However, its PEG ratio is 0.964, indicating it may be undervalued when considering its earnings growth rate.
• Palantir's earnings per share grew 232% year-over-year in 2025, partly due to improved profit margins reaching 43% in Q4 2025.
• The article suggests that while the PEG ratio indicates undervaluation, the rapid margin expansion might be a one-time event.
• The author concludes that Palantir is not definitively undervalued, but its growth rate justifies a premium.
