news.Title: 台積電鉅額交易溢價10.8％多頭看好利空出盡？ADR盤前卻重挫4%不給面子
news.Content:
台積電 （2330）盤後鉅額交易2日出現10張2,007.16元的配對成交，相較於現貨收盤溢價10.8％，等於上漲8.2%接近一根漲停板。在清明連假前夕與美伊戰爭恐怕升溫的雙重不確定下，多頭部隊仍堅挺作價，掀起市場討論是否看好戰爭加速落幕，或者利空即將出盡的精準眼光。

法人表示，若將價差換算成漲點，加權指數還有1,543點補漲空間，可望上看34,115點、重返34K大關。不過，台指期夜盤在美股開盤前紅翻黑，續挫逾百點，台積電期貨夜盤則跌破1,800元大關至1,795元。

美股部分，台積電ADR盤前更不樂觀，大跌逾4％，美股三大主要指數期貨盤前也同樣挫逾1％。市場等待美股開盤後走勢，以及川普是否釋出更多美伊戰事相關訊息。

據統計，台積電盤後鉅額交易2日有15筆交易，價格上下緣介於2,007.16元至1,804.48元，換算加權平均價格1,818.03元，稍微高於現貨收盤價1,810元，整體成交張數943張、成交金額17.14億元。

news.Title: 3 Reasons to Hold Microsoft Stock Despite 28.6% Drop in 6 Months
news.Content: Microsoft MSFT has had a rough run in recent months, with its stock shedding 28.6% in the past six-month period, underperforming the Zacks Computer and Technology sector's decline of 7.9% as the underlying business continues to post impressive growth. The decline reflects broader macro headwinds, AI-related cost concerns and shifting investor appetite for high-multiple technology names. Yet the fundamentals that define Microsoft's long-term investment thesis remain largely intact. Investors currently holding shares may find it prudent to stay the course, while those looking for entry may be better served waiting ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft (MSFT) stock has declined 28.6% in the past six months, underperforming the tech sector.
• The decline is attributed to macro headwinds, AI-related cost concerns, and investor preference for lower-multiple stocks.
• Microsoft's Intelligent Cloud segment revenue grew nearly 29% YoY to $32.9 billion in Q2 fiscal 2026, with Azure and cloud services up 39%.
• Azure is expected to grow 37-38% in Q3 fiscal 2026 and remains capacity-constrained, indicating strong demand.
• AI monetization is gaining traction, with reorganized Copilot leadership and expanded features, driving commercial bookings up 230% and a backlog of $625 billion.
news.Keywords: stock performance, cloud growth, Azure, AI monetization, enterprise adoption

news.Title: ROKU Slumps 12% YTD: Here's Why It Is Time to Buy the Stock
news.Content: Roku Inc. ROKU shares have experienced significant volatility and a notable 12% year-to-date (YTD) decline, underperforming the broader Zacks Consumer Discretionary sector and the Zacks Broadcast Radio and Television industry. ROKU shares have also lagged behind competitors like Amazon AMZN, Alphabet GOOGL and Apple AAPL during the same period. While Amazon declined 8.9%, Alphabet and Apple saw relatively smaller drops of 6.1% and 5.1%, respectively. Roku’s sharp stock price decline can be attributed to investor concerns around its competitive positioning and near-term growth visibility. Large ecosystem players Amazon, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Roku Inc. (ROKU) shares are down 12% year-to-date, lagging behind competitors like Amazon, Alphabet, and Apple.
• Concerns about Roku's competitive positioning and growth visibility stem from large ecosystem players strengthening their connected TV and advertising capabilities.
• Roku's devices business is a drag, with projected negative gross margins in 2026, and its distribution strategy faces obstacles, such as Walmart migrating its TV brand.
• Despite challenges, Roku's platform revenue grew 18% in 2025 to $4.145 billion and is projected to grow another 18% in 2026.
• The company has a large user base (over 90 million households) and expects AI-driven enhancements to fuel monetization and engagement.
news.Keywords: connected TV, advertising platform, platform revenue, user base, AI enhancements

news.Title: Here's Why UPS Shares Declined by 15% in March
news.Content: UPS (NYSE: UPS) shares declined by 15.2% in March, according to data from S&P Global Market Intelligence . While the overall market declined, UPS notably underperformed, raising questions about its full-year guidance. The conflict in the Persian Gulf has significant consequences for UPS' operations and profitability, and it's not just about the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• UPS shares declined 15.2% in March, significantly underperforming the overall market.
• The conflict in the Persian Gulf impacts UPS through rising fuel costs, increased third-party transportation expenses, and potential demand destruction.
• Logistics companies are overhauling trade routes due to the conflict, likely increasing costs for UPS.
• A shift in trade routes caused by previous tariffs on China has already pressured UPS's margins, as China-to-US trade is its most profitable route.
• Investors should anticipate potential bad news in UPS's international segment and a possible downward revision to full-year guidance, with concerns about maintaining its dividend.
news.Keywords: logistics, fuel costs, trade routes, margin pressure, earnings guidance

news.Title: SoundHound vs Big Tech: Can Its Voice AI Maintain an Edge?
news.Content: SoundHound AI SOUN is positioning itself as a focused, voice-first AI player at a time when large technology companies are expanding aggressively into conversational and agentic AI. The company’s latest results highlight strong momentum, but the key question is whether its niche strengths can hold up against Big Tech scale. Strong Growth & Expanding Adoption of SOUN SoundHound delivered a record ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SoundHound AI (SOUN) is a focused voice-first AI player facing intense competition from Big Tech.
• The company reported record 2025 revenue of $169 million (nearly doubling YoY), with Q4 revenue up 59%, driven by broad adoption across industries.
• SoundHound's core advantage is its 'agentic AI' framework and deep domain expertise in voice AI, offering flexibility and measurable outcomes.
• Challenges include competition from Microsoft and Alphabet, which possess unmatched scale, distribution, and capital.
• SoundHound is still operating at a loss and investing heavily in R&D, with its stock down 39.3% in the past three months.

news.Title: 快訊》川普強硬表態 道指開盤急殺600點 台積電ADR狠崩3％
news.Content:
美國總統川普在全國演說中強硬表態，威脅將在未來2至3周內大力打擊伊朗，但並未提及重新開放荷姆茲海峽的具體計畫。伊朗方面則揚言，將戰至敵人投降。市場此前對中東緊張局勢趨緩的樂觀預期迅速落空，推動國際油價大幅走高，股市承壓回落。周四（2日）美股一開盤，主要指數全線下殺，道瓊工業指數重挫逾600點，那斯達克指數急跌逾300點。台積電ADR崩跌逾3%。

川普表示，一旦無法達成協議，美國將對伊朗所有的發電廠實施猛烈打擊。他的強硬表態重擊了投資者對中東戰事有望快速解決的希望。西德州原油期約價持續狂飆，暴漲逾13%，突破每桶110美元大關，國際基準布蘭特原油也接近這一水平。

美國銀行警告，伊朗戰爭正在給全球砸下「停滯性通膨炸彈」，分析師預計，由於伊朗戰爭影響，即便衝突在幾周內結束，全年仍將面臨經濟成長放緩、通膨上升以及每桶100美元的油價。

巴黎研究機構Alphavalue副執行長Laurent Lamagnere表示，「現在這個市場根本難以駕馭。我們真正擔心的是第二輪效應，不僅僅是油價本身，還包括石油供應，比如航公司削減航線，對旅遊業造成嚴重後果。」

news.Title: Job Cuts Rise 25% As AI Role Grows
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . U.S. employers announced 60,620 job cuts in March, up 25% from February, and this ...
news.AI_Summary:

• Despite the month-over-month increase, total layoffs are down 78% year-over-year and 16% from the previous quarter.
• Tech sector layoffs led the increase, with 18,720 cuts in March, tied to companies like Dell, Oracle, and Meta.
• AI-related layoffs accounted for 15,341 cuts in March and 27,645 in Q1, representing about 13% of total cuts.

news.Keywords: job cuts, layoffs, artificial intelligence, tech sector, budget reallocation

news.Title: Nebius Just Signed $46 Billion in AI Cloud Deals With Microsoft and Meta. Can This Stock 10X?
news.Content: The demand for artificial intelligence (AI) data center capacity has been exceeding supply, and Nebius Group (NASDAQ: NBIS) is one of the companies that's trying to plug this gap. It has been building new data centers at an aggressive pace. The neocloud infrastructure company operates data centers equipped with powerful graphics processing units (GPUs), renting out their capacity to customers looking to run AI workloads. Yet Nebius isn't just a company that rents out processing power. It also provides access to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nebius Group (NBIS) is expanding aggressively to meet the high demand for AI data center capacity, which is currently exceeding supply.
• The company provides GPU-equipped data centers, LLMs, and inference tools for AI workloads and applications.
• Nebius has secured significant long-term contracts with Meta Platforms and Microsoft, totaling over $46 billion in potential backlog.
• These contracts include a five-year deal with Microsoft worth up to $19.4 billion and a deal with Meta potentially reaching $27 billion.
• Nebius plans to significantly increase its data center capacity, from 170 MW at the end of 2025 to 800-1,000 MW by the end of 2026, partly funded by Meta.
news.Keywords: AI data center, GPU infrastructure, cloud contracts, revenue backlog, capacity expansion

news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: 台股3月急跌10.4% 兩大基金平台投資人勇於加碼 申購量創歷史新高
news.Content:
受中東戰事開打影響，台股加權指數3月大跌3,691點，跌幅高達10.4%，外資賣超9,682億元也創下單月最高紀錄。不過，散戶投資人勇於低檔承接，不但台股ETF淨流入金額大增，台股基金在3月的申購金額也逆勢大增，兩大基金平台3月申購量比去年的月均量至少成長1.2倍。

國內最大基金平台基富通統計顯示，3月基金平台上申購量比去年平均單月量成長1.3倍，單筆申購成長1.6倍，定期定額成長60%。值得注意的是，低檔加碼更成長1.8倍，顯示投資人不但沒有追高殺低，而且還趁低檔積極加碼。

基富通統計也顯示，不論哪一世代的平台投資人，偏好的基金類型都是股票型基金。其中，平台上Z世代（30歲以下）偏好股票型基金的占比達85%最高，其次是X世代（46-60歲）的80%、Y世代（31-45歲）的79%。

最大民營基金平台「鉅亨買基金」統計也顯示，今年1月及2月申購金額已明顯高於去年平均。進入3月，美伊衝突快速升高，基金平台單月申購量更創下歷史新高，而且比去年均量增加1.2倍。

進一步分析申購結構，「鉅亨買基金」總經理張榮仁表示，3月投資人明顯偏向主動加碼，以單筆申購為主，並集中於股票型基金。股票型基金申購比重由前月的76%攀升至83%。其中，台股基金更成為最大宗，占股票型基金比重由63%大幅提高至73%，不僅反映投資人對台股的高度信心，也顯示資金集中化趨勢。

news.Content: Middle East tensions linked to the Iran war have pressured several semiconductor equipment stocks, pushing them sharply lower. The situation has reignited concern about global supply chain fragility, particularly access to helium and other materials essential for chip production. This is forcing the market to rethink which companies can hold their ground if disruptions linger or even escalate. Bank of America is leaning into that debate by keeping two semiconductor equipment giants at the top of its preference list, despite the latest drawdowns. This stance suggests confidence ...
news.AI_Summary:

• AMAT, a semiconductor equipment manufacturer, is up 37.67% YTD and 143% over 52 weeks, with a forward P/E of 29.1.
• AMAT reported fiscal Q1 2026 EPS of $2.39 (vs. $2.31 estimate) and revenue of $7.01B (up 3.1% YoY).
• LRCX, a semiconductor equipment developer, is up 29.69% YTD and 204.8% over 52 weeks, trading at a forward P/E of 40.80.
• Both companies are collaborating on advanced chip manufacturing technologies to meet AI and data center demand.
news.Keywords: semiconductor equipment, AI demand, stock performance, forward P/E, advanced manufacturing

news.Title: Amazon in Talks to Buy Globalstar in $9 Billion Satellite Deal
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Amazon ( NASDAQ:AMZN ) is in talks to acquire Globalstar ( NASDAQ:GSAT ) in ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon (AMZN) is reportedly in talks to acquire satellite telecommunications group Globalstar (GSAT) for approximately $9 billion.
• The deal would enhance Amazon's satellite operations to compete with SpaceX's Starlink.
• A complicating factor is Apple's (AAPL) 20% stake in Globalstar, acquired for $1.5 billion in 2024, requiring separate negotiation.
• Globalstar reserves 85% of its network capacity for Apple's iPhone emergency texting feature.
• The acquisition would bolster Amazon's Project Kuiper constellation, aiming for over 7,700 satellites to compete in high-speed internet access.
news.Keywords: satellite acquisition, telecommunications, Project Kuiper, Starlink competition, Apple stake

news.Title: Can TSM Meet FY26 Margin Guidance Amid Fab Expansion Cost Pressures?
news.Content: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company TSM, also known as TSMC, has consistently delivered strong gross margins over the past few quarters despite mounting cost pressures from overseas fab expansion. To capitalize on the growing demand for advanced and artificial intelligence (AI) chips, the company is expanding production outside Taiwan, including new fabs in the United ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) is expanding production globally (US, Japan, Europe) to meet AI chip demand, investing $165 billion in the US alone.
• Overseas fabs are more expensive, potentially causing near-term margin dilution of 2-4%, but TSMC expects scale, automation, and incentives to mitigate this.
• Gross margin rose YoY to 62.3% in Q4 2025, and Q1 2026 guidance is 63-65%, indicating strong profitability.
• Revenues grew 25.5% YoY to $33.73 billion in Q4 2025, with analysts projecting 34.9% growth in 2026.
• TSMC's robust demand for advanced nodes and high factory utilization are expected to help meet 2026 gross margin targets.
news.Keywords: fab expansion, AI chips, gross margin, revenue growth, semiconductor supply chain

news.Title: Amazon Stock Climbs as It Bets a Jaw-Dropping $50 Billion on OpenAI’s Meteoric $852 Billion Rise
news.Content: The race to control the future of artificial intelligence just took a massive leap forward with a record-shaking deal. This investment pushes the valuation of the ChatGPT creator ...
news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: Will Rising AI Storage Needs Fuel Micron's NAND Growth Through FY27?
news.Content: Micron Technology, Inc. ’s MU NAND business is well-positioned to benefit from the rapid growth in artificial intelligence (AI) workloads, which is driving the demand for storage solutions. AI models require fast access to massive datasets, increasing the need for high-performance storage, especially in data centers. Micron Technology is already seeing strong traction in NAND, particularly in data center solid-state drives (SSDs). In the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology's (MU) NAND business is well-positioned to benefit from AI workload growth driving demand for storage solutions.
• NAND revenues soared 169% YoY and 82% sequentially to $5 billion in Q2 fiscal 2026, driven by strong data center SSD demand.
• Data center SSDs are essential for AI infrastructure, and Micron has increased its SSD market share for the fourth consecutive year.
• The NAND market is currently undersupplied, with favorable pricing conditions expected through fiscal 2027.
• Micron's NAND business is projected to reach $23.64 billion in fiscal 2026 revenues (178% YoY increase) and $37.49 billion in fiscal 2027.
news.Keywords: NAND flash, AI storage, data center SSDs, market share, revenue growth

news.Title: 中東戰火延燒台股震盪　國安基金：持股尚未全數出清仍護盤
news.Content:
即時中心／徐子為報導

中東戰火延燒已超過一個月，也造成股市震盪劇烈，今天台股上下震盪近千點。對此，國安基金官員今（2）天表示，預計本月13日召開第一季例行性會議；國安基金手上持股則尚未出清，以不影響市場穩定性為原則。

媒體《自由時報》引述國安基金官員說法，目前國安基金持股還沒有賣完，主要是受到美伊戰爭影響，為避免對市場造成壓力，盡量尊重市場機制，盡量不要影響市場穩定，「不然早就賣完了」。

國安基金過去曾9度進場護盤，上一次進場護盤是因川普政府公布對等關稅，引發全球股市重挫，國安基金自2025年4月9日起進場，至今年1月12日決議退場，護盤期間達279天，刷新史上最長護盤紀錄。

《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

原文出處： 快新聞／中東戰火延燒台股震盪 國安基金：持股尚未全數出清仍護盤

news.Title: 國安基金退場80天  護盤持股仍未賣完  皆因「台股震盪」
news.Content:
國安基金13日召開例行性委員會，雖然台股近日震盪，但是台股仍在3萬2000點之上，恐難決定第10次護盤，僅會討論國內外政經情勢、台股狀況。不過，國安基金第9次護盤今年1月12日決議退場，至今已經滿80天，由於期間台股震盪太大，至今還未賣完手中持股。

國安基金第9次護盤是民國114年4月8日決議進場、9日正式護盤，累計投入122.5億元，進場護盤期間長達279天，是史上最長護盤期間。而國安基金在去年第4季例行會議上，決議正式退場。

國安基金官員表示，這次例會討論的內容因為美伊戰爭引起的國內、國際政經情勢變化，以及對台股的影響。至於至今第9次護盤尚未賣完，官員表示，主要是美伊戰爭造成台股震盪，為避免對市場造成賣壓，盡量尊重市場的穩定，否則早就賣完。

據了解，國安基金過往釋股原則以市場「不知不覺」的情況下逐漸賣出。

news.Title: 〈凱基金法說〉凱壽加碼台股策略奏效2025投報率近2成 TIS申請140%獲准超借
news.Content:
凱基金 (2883-TW) 今 (2) 日舉行法說會，子公司凱基人壽接軌 IFRS 17 後財務體質更為強健，不僅淨值比提升至 9.1%，更坐擁 2350 億元的 CSM(合約服務邊際) 獲利水庫。凱壽持續優化資產負債管理，受惠 AI 浪潮，去年底台股部位加碼至 9.2%，繳出近 2 成的高投報率，國內外股票實現資本利得達 355 億元，避險比例也由 65% 大幅降至約 40%，預期 2026 年避險成本將顯著收斂。凱壽證實向金管會申請 TIS 140% 獲准，希望透過超借資本維持接軌的恆常性與穩定性。

凱基人壽 2025 年稅後純益 158 億元，若排除 12 月一次性增提稅前淨利之三成至外匯價格變動準備金的影響，全年度獲利超過 200 億元以上。初年度保費收入 (FYP) 年增 33%，達 772.7 億元。在商品策略方面，以保障型、美元保單和投資型商品為銷售主軸。

凱壽台股占比升至 9.2% 投報率近 2 成 去年股海大賺 355 億元

檢視凱基人壽 2025 年資產配置，其中，國內股票占比提升至 9.2%，金額達 2175 億元，投報率高達 19.5%；國外股票占比僅 3.7%，投資金額 867 億元，投報率 9.22%。去年股票實現資本利得 355.61 億元，年增 43%。

凱基金財務長黃碧玲指出，去年國內股票的投資比重已提升至 9.2%，一方面是受惠於台股市場熱絡，尤其是 AI 浪潮帶動的市值上升，另一方面則是團隊主動選擇優質標的進行加碼的結果。

凱壽投資長謝欣欣強調，團隊主要以優化「資產負債管理」為核心，為了降低幣別錯配並優化結構，凱壽採取逐步將到期債券或孳息資金匯回台幣資產的策略，減少國外債券的占比。

此外，對於市場關注的利率敏感度，她提供數據說明，若美元上升一碼且台幣聯動 (約三分之一幅度)，凱壽的淨值比可增加 0.5%，顯示在利率波動環境下，目前的配置仍具備良好的韌性與增長潛力。

接軌 IFRS 17！凱壽 2350 億元 CSM 護體 今年目標挑戰 350 億元

凱基人壽總精算師謝如涵說明 IFRS 17 接軌後的關鍵財務指標，開帳後的淨值比由原本的 8.4% 提升至 9.1%，財務體質更為強健。接軌日的保險合約 CSM 餘額 2350 億元，占負債比率的 10%，未來將逐年釋出至損益，提升獲利的穩定度，今年攤銷率估為 6-6.5%，希望新契約 CSM 每年維持雙位數成長，今年 CSM 累積目標訂在 330-350 億元。

在資產配置上，凱基人壽維持穩健的投資組合，並積極厚實外匯準備金，2025 年底外匯準備金餘額達到 433 億元，在匯率會計新制下，預期未來避險成本將更為平穩。謝欣欣補充，避險比例已從去年底的 65% 調降至目前約 40% 左右，預期 2026 年避險成本將降至 1.0% 至 1.5% 之間。

法人關注凱壽申請 TIS 的目標，財務長林紹華證實，向金管會申請 140% 近期已經獲准，他指出，凱壽 2025 年底 RBC 高達 363%，主要是為了接軌後的恆常性與穩定性才選擇超借。

為確保接軌後的資本韌性，公司除了每年努力達成累積 CSM 目標外，同時也可規劃發行次順位債，先前已向主管機關申請並獲准發行 200 億元次順位債，其中 100 億元已於今年 1 月執行，剩餘 100 億元將視市場狀況執行。

法人關注凱壽商品結構與利潤率情形，謝如涵詳細列舉，若是保障型商品 (A&H)，Margin 高達 250%~600%；長年期利變型 Margin 約 70% 以上；投資型商品方面，部分不計入 CSM 但貢獻手續費收入，計入 CSM 者的 Margin 約 2%~10%。

凱壽 2025 年負債成本為 3.12%，謝如涵預估 2026 年接軌後，若以資產為基礎計算，負債成本將大幅降至 2.2% 至 2.3%

news.Title: VYMI vs. VIG vs. VYM: Which Vanguard Dividend ETF Pays You Most?
news.Content: Income-focused investors often look to dividend ETFs as an easy way to generate steady passive income without picking individual stocks. Among Vanguard’s most popular options are the Vanguard High Dividend Yield ETF (VYM), Vanguard Dividend Appreciation ETF (VIG), and Vanguard International High Dividend Yield ETF (VYMI)—each offering a different mix of yield, growth, and global exposure. Using TipRanks’ ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article compares three Vanguard dividend ETFs: VYMI (International High Dividend Yield), VYM (High Dividend Yield), and VIG (Dividend Appreciation).
• VYMI offers global exposure with a 3.63% yield, VYM focuses on stability with a 2.37% yield, and VIG targets dividend growth with a 1.61% yield.
• Top holdings for VYMI include Roche, Novartis, and HSBC; for VYM include Broadcom (AVGO), JPMorgan Chase, and Exxon Mobil; for VIG include AVGO, Apple, and Eli Lilly.
• VYMI is suitable for higher yield and global diversification, VYM for stability and consistency, and VIG for conservative dividend growth.
• The choice depends on investor priorities regarding income, growth, or geographic exposure.

news.Title: 台股週線收黑540點跌1.63%　玻璃陶瓷股跌4.95%最大
news.Content:
（中央社記者潘智義台北2026年4月2日電）台灣證券交易所今天公布統計，台股加權股價指數收在32572.43點，較上週下跌540.16點，跌幅約1.63%，其中以玻璃陶瓷類指數下跌4.95%幅度最深，橡膠類指數上揚2.59%漲幅最大。

證交所指出，今天全體上市公司市場總值為新台幣106兆 2966.75億元，較上週市值107兆9795億元減少1兆6828.25億元，減幅約1.56%。

證交所指出，未含金融類指數下跌547.34點，跌幅約1.85%，未含電子類指數下跌51.56點，跌幅約為0.26%，未含金融電子類指數下跌129.64點，跌幅約為0.95%。

本週集中交易市場總成交金額為2兆 9080.45億元，全體上市股票成交金額為2兆6359.33億元，股票成交量週轉率2.69%。

各產業上市股票成交金額前3名依序為半導體類股9596.53 億元，占全體上市股票交易金額36.41%；電子零組件類 6815.06億元，占25.85%；其他電子類1621.19億元，占6.15%。

本週成交量週轉率前3名產業依序為電子零組件類9.84%、光電類 9.80%、塑膠類 6.78%。

累計今年初開盤迄今共57個交易日，集中市場總成交金額為45兆7345.45億元，市場日平均成交金額為8023.6億元，股票成交量週轉率47.71%，股票日平均成交量週轉率0.84%。

news.Title: 外資賣超386.95億元　大砍ETF
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中台北2026年04月2日電）美國總統川普今天演說表示，將給予伊朗沉重打擊，亞股應聲下挫，台股震盪下跌602.39點，收在32572.43點，跌破5日線，成交值新台幣6729.07億元。外資賣超386.95億元，以ETF居多，包括元大台灣50等5檔。

隨著台積電 (2330) 、台達電 (2308) 和鴻海 (2317) 等電子權值股震盪走跌，以及塑膠、紡織、機電、電纜等多數傳統產業股走弱，台股回落至5日線之下。

外資及陸資今天賣超386.95億元，自營商賣超69.88億元，投信買超83.26億元；三大法人合計賣超373.57億元。

據台灣證券交易所資料，外資賣超以ETF居多，有元大台灣50 (0050) 、元大台灣50正2（00631L）、主動統一台股增長（00981A）、元大高股息 (0056) 和富邦科技 (0052) 。

外資其餘賣超前10名還有元大金 (2885) 、台積電、康霈 (6919) 、燿華 (2367) 和南亞 (1303) 。

外資買超前10名以金融股居多，有台新新光金 (2887) 、中信金 (2891) 、兆豐金 (2886) 和第一金 (2892) 。金融類股指數小漲0.05%，表現相對抗跌。

外資其餘買超前10名還有友達 (2409) 、大成鋼 (2027) 、中鋼 (2002) 、強茂 (2481) 、華邦電 (2344) 、聯茂 (6213) 。

兆豐國際投顧副總經理黃國偉表示，川普表示將在未來2至3週內對伊朗發動沉重的打擊，是日本、韓國股市及台股下挫的主因，未來中東局勢變化將持續牽動股市走向，油價是重要觀察指標。

news.Title: 川普一句話台股重挫! 跌逾600點失守3萬3 台積電跌45元
news.Content: 財經中心／陳孟暄 嚴文謙 台北報導 清明連假前，台股變盤了！從開盤一度上漲290點之後，隨著美國總統川普的一席演說，讓恐慌賣壓出籠，終場台股急殺602點，收在3萬2572點，成交量6743億元，其中護國神山台積電重挫45元，收在1810元。 即將迎來的四天連假，讓台股上演豬羊變色戲碼，轉捩點就在美國總統川普對中東情勢的強硬演說，讓台北股市從原本開盤漲290多點，一路向南，終場下跌602點，收在32572點，成交額量6743億元，外資投信等三大法人繼續賣超373億元。 統一期貨協理 廖恩平：「不排除在接下來這幾天會有回測季線這樣子的一個表現，我們知道說在昨天的時候，其實外資有一口氣回補了5800口的期貨空單，可是我們可以看到，今天的量能其實還是只有6000多億，也就是說法人現在的狀況，只是從之前的強空環境解，回歸到一個比較中性看待」。 川普一句話台股重挫！ 跌逾600點失守3萬3 台積電跌45元。(圖／民視財經網) 川普揚言要在2-3周內讓伊朗回到石器時代，一席話讓投資市場皮皮剉，其中權王台積電下跌45元，終場收在1810元，不過成交量高達456億，高居上市排行榜成交量冠軍，其他大型權值股同步走弱，ai概念股的廣達下跌6元、代工王鴻海跌1元，ic設計的聯發科和封測的日月光最後拉回平盤，只有傳產的塑化族群，受到油價大漲影響，台達化亮燈漲停，華夏大漲超過6%，亞聚、台聚也都有3%以上漲幅。 統一期貨協理 廖恩平：「在禮拜五的時候，晚間美國會去公佈非農就業報告，那這也會是一個重要的風效球去關注說，到底美國的經濟會不會受到最近這些衝突事件的影響，以及對於通膨還有聯儲會利率後續的看法，所以我今天建議投資朋友，可能在這個連假期間的話還是要降低持股水位，去拉高你的現金比例會比較安全」。 市場信心明顯動搖，清明連假前，台股常態交易人數，首度跌破百萬人，大約有78萬散戶退場，因此專家建議，連假期間，觀察國際情勢發展，同時注意美國公布的經濟數據，接下來的台股 高檔震盪，全看美伊情勢的臉色。 《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

news.Title: 手機市況雜音多 傳聯發科下修4奈米投片量
news.Content:
[ 非凡新聞 ]記者莊欣璉

記憶體飆漲，使得全球智慧手機需求轉弱，市場傳出相關IC廠已經在下修晶圓代工的投片量，而研調機構集邦本周公布的全球IC設計廠排名，博通受惠客製化晶片需求暢旺，去年營收也超車高通，位居第二名，聯發科則排名第五。

強調智慧防窺、大容量電池、或想搶攻年輕族群，和泡泡瑪特合作，全球的手機市場，3月新機頻發、花樣百出，然而消費者買不買單漲價後的手機，都還很難說，而這股不確定感，也延伸到手機IC晶片，市場傳出台廠聯發科，已經開始下修晶圓代工廠4奈米投片量。

IDC資深研究經理 高鴻翔：「大部分的中國品牌，今年會呈現，比較大的衰退的幅度，那幅度 目前看起來，至少有兩成以上，已經開始有聽到，類似砍單的消息，甚至聽到像說，聯發科可能會向上，去向台積電代工訂單，下降他的訂單，這樣的一個訊息。」

記憶體價格何時回歸正常，左右消費性電子的IC景氣，研調機構集邦科技發布的，2025年全球前十大IC設計廠營收排名，輝達仍穩坐龍頭，值得關注的是，博通受惠客製化晶片，需求暢旺，去年營收超車高通，位居第二名；而台廠的部分，聯發科排名第五，瑞昱、聯詠，分別排名第七及第九。從行動通訊起家的老牌廠們，希望能靠拓展版圖突圍，扭轉劣勢。

高通執行長 艾蒙：「我們積極推動多元化布局，從手機領域，拓展到，個人AI 智慧穿戴裝置與PC，以及汽車 邊緣網路，與工業物聯網等領域。」

盼消費性電子景氣，能趕快起色，另一方面，IC廠們還面臨半導體通膨的壓力，包括奕力、矽創等企業，都傳出在4月1日起，調整驅動IC報價，廠商透漏，從去年開始代工廠，給的折扣就變少，考慮到記憶體短缺，還有一些元件短缺的因素，4、5、6月，需求好不好將會是一大觀察指標。（記者莊欣璉、喬大龍／台北採訪報導）

news.Title: 南亞科3月營收181億年增逾5倍 續創新高
news.Content:
DRAM 大廠南亞科 (2408-TW) 今 (2) 日公告 3 月營收，持續受惠記憶體需求暢旺，3 月營收衝上 181.7 億元，年月雙成長，且年增逾 5 倍，創歷史新高紀錄。

南亞科 3 月營收 181.7 億元，月增 16.42%，年增 5.6 倍，寫新猷；累計今年第一季營收 490.87 億元，季增 63.11%，年增 5.83 倍，同步刷新歷史單季新高紀錄。

總經理李培瑛日前指出，受惠 AI 需求快速擴張，加上新增產能有限，認為至 2027 年上半年，DRAM 市場將維持供不應求的情形，並針對個別客戶進行議價，分別依單月、單季逐步調漲，第二季價格將進一步跳增，預期到年底價格都是上行趨勢。

另外，南亞科近期私募引進 Kioxia、Sandisk、SK 海力士旗下 Solidigm，以及 Cisco 四大國際資金巨頭，共募資 787.18 億元，市場看好，此私募案可望進一步提升南亞科與全球記憶體廠及系統端的合作。

業界指出，由於 DRAM 市場火熱，儘管 SK 海力士自製 DRAM，但相關業者為確保 DRAM 供應，除與南亞科簽署長約，並透過取得私募，以鞏固料源。

news.Title: 外資轉賣超386億元 自台積電提款171億元 清明前單周賣超1601億元
news.Content:
台股今 (2) 日在川普演說未釋出停戰訊息及長假前賣壓影響，盤中震盪千點，終場下跌 602 點，收在 32572 點，三大法人合計賣超 373.57 億元，其中外資對台積電 (2330-TW) 反手賣超 9386 張，對友達則大買 18.23 張。台股本周共個交易日跌 540 點 ，外資共賣超 1601.28 億元

今天集中市場外資賣超 386.95 億元，投信買超 83.26 億元，自營商賣超 69.88 億元，而在期貨市場，今天外資交易口數淨額爲空單 3468 口，未平倉口數淨額爲空單 34855 口。

造成今天台股下殺的主因在美國總統川普稱伊朗戰爭還會延續數周，加上台灣面對清明節的長假，在盤中引發賣壓。同時，新台幣兌美元匯率以 31.972 元作收、貶值 2.3 分，成交金額 15.7 億美元。

今天集中市場外資買超較多的個股爲，友達、台新新光金、大成鋼、中鋼、強茂、華邦電、中信金、兆豐金、聯茂、第一金；賣超較多的個股爲，元大金、台積電、康霈 *、燿華、南亞、遠東新、瑞軒、鴻海、廣達、臻鼎 - KY。

今天集中市場投信買超較多的個股爲，日月光投控、欣興、文曄、南亞、華邦電、中信金、強茂、元大金、富邦金、國泰金；賣超較多的個股爲，京元電子、南亞科、勤誠、景碩、台新新光金、漢唐、華航、鴻海、上銀、凱基金。

今天集中市場自營商買超較多的個股爲，友達、凱基金、華南金、大成鋼、兆豐金、旺宏、玉山金、元大金、永豐金、聯電；賣超較多的個股爲，欣興、南亞科、華通，

資深證券分析師簡伯儀指出， 台北股市受到美國與伊朗戰事消息面影響大，且 就目前台股走勢來看，市場成交量能萎縮，且均線下彎的格局未變，但大盤指數震盪幅度加大 ，在技術面呈現弱勢格局，操作難度也更加的大。

news.Title: 《陸股》滬指跌0.74%、險守3900點；恆指日K連三黑
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-02 17:18:36 新聞中心 發佈

中國滬深兩市三大指數今(2)日集體開低，指數呈現開低走低態勢，午後跌幅進一步擴大，截至收盤，三大指數集體下跌，滬指險守3900點。盤面上，美國總統川普稱將在未來幾週對伊朗進行更強火力打擊，帶動油氣股大漲，醫藥生物、醫藥商業板塊爆發，航運、煤炭、部分鋰礦股漲幅居前；相較下，貴金屬板塊走低，算力概念亦走弱。整體來看，兩市個股呈普跌態勢，下跌個股逾4,300檔，滬指終場收跌0.74%，日K翻黑。

上證指數今收於3919.29點，下跌29.26點或0.74%；深證成指收於13486.94點，下跌219.58點或1.60%；創業板指收於3172.65點，下跌74.87點或2.31%；科創50收於1262.18點，下跌36.02點或2.77%；中證A500收於5550.74點，下跌75.59點或1.34%。

成交量方面，滬市今成交8,119億元(人民幣,下同)，深市成交1兆311億元，兩市成交額1兆8,430億元，較前一交易日量縮約8%，兩市成交額不足2兆元。

從盤面上來看，油氣開採及服務、賽馬概念、醫藥商業板塊漲幅居前；貴金屬、通信服務、快手概念下跌。

中東停戰期望落空，引發全球股市集體下挫，香港恆生指數今日開盤下跌0.16%，指數呈現開低走低態勢，臨近尾盤跌幅收斂。盤面上，恆生科技指數跌1.63%，權重科技股集體走低，小米跌逾3.5%，阿里巴巴跌逾3.4%，快手跌逾2.8%，美團跌逾2%，騰訊跌逾1.4%。恆指收於25116.53點，下跌177.50點或0.70%，日K連三黑。

《陸股》滬指重回3900點、漲1.46%；恆指漲2.04%

《陸股》滬指重回3900點、漲1.3%；恆指日K連二紅

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 川普開講亞股嚇趴 永冠、森崴「一字跌停」下市警報狂響｜Yahoo財經掃描
news.Content:
受市場押注中東戰事可能降溫、油價一度走軟帶動，科技股領軍推升美股連兩日反彈，道瓊工業指數上漲0.48%，那斯達克指數上漲1.16%，標普500指數上漲0.72%，費城半導體指數勁揚2.82%。大型科技股表現偏強，Alphabet上漲3.4%，Meta與Amazon漲逾1%，英特爾因砸142億美元向Apollo回購愛爾蘭晶圓廠股權，股價大漲8.8%，美光也在買盤回補下強彈，台積電ADR也同步走高1.05%；不過Nike因財測疲弱、大中華市場續弱，股價重挫15.5%，股價創2014年來新低。

不過到了亞洲股市，市場情緒急轉直下。川普最新談話未能進一步釐清停戰時點，反而強調未來數周將持續對伊朗採取軍事行動，讓油價再度急升、避險情緒升溫，亞股跟著承壓。日股終場下跌2.38%，韓股下挫4.46%，港股下跌0.70%，上證指數走弱0.74%。

回到台股，加權指數今(2)日終場重挫602.39點，收32,572.43點，成交金額6,743.46億元，失守3萬3，周線吞連二黑。權王 台積電(2330) 早盤一度衝高到1,865元，隨後翻黑，終場下跌45元收1,810元，成為壓抑指數的關鍵權值股。盤面上AI權值股普遍走弱，但並非全面潰退， 聯發科(2454) 、 中華電(2412) 收平盤， 中信金(2891) 小漲相對抗跌；另一方面，面板雙虎受「光進銅退」與太空題材帶動，加上市場謠傳SpaceX向美國證券交易委員會秘密提交IPO，成交量合計近百萬張；記憶體族群也受美光大漲激勵表現相對有撐，成為今天盤面少數亮點。

📝盤點熱門股：友達、元大台灣50正2、群創

今日熱門成交股方面， 友達(2409) 以69.89萬張攻下成交量冠軍，同時為前五大唯一收紅個股；主要受「光進銅退」題材發酵帶動，市場資金積極卡位面板雙虎，推升買盤明顯升溫；同族群的群創(3481)也名列前段，股價小跌，但成交仍相當熱絡，顯示面板股仍是盤面資金聚焦重心。

ETF方面， 元大台灣50正2(00631L) 與 主動統一台股增長(00981A) 雙雙擠進前五，其中00981A交投熱絡，延續掛牌不到一年即晉升千億級主動式ETF的人氣話題；00631L則反映在震盪盤勢下，ETF仍是市場資金進出與短線操作的重要標的。至於網通股 正文(4906) 也進入前五，在「光進銅退」帶動下成交放大，顯示除了面板與ETF題材外，子族群個股同樣吸引資金來回換手。

📌三大法人買賣超

三大法人今日合計賣超373.58億元，籌碼面偏空。其中外資賣超386.96億元，賣壓明顯最重，也成為拖累整體法人動向的主因；自營商同步賣超69.88億元，顯示在盤勢震盪之際，操作仍偏保守。相較之下，投信買超83.26億元，持續站在買方，扮演盤面相對穩定的支撐力量。

✨本日議題股：壁紙股風暴

本日議題股聚焦在「下市危機股」與財報、交易處置風暴。證交所最新處置中， 永冠-KY(1589) 因未如期繳交2025年財報，4月7日起將停止買賣，若6個月內仍未補交，將面臨下市風險； 中福(1435) 因財報經會計師出具保留意見、 森崴能源(6806) 則因會計師對其繼續經營能力出具重大不確定性查核報告，雙雙遭打入全額交割股；此外， 台揚(2314) 、 虹光(2380) 也被列入變更交易方法名單，讓市場對問題股的警戒明顯升溫。其中盤面壓力最重的是森崴能源...... 點我看更多

👥股神從小培養：

隨著台股投資風氣延燒，兒童理財也明顯升溫，根據券商統計，2025年12歲以下兒童開戶數年增突破3成，兒童開戶的平均年齡更下探至6歲，反映愈來愈多家長提早替孩子布局教育金與長線資產；從持股結構來看，0050、0056等...... 點我看更多

🔭重大財經事件展望

下周二（4/7）國際財經展望，市場將先關注美國2月耐久財訂單，以及美國ADP就業變化週報，作為觀察企業投資動能與勞動市場熱度的重要線索；歐洲方面，歐元區、德國、英國將公布3月服務業與綜合PMI終值，景氣復甦力道能否延續值得留意；亞太區則聚焦澳洲3月服務業與綜合PMI終值，以及日本3月外匯存底與2月家庭支出，觀察區域內需與金融情勢變化；港澳部分，中國人民銀行將公布3月外匯存底與黃金儲備，適逢陸股清明連假後恢復交易，市場也將留意陸股開市後表現，不過港股仍持續休市。

回到台灣，國內則有央行公布3月外匯存底統計、金管會發布外資淨匯出入狀況，牽動資金面解讀，企業動態方面可留意 力積電(6770) 、 景碩(3189) 法說會與頌勝記者會，其中 緯創(3231) 也將召開法說會，後續對AI伺服器、半導體與電子零組件市況看法，預料將成為盤面焦點，另有 傑霖科技(8102) 除息表現，也可能帶來短線題材。

市場變化難捉摸？面對股市的大起大落，總會有看不懂、跟不上、難決策的時刻！ Yahoo財經掃描 每個台股交易日晚間6點上菜，整理市場最重要的財經熱點，從國際財經趨勢、產業焦點到個股異動，迅速掌握投資脈動，帶你快人一步，掌握市場先機。

註：加權指數成交金額含盤後定價，不含零股、鉅額、拍賣及標購

（核稿編輯：劉凱銘）

news.Title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights Ark Invest's, SK Telecom, NVIDIA, Nebius and Sandisk
news.Content: For Immediate Release Chicago, IL – April 2, 2026 – Today, Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights Ark Invest’s ARKK, SK Telecom SKM, NVIDIA NVDA, Nebius NBIS and Sandisk SNDK. OpenAI & Anthropic Prove the AI Revolution Is Just Starting Currently, geopolitical uncertainty is dominating Wall Street headlines. However, beneath the surface the AI industry remains scorching hot. Below is the latest evidence: OpenAI Valuation, Revenues Soar While most public artificial ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI industry remains robust, evidenced by OpenAI's $122 billion funding round, valuing it at $852 billion, and Anthropic's $14 billion annualized revenue run rate.
• OpenAI is generating $2 billion in monthly revenue, with enterprise revenue expected to reach 50% by year-end.
• Ark Invest has invested significantly in OpenAI, now comprising ~3% of its ARKK ETF.
• NVIDIA (NVDA) has its lowest forward PE ratio in 7 years, while AI pick-and-shovel stocks like Nebius and Sandisk are projected to grow revenue at triple-digit rates in 2026.
• Despite geopolitical uncertainty, the AI sector shows strong private market valuations and historically undervalued public bellwethers.
news.Keywords: AI industry, OpenAI valuation, Anthropic revenue, NVIDIA PE ratio, growth stocks

news.Title: 南亞科首季繳出亮眼成績，不畏市場紛擾，第二季還能更好
news.Content:
【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】雖然近期DRAM產業雜音多，但記憶體大廠南亞科(2408)今日繳出亮眼的營運成績單，今年第一季營收490.86億元，創單季營收新高。而實際上，雖然近期DRAM現貨價轉弱，但南亞科是以合約市場為主，加上第二季合約價依舊看漲，為此，南亞科營運表現不受市場雜音干擾。南亞科今公告3月營收達181.69億元，不單月增16.41%、年增達560.04%，更創單月營收的歷史新高，累計今年第一季南亞科營收490.86億元，季增63.1%、年增582.91%，也是單季新高。

台股創新高後，近幾週因國際局勢不穩與戰爭等影響，處於高檔震盪格局，當中原先最為強勢的記憶體類股，成為提款機，市場上也開始傳出，現貨市場和通路端，有拋貨、降價求售等壓力，並導致現貨價壓力大、短期出現明顯跌幅。

現貨價與消費性市場連動關係大，易受短線市場牽動，但實際上，南亞科是DRAM製造商，營收中更是以合約價為主，客戶為企業大廠與CSP業者，因此受到現貨市場、現貨價影響甚小，且不只第一季DRAM合約價上漲，第二季合約價在CSP客戶力挺下，依舊大漲，為此，南亞科不只在今年首季能繳出亮眼成績單，第二季則還會更好。

news.Title: Satellite Operator Globalstar Rallies on Report That Amazon Is in Buyout Talks
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Globalstar Inc. shares jumped more than 20% in late trading on a Financial Times report that Amazon.com Inc. is in talks to acquire the satellite provider. The deal ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Globalstar Inc. shares jumped over 20% on a report that Amazon.com Inc. is in talks to acquire the satellite provider.
• The acquisition would bolster Amazon's Project Kuiper satellite operation, aiming to compete with SpaceX's Starlink.
• Amazon has deployed over 200 satellites and plans for over 7,700 low-orbit satellites.
• Globalstar had nearly 800,000 subscribers as of end-2025.
• Apple Inc., which invested $1.5 billion in Globalstar in 2024 and holds a 20% stake, may have a say in the deal.
news.Keywords: acquisition talks, satellite provider, low-earth-orbit satellites, internet access, strategic investment

news.Title: 南亞科3月營收月增16%/創高，Q2價格漲勢續強
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-02 16:31:52 周佩宇 發佈

DRAM廠南亞科(2408)今(2)日公告3月營收達181.69億元，創單月歷史新高，月增16%、年增560%；第一季營收490.86億元，季增63%、年增583%，改寫單季新高紀錄。公司看好在記憶體市場供不應求、價格走揚之際，今年營運動能可延續不墜。

獲利方面，南亞科先前公告自結2月稅後淨利75.84億元、年增逾12倍，每股盈餘2.45元，已超越去年全年獲利表現。隨著DRAM價格續漲，市場預期南亞科3月獲利可望進一步攀升，單季獲利動能料顯著轉強。

受AI伺服器需求帶動，高頻寬記憶體（HBM）排擠標準型DDR產能，導致DDR4、DDR5供給持續吃緊，今年缺貨情況估皆難緩解，而在價格走勢上，公司先前指出，首季合約價已上漲一成以上，且第二季漲幅將進一步擴大，反映供需結構仍偏緊；預期至下半年漲勢才可能會逐步收斂。

利基型市場需求穩；華邦電首季營收獲利同衝高

華邦電出貨動能增，價格/稼動率回升撐毛利

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: The Zacks Analyst Blog  Uber, WeRide and Amazon's
news.Content: For Immediate Releases Chicago, IL – April 2, 2026 – Zacks.com announces the list of stocks featured in the Analyst Blog. Every day the Zacks Equity Research analysts discuss the latest news and events impacting stocks and the financial markets. Stocks recently featured in the blog include Uber Technologies UBER, WeRide WRD and Amazon’s AMZN. Here are highlights from Thursday’s Analyst Blog: Dubai Robotaxi Push by Uber & We Ride: AV Growth Heating Up? Uber Technologies , in collaboration with WeRide , a Chinese autonomous vehicle company, launched fully driverless, fare-charging robotaxi services in Dubai. This rollout ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Uber Technologies and WeRide have launched fully driverless, fare-charging robotaxi services in Dubai, marking a significant AV milestone.
• The service operates without a safety driver across select routes, aligning with Dubai's goal of 25% autonomous journeys by 2030.
• Uber is also partnering with Amazon's Zoox to deploy purpose-built robotaxis, with services expected to launch in Las Vegas and expand to Los Angeles.
• Uber's strategy focuses on partnerships to avoid heavy R&D costs, positioning itself as a leading mobility aggregator.
• This expansion into autonomous mobility strengthens Uber's global ambitions and its asset-light AV model.
news.Keywords: robotaxi, autonomous vehicles, Dubai, Uber partnership, Zoox

news.Title: 南亞科3月營收創新高　181億元年增逾5倍
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中新竹2026年4月2日電）市場需求復甦，動態隨機存取記憶體（DRAM）廠南亞科 (2408) 3月營收持續攀高，達到新台幣181.7億元，月增16.42%，較去年同期增加560.04%，再創歷史新高。

南亞科累計第1季營收490.87億元，也創下單季營收歷史新高，較2025年第4季增加63.1%，較去年同期增加582.91%。

南亞科預計4月13日召開線上法人說明會，說明2026年第1季營運狀況。市場預期，第1季受惠DRAM價格持續攀升，營業額成長，南亞科獲利也將有不錯表現。

南亞科日前公告辦理3億5157萬股私募增資，將引進SK海力士（Hynix）、晟碟（Sandisk）、鎧俠（Kioxia）及思科（Cisco）等國際大廠投資入股，未來合作規劃備受矚目。

news.Title: 抽中有望賺近66萬元！3檔台股抽籤紅包一次看
news.Content:
最新申購個股出爐！近期共有3檔個股將進行或是正在進行上市、上櫃、現金增資公開申購，其中以初次上櫃的創新服務（7828）最吸引人，承銷價628元，若以市價（1278元）計算，抽中一張潛在獲利近66萬元，報酬率104.6%。

下周有3檔個股開放申購，分別是上櫃增資的亞元（6109）、初次上市的神數（7821）以及初次上櫃的創新服務。亞元已在今日開放申購，4月8日截止，承銷價10.3元，以市價12.5元換算，潛在獲利2150元，報酬率20.9%，4月20日撥券。

第2檔為聯華神通集團旗下小金雞神數（7821)即將在4月8日開放申購，承銷價38.5元，以市價62.5元換算，抽中一張有望賺2.4萬元，報酬率62.3%，也是4月20日撥券。

最吸引人的，莫過於是從事半導體自動化設備開發、製造及銷售業務的創新服務，初次上櫃申購作業在4月10日啟動，承銷價628元，以市價換算，抽中賣掉有望賺65.7萬元，報酬率破100％。

創新服務目前主要產品為 MEMS 探針卡製造與檢修自動化設備，包括自動植針、檢測、鑽孔、返修等設備，並同步開展 MEMS 探針卡代理銷售業務與整卡自動化返修服務，累計今年前2月，其營收8,858萬元，年增111.17%，法人預期受惠 AI 的應用需求，今年營收成長與高毛利率表現應屬可期。

陳依旻／財經特派記者副組長，主跑央行、證交所、投信投顧等

news.Title: 《台股盤後》開高走低、收跌602點；週K連二黑
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-02 16:13:21 新聞中心 發佈

在美國四大指數週三收紅激勵下，台股今(2)日早盤開高，一度上漲逾300點，不過隨後受到美國總統川普針對中東局勢發表演說未如市場預期所衝擊、市場避險情緒迅速升溫，加上面臨連假賣壓影響，導致大盤由紅翻黑後一路走低，並跌破33000點關卡，加權指數終場收在32572.43點，下跌602.39點或1.82%，失守5日線及10日線，成交量略增至6729.07億元；週K連二黑，本週共計下跌540.16點或1.63%。

川普暗示中東衝突可能快要結束，激勵美國四大指數週三持續反彈。亞洲股市方面，受惠美股昨日走揚，日經225指數一度揚升逾500點，不過之後因川普發表演說、稱伊朗戰爭還會延續數週，WTI油價聞訊衝高，拖累日經指數翻黑、終場下跌2.38%；韓國KOSPI指數亦收跌4.47%。

美股費半指數上日續揚2.8%、台積電ADR亦上漲逾1%，惟今受制於川普對美伊戰爭談話指戰事還會延續數週，權王台積電開高走低，終場以1810元作收、下跌2.43%，同時聯電、健策、致茂、台達電、廣達、鴻海連袂走跌；而記憶體族群雖有華邦電、旺宏被調高評等，然走勢上也是開高走低，拖累南亞科、品安、威剛、十銓、凌航、群聯同步下挫；不過宜鼎、宇瞻、創見、廣穎呈收紅；整體29大類股中無任一電子族群收紅。

以29大類股表現來看，食品股相對抗跌、收漲0.45%，貿易百貨、橡膠、金融類股則分別收漲0.26%、0.21%、0.05%，為今日收紅的四大族群；在跌勢表現上，昨日強勢的台玻今轉弱、拖累玻璃陶瓷股收跌3.1%、表現最差，造紙股則持續弱勢、收跌2.8%；綠能環保、電子零組件族群收跌2.6%、2.3%，跌幅分居第三、第四。

三大法人動向方面，今日三大法人合計賣超373.58億元；其中，自營商賣超69.89億元，投信買超83.26億元，外資及陸資賣超386.96億元。

《台股盤後》收跌225點、5日線失而復得；周K翻黑

《台股盤後》收跌101點、日K翻黑，守住5日線

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: Nasdaq Correction: Buy 2 Trillion-Dollar AI Stocks With 50% Upside, According to Wall Street
news.Content: The Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQINDEX: ^IXIC) entered correction territory on March 26 , when it closed more than 10% below its record high. But corrections have historically been buying opportunities because the Nasdaq has never failed to recoup its losses. Most Wall Street analysts believe two trillion-dollar companies are deeply undervalued: Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms (META) and Broadcom (AVGO) are identified as two trillion-dollar AI stocks with significant upside potential, according to Wall Street analysts.
• Meta has a median target price implying 50% upside, driven by its AI-focused growth strategy, user engagement, and improved ad performance.
• Morgan Stanley highlights Meta's long runway for monetization and the potential of Meta AI for agentic commerce.
• Broadcom has a median target price implying 52% upside, driven by its AI networking revenue growth (up 60% in Q1) and custom AI accelerator chips.
• While both stocks are considered strong AI plays, Broadcom offers non-AI revenue streams and a dividend, making it potentially less risky than Nvidia.
news.Keywords: AI stocks, upside potential, Meta Platforms, Broadcom, analyst targets

news.Title: Amazon, Apple, and Nvidia Can't Make AI Chips Without This Company. Here's Why Its Growth Stock Could Soar.
news.Content: Amazon , Apple , and Nvidia are among the largest, richest, and most powerful tech companies on Earth. It's hard to properly emphasize just how much these companies depend on Arm Holdings (NASDAQ: ARM) for its proprietary instruction set architecture. They literally cannot build chips without Arm licensing, not without walking away from an ecosystem that they've spent years wading deeper into. Will AI create the world's first ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Arm Holdings (ARM) is indispensable for major tech companies like Amazon, Apple, and Nvidia, as they rely on its licensed instruction set architecture (ISA) for chip development.
• Arm has unveiled its first production chip, an AGI CPU designed for agentic AI workloads, aiming for $1 billion in chip revenue by 2028 and $15 billion by 2031.
• This move into chip production is seen as additive, not directly competitive, to its customers, leveraging quadrupled CPU demand from agentic AI.
• Companies like Amazon (Graviton), Apple (Apple silicon), and Nvidia (Grace, Vera CPUs) depend on Arm's ISA for their critical chips.
• Despite a high valuation (P/E of 200), Arm's core business and growth prospects, coupled with potential upside from the new CPU, suggest long-term potential, though dollar-cost averaging is advised due to market volatility.
news.Keywords: ISA licensing, AI chips, agentic AI, CPU development, semiconductor ecosystem

news.Title: 00981A躍台股首檔千億級主動式ETF
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-02 15:49:41 新聞中心 發佈

ETF市場迎來關鍵里程碑，主動統一台股增長ETF(00981A)於去(2025)年5月掛牌上市，至昨(1)日僅不到一年時間，最新規模便衝上1,062.57億元，正式晉升為首檔千億級主動式ETF。且根據集保結算所統計，持有00981A的投資人超過39.8萬名，位居主動式ETF的第一名，同時躍上台股ETF受益人數第十名，可見投資人對主動式ETF的接受度正在快速上升。

為提供投資人更多元的選擇，金管會推動主動式ETF發展，統一投信積極響應，已發行兩檔主動式ETF，分別是著眼於台股的主動統一台股增長ETF(00981A)，以及鎖定全球的主動統一全球創新ETF(00988A)。

統一投信長期深耕主動投資領域，從主動式基金到主動式ETF，始終致力為投資人尋求資產增值的機會。根據投信投顧公會統計至2026年2月底，主動式ETF的總規模約2,412億元，這之中有高達32%的資產規模，是由統一投信所管理，市占率位居同業之冠。

邁入3月份，統一投信旗下兩檔主動式ETF規模又進一步增長。根據統一投信官網1日公告，00981A規模已從掛牌時28億元，攀升至1,062.57億元，增幅高達約3682%，是目前唯一規模跨過千億門檻的主動式ETF。而2025年11月掛牌的00988A，規模則從62億元壯大至133.22億元，是自2026年以來，規模增加最顯著的海外主動式ETF。

在主動式ETF受益人數方面，根據集保結算所最新(3/27)統計，共有14家投信業者參與，已發行23檔主動式ETF，總受益人數約124.88萬人。其中，由統一投信所發行的00981A、00988A受益人數合計高達近46.8萬人。

回顧2025年5月以來，台股加權指數從約2萬點來到3萬3千點左右，漲幅超過6成，向全球投資人展現了台股投資價值。而00981A以每股淨值10元出發，目前淨值突破20元大關，並成為史上第一檔規模超越千億的主動式ETF，象徵台灣資產管理市場又往前邁進一步。

統一投信提醒，主動式ETF與被動式ETF並無絕對的優劣，主動式ETF不保證能超越績效指標、市場大盤或被動式ETF的報酬，且過去績效也不代表未來績效的保證。投資人投資前應審慎評估市場波動與各項投資風險，並詳閱公開說明書，根據自身的投資目標與風險承受度選擇最適合的產品。

不確定性尚未退散，聯博看好非投等債收益前景

中再保配息2.2元創高，配發率創近7年新高

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 川普演說不中聽! 台股近千點震盪攻月線失敗
news.Content:
[ 非凡新聞 ]記者林浩宇,攝影林秋強

美股強彈帶動市場信心回溫，原本預期台股今（2）日可望延續漲勢，不過盤勢卻在開盤後急轉直下。美國總統川普最新演說未釋出戰爭降溫訊號，甚至強硬表態，讓市場期待落空，失望性賣壓湧現，加權指數盤中由紅翻黑，失守33000點整數關卡，終場下跌602點，以32572點作收，成交量6948億元。

民眾：「就不要想那麼多，人家都在講，股票就是那幾隻突然漲，你有跟上就跟上。」

投資人很難不多想，美股四大指數全都收紅，費城半導體指數大漲2.82%，科技股明顯反彈，市場本來預期，台股2日有機會延續多方氣勢，不料開盤後不久，川投顧再度發威。

《非凡新聞》記者 林浩宇：「美國總統川普，在當地時間4月1發表演說，不過並未提及戰爭何時將會結束，也讓市場的期待落空，加權指數盤中是由紅翻黑，失守33000點整數大關。」

不只如此，川普更語出驚人，揚言要把伊朗打回石器時代，進一步加劇市場恐慌情緒，最低點觸及32516點，高低震盪將近千點，不只跌破五日線，更面臨回測季線支撐壓力。

華南投顧董事長 呂仁傑：「油價上漲股市下跌，這樣的趨勢大概還會持續一段時間，接下來幾天投資人還是要密切關注中東局勢，盤勢上來看，有可能要來進行再次的測試季線。AI這個族群整個趨勢沒有變，那如果說整個戰事，如預期可以在整個四月底結束，因為畢竟五月這邊來看的話，美中的川習會應該會成為市場上另外一個焦點。」

電子權值股倒成一片，護國神山台積電最低點來到1810元，聯發科從1500元回落，但盤面上還是有亮點，PCB族群德宏連亮兩燈，台虹攻上漲停板；矽光子族群逆勢走強，波若威亮燈漲停，股后聯亞則寫下新天價，攻上1900元。

顧德投顧分析師 黃紫東：「那剛好下個禮拜，我們台灣在南港展覽館有個Touch Taiwan展，以前是展出一些像面板，但是近幾年慢慢也把重心轉往像是矽光子，或者是先進封裝等等相關的領域，下個禮拜來看我們認為，這個連假還是小心一下，就是美伊之間的動向，並不是說100%安全，但是小型股來看還是各自有各自的題材。」

儘管市場劇烈震盪，投資人卻還是越跌越買，證交所公布最新數據，3月台股新開戶人數大增16.22萬人，創下單月歷史新高，其中30歲以下的人，就達9.65萬人，比重接近6成，整體開戶數更正式突破1400萬戶，來到1410.22萬戶，寫下全新里程碑，顯示在動盪之際，市場依舊有信心。（記者林浩宇、林秋強／台北報導）

news.Title: 【Follow法人】外資買超友達18萬張最狂還偏愛4金釵 轉身倒貨0050逾4.4萬張
news.Content:
（下午4時50分更新外資買賣超個股）

台股今（2）日開高走低，終場挫跌602.39點，以32572.43點作收。三大法人轉身賣超373.58億元，其中外資再度站回賣方，賣超386.96億元，本周賣超金額合計約1601億元；今日主要賣超標為0050達4.4萬張，並同步調節台積電（2330）9千餘張，賣超金額達171.34億元。分析師表示，外資目前態度並無明顯偏多或偏空，預計等美股出現反彈，才有較明顯的資金回流。

外資今日賣超前三大：元大台灣50、元大台灣50正2、主動統一台股增長

外資主要賣超前三大皆為ETF，依序是元大台灣50（0050）4萬4,024張、元大台灣50正2（00631L）3萬3,088張、主動統一台股增長（00981A）2萬7,873張。其中，00631L為連3賣，累計賣超4.1萬張。

另外，今日權值股全倒，台積電（2330）更是下跌45元，外資則轉身調節調節台積電9,385張，賣超金額達171.34億元。

外資今日買超前三大：友達、台新新光金、大成鋼

外資大買面板股友達18萬2,387張居台股之冠，累計4日共掃貨22.3萬張；鋼鐵股中鋼（2002）持續受到青睞買超1萬7,170張，大成鋼（2027）也獲轉買超1萬9,006張。

買超亞軍則為台新新光金（2887）2萬7,309張，另外3檔金融股中信金（2891）、兆豐金（2886）和兆豐金（2892）也入列前十名買超排行榜。

根據證交所公布籌碼動向，三大法人今日合計賣超373.58億元，其中外資賣超386.96億元，由買轉賣。

投信續站買方，買超83.26億元。自營商合計賣超69.89億元，其中自行買賣部分買超2.08億元，避險方面賣超71.97億元。

分析師：外資偏多偏空都不明朗

資深證券分析師王兆立受訪表示，由於台北股市即將迎來四天清明連假，加上美國總統川普最新談話缺乏新訊息，未顯示戰爭即將結束的跡象，因此外資仍以賣方居多，預計要等美股出現反彈，才可能有較明顯的資金回流。

王兆立補充，外資在三月份大幅賣超後，目前操作態度並無明顯偏多或偏空，主要跟隨美股走勢。他建議，投資人可觀察外資期貨淨空單是否增加，同時持續關注國際油價變化，因油價波動可能引發連鎖反應，進而推升通膨壓力。

中東戰火持續，雖昨（1）日美國和伊朗釋出終結衝突訊號，外資在台股大漲逾千點之際，回補233億元，但外資在本周以來主要仍站在賣方，累計至今日，賣超金額合計約1601億元。

王詩婷／財經特派記者，主跑勞動部、半導體、生技等

news.Title: Nvidia vs. Broadcom: Which AI Supercycle Growth Stock Will Make You Richer?
news.Content: The artificial intelligence (AI) era continues to gain momentum. Total capital expenditures among top AI companies could hit $700 billion this year. All these investments have driven a chip supercycle that has propelled Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) , the runaway leader in AI GPU chips, to mind-blowing growth over the past several years. But the AI industry is already changing, and quickly. Demand for AI inference ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI era is driving a chip supercycle, with Nvidia (NVDA) leading in AI GPUs and Broadcom (AVGO) emerging as a power player in custom AI accelerator chips.
• Nvidia benefits from a massive existing installation base and its CUDA platform, with its Blackwell chip and upcoming Vera Rubin platform targeting inference applications.
• Nvidia forecasts over $1 trillion in sales from Blackwell and Vera Rubin through 2027, driven by agentic AI demand.
• Broadcom designs custom ASICs for specific AI needs, partnering with major AI companies like Alphabet, OpenAI, and Meta Platforms.
• Broadcom forecasts AI chip sales to surge significantly over $100 billion in fiscal year 2027, while Nvidia's business is almost entirely AI-focused, making it potentially riskier but offering higher growth.
news.Keywords: AI supercycle, AI GPUs, custom ASICs, inference applications, chip manufacturers

news.Title: Intel makes major fab decision amid uncertainty
news.Content: Intel ( INTC ) reported April 1 that it will repurchase Apollo Global Management’s 49% stake in the joint venture tied to Fab 34 in Leixlip, Ireland, for $14.2 billion. The company plans to fund the deal with existing cash and about $6.5 billion of new debt, and it said the transaction should support profitability and its credit profile beginning in 2027. The move reverses a financing deal Intel struck in June 2024, when Apollo agreed to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel (INTC) will repurchase Apollo Global Management's 49% stake in the Fab 34 joint venture in Ireland for $14.2 billion.
• The transaction, funded by cash and $6.5 billion in new debt, is expected to support profitability and credit profile from 2027.
• Fab 34 is a key manufacturing asset supporting Intel 4 and Intel 3 process technologies, producing Core Ultra and Xeon products.
• The market reacted positively, with shares rising sharply, indicating investor confidence in Intel carrying its manufacturing recovery.
• The stock is trading at $48.15, up 9.11% on the day, and remains above key moving averages.
news.Keywords: fab takeover, joint venture, manufacturing strategy, credit profile, technical analysis

news.Title: Morningstar is bullish on 2 AI dividend stocks
news.Content: The AI trade has been anything but smooth in 2026. After a strong run, investor sentiment has shifted in recent months. Many artificial intelligence stocks have sold off sharply , and investor anxiety has risen alongside them. But not every analyst is running for the exits. Morningstar sees the pullback as a chance to buy well-capitalized AI names at a discount . Two dividend stocks, in particular, are catching their eye: Microsoft and Broadcom . Both carry wide economic moat ratings from Morningstar, indicating durable competitive advantages. Both are profitable, growing, and committed ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Morningstar is bullish on Microsoft (MSFT) and Broadcom (AVGO) as AI dividend stocks, seeing the recent pullback as a buying opportunity.
• Microsoft has a five-star rating, a $600 fair value estimate (62% undervalued), and a wide economic moat.
• Azure, Microsoft's cloud platform, is a $75 billion business growing at 30% annually, with significant AI investments.
• Broadcom (AVGO) has a four-star rating, a $500 fair value estimate (61% undervalued), and a wide moat, focusing on custom AI accelerators.
news.Keywords: AI dividend stocks, undervalued assets, economic moat, cloud platform, custom AI accelerators

news.Title: Globalstar Rallies on Report That Amazon Is in Buyout Talks
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Globalstar Inc. shares jumped more than 20% in late trading on a Financial Times report that Amazon.com Inc. is in talks to acquire the satellite provider. The deal ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Globalstar Inc. shares jumped over 20% on a report that Amazon.com Inc. is in talks to acquire the satellite provider.
• The acquisition would bolster Amazon's Project Kuiper satellite operation, aiming to compete with SpaceX's Starlink.
• Amazon has deployed over 200 satellites and plans for over 7,700 low-orbit satellites.
• Globalstar had nearly 800,000 subscribers as of end-2025.
• Apple Inc., which invested $1.5 billion in Globalstar in 2024 and holds a 20% stake, may have a say in the deal.
news.Keywords: acquisition talks, satellite provider, low-earth-orbit satellites, internet access, strategic investment

news.Title: Exclusive-Intel looks to put millions more into SambaNova startup chaired by CEO Tan
news.Content: By Jeffrey Dastin and Max A. Cherney SAN FRANCISCO, April 1 (Reuters) - Chipmaker Intel has planned to invest another $15 million in SambaNova, a chip startup chaired by Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan, a Reuters review of corporate records showed. The investment, subject to regulatory approval, would increase Intel's ownership of SambaNova to 9%, the review showed. ‌The backing follows another $35 million that Intel put into SambaNova in February, which, along with other financing, had boosted Intel’s stake in the startup to 8.2%, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel plans to invest an additional $15 million in chip startup SambaNova, increasing its stake to 9%.
• This follows a previous $35 million investment, which brought Intel's stake to 8.2%.
• The investments raise concerns about potential conflicts of interest due to the involvement of Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan, who chairs SambaNova.
• Intel stated it has rigorous governance policies to ensure decisions are in the best interest of the company and shareholders.
news.Keywords: venture capital, strategic investment, conflict of interest, semiconductor startup, governance

news.Title: Penguin Solutions Q2 Earnings Call Highlights
news.Content: Key Points Management says AI is shifting from model training to real‑time inference and is positioning Penguin as an “ AI factory platform ”—spanning software (ICE ClusterWare), memory systems (Penguin Memory AI/CXL KV cache), reference architectures and services—backed by partnerships (NVIDIA, Dell, SK Telecom) and the hiring of Ian Colle as CPO. Q2 results: $343M net sales, non‑GAAP diluted EPS of $0.52 and 31.2% non‑GAAP gross margin; product mix drove a 63% jump in Integrated Memory (50% of revenue) while Advanced Computing sales declined 42% year‑over‑year. Management raised FY2026 guidance to a midpoint of 12% net sales growth and non‑GAAP ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Penguin Solutions reported Q2 net sales of $343 million, with non-GAAP diluted EPS of $0.52 and a non-GAAP gross margin of 31.2%.
• Integrated Memory revenue grew 63%, while Advanced Computing sales declined 42% year-over-year.
• The company raised its FY2026 guidance, projecting 12% net sales growth and non-GAAP EPS of $2.15, with an expected full-year gross margin of ~28%.
• Penguin Solutions is positioning itself as an 'AI factory platform' provider, focusing on real-time inference.
news.Keywords: earnings, revenue growth, gross margin, AI inference, guidance

news.Title: FitLife Brands Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
news.Content: Key Points Irwin acquisition drove Q4 revenue to $25.9 million (up 73% YoY) with Irwin contributing $12.6M, but consolidated gross margin fell (37.0% excluding inventory-step-up amortization) and net income slipped to $1.6M; the inventory step-up amortization concluded in Q4. Management reported broad-based demand softness beginning in mid-November and persisting into Q1 2026, with Legacy FitLife down about 12% in Q4, and therefore the company declined to provide 2026 guidance. Key priorities include Irwin supply-chain improvements (potentially +300–400 bps to gross margin from dating changes), increased new-product and off-Amazon marketing efforts as Irwin’s Amazon revenue ramps to roughly $0.8M/month, and continued ...
news.AI_Summary:
• FitLife Brands reported Q4 revenue of $25.9 million, up 73% year-over-year, driven by the Irwin acquisition ($12.6M contribution).
• Consolidated gross margin fell to 37.0% (excluding amortization), and net income slipped to $1.6 million.
• The company declined to provide 2026 guidance due to broad-based demand softness starting mid-November and persisting into Q1 2026.
• Key priorities include Irwin supply-chain improvements and increased marketing efforts, with Irwin's Amazon revenue ramping to $0.8M/month.
news.Keywords: revenue growth, gross margin, demand softness, acquisition integration, guidance

news.Title: A market Nvidia once owned is slipping away fast
news.Content: Chinese GPU and AI chipmakers captured nearly 41% of China's AI accelerator server market in 2025. It represents one of the sharpest erosions of Nvidia 's ( NVDA ) position in a key overseas market on record. The data come from an IDC report reviewed by Reuters . Total AI accelerator card shipments in China reached approximately 4 million units last year across Nvidia, AMD (AMD), and Chinese vendors. Nvidia shipped about 2.2 million cards and held a 55% share. But that is a sharp retreat from the near-total dominance it held just a few years ago. The ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Chinese GPU and AI chipmakers captured 41% of China's AI accelerator server market in 2025, significantly eroding Nvidia's position.
• Nvidia shipped 2.2 million cards, holding a 55% share, a sharp retreat from its previous near-total dominance.
• Beijing's push for domestic alternatives and U.S. export controls have accelerated this shift.
• Huawei Technologies led Chinese vendors, shipping approximately 812,000 chips.
news.Keywords: market share erosion, China AI market, export controls, domestic alternatives, competitive pressure

news.Title: Prediction: Liquid Cooling Will Be the Next Supercycle Within the AI Supercycle. 1 Growth Stock to Own.

news.Title: Want to Invest Like Jensen Huang? Here Are the Top 3 Stocks to Buy for April 2026.
news.Content: Jensen Huang has spent the past year telling investors that Nvidia (NVDA) is entering an “inference inflection”, with AI workloads expected to drive up to one trillion dollars of GPU demand by 2027. In fact, Nvidia’s data center revenue has already climbed more than 13 times since the launch of ChatGPT. Those projections are showing up in the numbers. Fiscal 2026 revenue jumped 65% year-over-year (YOY) to 215.9 billion dollars, driven by data center chips that now account for most of Nvidia’s sales and generate over 100 billion dollars in annual operating cash flow. That cash is not only fueling ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Jensen Huang's strategy involves taking stakes in companies critical to the AI supply chain, with Nvidia reportedly committing $2 billion to Marvell Technology (MRVL).
• Lumentum Holdings (LITE) is highlighted as an investment opportunity within the AI infrastructure cycle.
• Marvell Technology reported record fiscal 2026 net revenue of $8.2 billion and GAAP net income of $2.67 billion.
• Nvidia's investment in Marvell deepens a partnership on AI infrastructure and silicon photonics.
• Analysts have a consensus 'Strong Buy' rating on MRVL with an average price target of $119.53.
news.Keywords: AI supply chain, strategic investment, data infrastructure, silicon photonics, analyst consensus

• 富邦投顧總經理認為，台股低點逐步墊高，有止穩跡象，反彈主要來自中東戰事停火預期、融資減少、國家隊護盤、基本面強勁及台積電法說會預期。

news.AI_Summary:
• 全球智慧手機需求轉弱，聯發科已開始下修於晶圓代工廠的4奈米投片量，顯示手機鏈景氣明顯降溫。
• 記憶體價格飆漲，手機品牌廠向消費者轉嫁成本，壓抑終端消費需求。
• 法人預估今年全球智慧手機出貨將減少至11億支，年減13％，Android陣營衰退幅度達15％。
• 高階手機具備轉嫁能力且包裝AI旗艦體驗，未來600美元以上市場相對有韌性。
news.Keywords: 智慧手機需求,晶片砍單,記憶體漲價,手機鏈景氣,AI手機

news.Title: 外資送暖聯發科 升評至買進
news.Content: 聯發科受智慧機業務轉弱影響，股價疲弱，野村證券千呼萬喚始出來，基於報酬風險比轉趨有利及Google TPU是未來數年難以忽視的重大題材，終結對聯發科 ...

• 聯發科股價偏弱原因之一為Android陣營智慧機銷售不振，大摩下修今年全球手機出貨量預估至11億支。
• 聯發科有望受惠AI ASIC強勁成長機會，尤其來自Google TPU專案帶動。

• 受美伊戰爭影響，台股3月底前跌勢加重，八大公股行庫積極進場護盤，鎖定台積電等指標股。
• 1日台積電跳空大漲95元，收在1,855元，一口氣收復所有均線。
• 富邦投顧總經理認為，台股低點逐步墊高，有止穩跡象，反彈主要來自中東戰事停火預期、融資減少、國家隊護盤、基本面強勁及台積電法說會預期。
• 但仍需留意外資賣超、通膨壓力及貨幣政策緊縮等利空因素。
news.Keywords: 政府護盤,台積電,股市反彈,基本面,利空因素

news.AI_Summary:
• 受川普「二周停戰說」利多出鞘，台積電及高含積量ETF股價補血復甦，五檔ETF受益人數創新高。
• 新光臺灣半導體30（00904）經理人表示，台積電未來基本面看好，加上政府護盤重心，有機會恢復基本面表現。
• 元大台灣50（0050）單月獲逾1,400億淨申購，投資人數月增38萬人，顯示其不錯過大盤漲勢的特性。
• 富邦科技ETF（0052）指出，台灣基本面仍具支撐，AI應用帶動雲端服務商擴大資本支出。
news.Keywords: 高含積ETF,受益人數創新高,台積電,ETF買氣,AI供應鏈

news.Title: Crisis of Memory: Citi Just Cut Its Micron Stock Price Target by 16%
news.Content: Micron (MU) looked infallible just days ago, until Alphabet (GOOGL) broke the news that memory may no longer be in extreme demand. Google revealed an AI efficiency algorithm called TurboQuant that reduces the necessary compute and memory cost per query. That means that AI could end up needing much less memory than previously thought. Citi is pushing back on AI efficiency fears, however. The firm recently pointed out that cheaper technology historically expands usage rather than shrinks it. For example, the fear of DeepSeek ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Citi cut its price target for Micron (MU) by 16% due to concerns about AI efficiency algorithms like Google's TurboQuant reducing memory demand.
• DDR5 16GB DRAM spot prices have fallen approximately 6% since Micron's last earnings report.
• Despite short-term disruptions, Citi maintained a 'Buy' rating, citing long-term hyperscaler agreements and structural AI demand.
• Micron's stock is down over 20% from its highs but has held above $300.
• The article discusses the Jevons Paradox, suggesting efficiency gains could paradoxically increase resource demand.
news.Keywords: AI efficiency, memory demand, price target cut, DRAM prices, Jevons Paradox

news.Title: Analysis-SpaceX’s orbital data centers could face same hurdles as Microsoft’s abandoned undersea project
news.Content: By Joe Brock LOS ANGELES, April 1 (Reuters) - SpaceX on Wednesday filed for an IPO that Elon Musk says will bankroll an effort to turn the rocket maker into an AI powerhouse, launching up to 1 million data‑center satellites into orbit to bypass power and water limits on Earth. Microsoft had a similar ambition to escape land‑based computing constraints in 2015, when it lowered a shipping‑container‑sized data center onto the seabed off ‌Scotland, aiming to cut energy use through natural seawater cooling and tapping offshore wind and tidal power. Microsoft’s "Project Natick," once touted as a potential breakthrough for ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX's orbital data centers could face similar hurdles as Microsoft's abandoned undersea data center project (Project Natick).
• Microsoft abandoned Project Natick due to a lack of client demand and unviable economics, despite meeting technical targets.
• Key similarities include reliance on modular units that are expensive to deploy and difficult to expand or repair.
• Experts suggest these problems could be more severe in space, citing cooling challenges, high launch costs, and the harsh space environment.
news.Keywords: orbital data centers, undersea data centers, modular units, deployment costs, space environment

news.Title: Cathie Wood Just Made a Startling AI Move. Should You Follow?
news.Content: Cathie Wood, founder and chief executive of Ark Invest, is known for making bold moves. The top investor seeks out innovative companies, particularly when they're trading for bargain prices -- and this means she often goes against the crowd, buying a stock when it's out of favor or not on most investors' radar screens. And this means that when a generally popular tech stock falls, Wood is often there to pick it up. But in ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cathie Wood's Ark Invest sold shares of six prominent AI leaders, including Alphabet, Broadcom, TSMC, AMD, Nvidia, and Meta.
• Wood's strategy involves buying AI stocks on dips or when they stagnate, with a long-term investment horizon.
• Despite selling large positions, AMD remains a top 10 holding in Ark Innovation with a 4% weighting.
• Wood recently increased her CoreWeave holding, indicating continued belief in the AI story and a search for bargain opportunities.
news.Keywords: Cathie Wood, Ark Invest, AI stocks, portfolio rebalancing, bargain hunting

news.Title: Amazon Is Starting to Put Tesla in the Rearview Mirror
news.Content: Investors can't really be blamed if they're thinking, "New year, new ambitions, but same Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) ." For all of the impressive feats Tesla has achieved, and there are indeed many, the company does still have a trend of overpromising and underdelivering. That seems to be ringing true with the electric vehicle (EV) maker's driverless vehicle program in Austin, Texas, where Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) just announced it would begin testing its purpose-built robotaxis in a year of growth. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon's Zoox will begin testing its purpose-built robotaxis in Miami and Austin as part of its expansion.
• Tesla's driverless vehicle program in Austin is facing delays, with Musk predicting coverage of one-quarter to half of the U.S. population by year-end.
• Tesla's robotaxis reportedly performed worse than human drivers and had a higher crash rate than Alphabet's Waymo.
• Tesla's robotaxi valuation is estimated at 52% of its overall valuation, highlighting the importance of this segment for future performance.
news.Keywords: robotaxi, autonomous vehicles, expansion, Tesla, Amazon Zoox, market competition

news.Title: Meet the Vanguard Index Fund Beating the S&P 500 in 2026
news.Content: There are always some sectors outperforming the S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) , just as there are some sectors lagging it. Still, there's value in knowing which ones are leading or lagging at any given time, and how this leadership is changing. To this end, here's a look at one of the few index-based exchange-traded funds (ETFs) ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Vanguard Utilities ETF (VPU) is outperforming the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF (VOO) year-to-date, up over 7% versus the S&P 500's 7% pullback.
• Utility stocks offer safety during economic uncertainty, as demand for electricity remains consistent.
• The ETF boasts a trailing dividend yield of 2.5%, providing income during uncertain times.
• The growth of AI data centers is expected to increase electricity demand significantly, potentially driving further growth for utility companies.
news.Keywords: ETF performance, defensive stocks, dividend yield, AI data centers, electricity demand

news.Title: Why Sandisk Stock Was Soaring Today
news.Content: Shares of Sandisk (NASDAQ: SNDK) were moving higher today after the maker of flash memory products gained in sympathy with memory chip leader Micron (NASDAQ: MU) , which bounced back after a bullish note from Cantor ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Sandisk (SNDK) shares rose 11.3% in sympathy with Micron (MU), which bounced back after a bullish note from Cantor Fitzgerald.
• Cantor Fitzgerald called Micron a top pick, reiterating its $700 price target and citing an advantage over Korean competitors due to the Iran war's impact on energy prices in South Korea.
• Cantor argued that Alphabet's TurboQuant compression algorithm is not a threat to Micron due to Jevons paradox, which suggests increased efficiency drives higher demand.
• This argument also bodes well for Sandisk, as memory prices remain elevated and demand exceeds supply.
news.Keywords: memory sector, bullish note, price target, Jevons paradox, supply constraints

news.Title: Can Meta Platforms Reach a $9 Trillion Valuation in 5 Years? Here's What It Would Take
news.Content: Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) is offering some of its top executives some big incentives to push the value of the company to new heights. Filings with the Securities and Exchange Commission show that the company granted new stock options to six executives, all with an expiration date within five years. The highest strike price for those options is $3,727.12 per share, which would give Meta a value of about $9.4 trillion based on its current shares outstanding. The compensation packages are designed to align management with shareholders, and notably don't include founder and CEO Mark Zuckerberg, who already owns roughly ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms (META) is offering stock options to executives with strike prices up to $3,727.12, aiming for a $9.4 trillion valuation.
• Reaching this valuation requires executing on generative AI opportunities and expanding new products and monetization strategies.
• Meta's ad revenue climbed 22% last year, driven by increased ad impressions and relevance, with significant room for algorithm improvement.
• Capital expenditures are increasing significantly to support AI research, with management planning a 73% step-up in spending in 2026.
news.Keywords: stock options, valuation target, generative AI, ad revenue, capital expenditure

news.Title: What Happens if the S&P 500 Joins the Nasdaq and Dow in Correction Territory?
news.Content: On March 26, the Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQINDEX: ^IXIC) entered a correction, closing down more than 10% from its high . The Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJINDICES: ^DJI) joined the Nasdaq in a correction on March 27. As of market close on March 30, the Nasdaq was down 13.3% from its all-time high, the Dow is slightly out of correction territory, down 9.9%, and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Nasdaq Composite and Dow Jones Industrial Average have entered correction territory, down more than 10% and 9.9% from their highs, respectively.
• The S&P 500 is down 9.1% from its high, but not yet in correction territory.
• Mega-cap tech stocks like Nvidia, Alphabet, Apple, Microsoft, and Amazon are disproportionately dragging down the indexes.
• A broad market correction could signal further declines in major tech and financials, creating opportunities for investors.
news.Keywords: market correction, index performance, mega-cap tech, stock sell-off, investor opportunity

news.Content: McKinsey estimates that companies will invest approximately $7 trillion in global data center infrastructure by 2030. However, not everyone is bullish on NVDA stock. Cathie Wood’s ARK Invest has been actively rotating out of large-cap technology stocks. The ARK funds have ...
news.AI_Summary:

• This selling contrasts with Wells Fargo's 'Overweight' rating and $265 price target for NVDA, citing conservative revenue targets.
• Nvidia's CEO projects a $1 trillion long-term revenue opportunity through 2027, with cloud providers deploying significant AI capacity.
• Nvidia's data center business is the key growth driver, with strong industry tailwinds and attractive valuations suggesting potential accumulation opportunities.
news.Keywords: Cathie Wood, Nvidia, portfolio rotation, price target, AI data center

news.Title: The Market Is Pricing In a Recession. These 2 Tech Stocks Would Thrive Even if It Happens
news.Content: Many investors fear a recession is on the horizon, given soaring oil prices and rising geopolitical tensions. Some are deciding to stay away from equities, especially from tech stocks, a sector that doesn't exactly have a reputation as a safe haven during economic downturns. However, there are attractive tech stocks that can perform relatively well even during challenging economic times and, more importantly, produce outstanding returns thereafter. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft (MSFT) is considered a relatively safe tech stock during a recession due to its entrenched productivity suite and high switching costs.
• The company has an outstanding financial position with the highest credit rating from S&P Global.
• Microsoft's leadership in cloud computing and AI offers long-term growth tailwinds, positioning it to weather economic downturns.
• Despite significant capex spending, Microsoft's business fundamentals remain strong, making it a worthwhile investment.
news.Keywords: recession resilience, cloud computing, AI leadership, financial position, investment strategy

news.Title: Does SpaceX's 1-Million-Satellite Vision Offer Bold Upside or Regulatory and Environmental Risk for Investors?
news.Content: The space economy technically isn't anything new. It's been a thing since governments and companies began launching rockets and satellites into space. Still, it's an exciting time for investors because of the immense upside of the next frontier. Elon Musk has been central to the space industry for years as CEO of SpaceX since 2002. SpaceX has become the world's most prominent space company as a leader in rocket launch services and satellite internet technology. Will AI ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX has filed a regulatory application to launch 1 million satellites for orbital AI data centers, a significant increase from current levels.
• Experts have raised environmental and regulatory concerns over SpaceX's ambitious satellite plans.
• SpaceX is reportedly seeking a valuation of up to $1.75 trillion, which is about 113 times its estimated 2025 revenue of $15.5 billion.
• The high valuation and potential hype surrounding the IPO could lead to poor returns for early buyers if growth expectations are not met.
news.Keywords: satellite deployment, orbital data centers, IPO valuation, regulatory concerns, environmental risk

news.Title: Morgan Stanley says it’s “time to buy” California-based tech giant
news.Content: After a Brutal Week, Wall Street says it’s time to buy the tech giant. It’s not often a stock drops hard and then immediately gets called a top buy. But that has happened with Meta Platforms ( META ). After a punishing stretch that saw Meta tumble on legal losses, layoffs , and rising concerns about AI spending, one Wall Street giant is stepping in with a bold call. This is after a long bearish streak that saw the stock fall over 12% in just two days. A back-to-back drop of 8% on Thursday, 26th March, and 4% drop to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Morgan Stanley initiated coverage on Meta Platforms (META) with an 'Overweight' rating and a $775 price target, calling it 'time to buy'.
• The firm believes investor fear has peaked due to legal battles, layoffs, and AI spending concerns, with much of the downside already priced in.
• Meta's valuation is trading at roughly 15x projected 2027 earnings, one standard deviation below its 10-year average.
• Morgan Stanley sees Meta's AI strategy, potentially centered around 'MetaClaw,' as a new revenue engine, with a $10 billion AI data center investment in El Paso, Texas.
news.Keywords: buy rating, price target, valuation, AI strategy, data center investment

news.Title: Broadcom Drops 11% Year to Date: Should You Buy the Stock on the Dip?
news.Content: Broadcom AVGO shares have dropped 10.5% in the year-to-date period, outperforming the broader Zacks Computer and Technology sector’s fall of 11.5%, but underperforming the Zacks Electronics – Semiconductors industry’s decline of 5.5%. Although AVGO shares have been benefiting from rising AI revenues driven by strong demand for custom AI accelerators (XPUs), the lower margin chips are hurting the revenue mix. The sluggish non-AI revenue view for the second quarter of fiscal 2026 is a headwind for investors. So, what should investors do with the AVGO stock? Let’s ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Broadcom (AVGO) shares have dropped 10.5% year-to-date, underperforming the broader tech sector.
• Lower-margin chips are hurting the revenue mix, despite strong AI revenue growth (106% YoY in Q1 fiscal 2026).
• Broadcom expects Q2 fiscal 2026 gross margin to be 77%, flat sequentially, due to an unfavorable product mix.
• The company expects AI revenues of $10.7 billion in Q2 fiscal 2026, a 140% year-over-year increase.
news.Keywords: stock performance, gross margin, revenue mix, AI revenue, semiconductor solutions

news.Title: Where Will Tesla Stock Be in 5 Years?
news.Content: Tesla 's (NASDAQ: TSLA) stock remains a battleground between bulls and bears, and the latter appear to be winning so far this year. It's a pivotal year for the company, setting the direction for the next few years. Tesla's medium-term catalyst No one is buying Tesla stock solely for its electric vehicle (EV) or energy businesses, because the valuation (Tesla trades at 161 times the analyst consensus for 2026 earnings) is high. Instead, investors are pricing in a substantial increase in earnings from its robotaxi and, later, the Optimus robot business, as well ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's stock is facing pressure, with investors pricing in substantial growth from robotaxi and Optimus robot businesses.
• The key near-term catalyst is the robotaxi business, which is expected to generate recurring income and software revenue.
• Tesla's robotaxi business is not scaling as fast as anticipated, with delays in expanding its unsupervised robotaxi network.
• The company is at risk of tying up capital unnecessarily and losing its early-mover advantage if the rollout is delayed.
news.Keywords: robotaxi, autonomous driving, scaling challenges, capital allocation, market expansion

news.Title: Humanoid Robots Offer Europe Path to Stay in Tech Race
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Europe has been late to the AI boom and trails China on electric cars. But when it comes to humanoid robots, it’s still in the race. Sweden’s Hexagon AB has built a humanoid that’s being tested at industrial clients including BMW AG. Germany’s Neura Robotics GmbH just raised some €1 billion ($1.2 billion) from investors including Amazon.com Inc. and Qualcomm Inc., valuing the startup at about €4 billion. Local automotive suppliers Schaeffler AG and Robert Bosch GmbH are also betting on grabbing a share of the nascent market headlined by Tesla Inc. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Europe is testing humanoid robots, with companies like Hexagon AB and Neura Robotics raising significant capital.
• Automotive suppliers Schaeffler AG and Robert Bosch GmbH are also investing in the nascent humanoid robot market.
• Hexagon's Aeon robot is expected to surge in numbers by 2030, with full commercialization planned for 2026.
• Humanoid robots offer potential for reduced labor costs and addressing an aging demographic, but large-scale deployment may take 5-10 years.
news.Keywords: humanoid robots, industrial automation, market growth, European tech, labor costs

news.Title: Who Is Tesla's Top Competitor?
news.Content: He may not have invented the all-electric, battery-powered vehicle. But, there's certainly no denying that Tesla 's (NASDAQ: TSLA) founder, Elon Musk, ushered them out of the fringe of the automobile business and into the mainstream. By making them look stylish, the eccentric Musk arguably made the industry viable, in turn making Tesla the $1.4 trillion behemoth that it is today. As could have been expected, though, once profits finally started flowing for Tesla, competitors' interest in this business dramatically ramped up. Although not every newcomer to the industry is thriving, enough of them are doing well enough to force ...
news.AI_Summary:
• BYD is emerging as Tesla's top competitor in the EV market, selling more EVs globally than Tesla in the past year.
• BYD sold over 2.25 million EVs compared to Tesla's 1.63 million, and is also gaining market share in Europe.
• Tesla faces competition from BYD in China, where the EV industry has exploded without Tesla's significant growth.
• BYD is experiencing a price war, reporting a 19% year-over-year decline in profits despite revenue growth.
news.Keywords: EV market, automotive competition, market share, China, Europe, profit decline

• Analysts expect Tesla to deliver approximately 368,900 vehicles in Q1, an 11.8% sequential decline but 9.6% growth year-over-year.
• Intensifying competition in Europe and China, along with the expiry of U.S. federal tax credits, are weighing on demand.
• Tesla is diversifying beyond EVs, focusing on solar energy, humanoid robots, and autonomous robotaxis.
news.Keywords: EV deliveries, demand softening, competition, market challenges, business diversification

news.Title: AI Infrastructure Spending Could Nearly Triple by 2029. Here Are 2 Stocks to Buy.
news.Content: Big tech is still pouring billions into the data centers powering artificial intelligence (AI) -- and the spending wave doesn't appear to be peaking anytime soon. Statista projects AI infrastructure investment will climb to $902 billion by 2029, up from $334 billion in 2025. Even after strong runs, some of the market's biggest AI winners, including Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Iren (NASDAQ: IREN) , are priced in a way that ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AI infrastructure investment is projected to reach $902 billion by 2029, up from $334 billion in 2025.
• Nvidia's data center business, accounting for over 90% of its revenue, grew 75% year-over-year, with strong demand for its GPUs.
• Nvidia expects $1 trillion in cumulative purchase orders for Blackwell and Rubin chips through 2027.
• Iren, a data center builder, has secured over 4.5 gigawatts of power and has a $9.7 billion contract with Microsoft.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, data center spending, GPU demand, revenue growth, power capacity

The company that exists today is a far cry from its humble beginnings in the Jobs’ family garage, where a small team of technology buffs formed one of the most important businesses in modern history. How important are Services to Apple's current revenue? Initially formed ...

news.Title: Morning Brief: Stocks roar back, plus our giant, action-packed Q1 roundup
news.Content: 👋 Good morning! And happy April. Congrats on making it through quite the quarter, everyone. We'll say this up front: The Morning Brief does not do April Fool's Day. Tuesday was an absolute blockbuster day in the markets, as stocks surged on optimism about an off-ramp from the Iran conflict. The S&P 500 ( ^GSPC ) gained 2.9%, the Dow ( ^DJI ) 2.5%, and the Nasdaq ( ^IXIC ) 3.8%. Once again, these are not typos or April foolishness. And our Jared Blikre reminds us that this does not dig us out of March's hole. The S&P 500 is ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Stocks surged on Tuesday due to optimism about an off-ramp from the Iran conflict, with the S&P 500 gaining 2.9%.
• Iranian President Pezeshkian signaled openness to negotiation, leading to a drop in crude oil prices, though they remain above $100 per barrel.
• Labor market data, including ADP private payroll numbers, and retail sales are key economic indicators to watch.
• Super Micro is described as 'uninvestable' due to a series of 'own-goals', while CoreWeave secured an $8.5 billion GPU-backed loan.
news.Keywords: market rally, Iran conflict, economic data, AI stocks, financing

news.Title: Does Google's New TurboQuant Technology Mean the Party's Over for Micron?
news.Content: A little over a year ago, A Chinese quantitative hedge fund-turned-AI lab released an advanced AI model called DeepSeek . While there is some debate about exactly how cheaply and on what chips DeepSeek was trained, there is no doubt that DeepSeek implemented novel innovations that greatly boosted the efficiency of training an AI model with fewer and "less good" semiconductors. AI semiconductor and memory stocks sold off sharply on the news, based on the surface-level impression that AI companies wouldn't need to buy so many logic and memory chips. However, we all now know that ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Google's TurboQuant technology, a software-based AI memory compression, could reduce DRAM demand for AI inference.
• This could shift market share from GPUs with High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM) to CPUs using traditional server memory like DDR5.
• TurboQuant claims to increase KV cache capacity six times and speed up AI inference eight times without accuracy loss.
• Memory companies like Micron (MU) and its suppliers saw sharp sell-offs on the news.
news.Keywords: AI memory, compression technology, DRAM demand, HBM, market shift

news.Title: Chinese chipmakers claim nearly half of local market as Nvidia's lead shrinks
news.Content: (Corrects to clarify attribution) By Che Pan and Laurie Chen BEIJING, April 1 (Rtrs) - Chinese GPU and AI chip makers captured nearly 41% of China's ‌AI accelerator server market last year, eroding Nvidia 's ( NVDA ) once-dominant ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Chinese chipmakers captured nearly 41% of China's AI accelerator server market in 2025, eroding Nvidia's dominant position.
• U.S. export controls have pushed Chinese companies to adopt domestic alternatives, with Huawei leading among local vendors.
• Nvidia shipped around 2.2 million cards in China, holding a 55% market share, a retreat from its previous dominance.
• AMD holds a modest 4% share, while Chinese vendors collectively shipped 1.65 million cards.
news.Keywords: AI chips, China market, market share erosion, export controls, domestic alternatives

news.Title: Billionaire Ken Griffin Buys 2 AI Stocks Chasing a $1 Trillion Market Opportunity in Robotaxis (Hint: Not Tesla)
news.Content: Light-duty vehicles travel over 3 trillion miles annually in the U.S., per the Bureau of Transportation Statistics. Ride-sharing services typically charge $1 to $2 per mile. So, even if autonomous driving technology cuts the price in half, robotaxis still represent a trillion-dollar market in the U.S. alone. In the fourth quarter, hedge fund billionaire Ken Griffin bought shares of Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) , two stocks at the center of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia GPUs are the industry standard for AI workloads, and its software ecosystem streamlines development of physical AI applications.
• Nvidia's Omniverse simulation platform and Cosmos foundation models are key for developing robotaxis.
• Nvidia CFO Colette Kress estimates robotaxis could generate hundreds of billions in revenue over the next decade.
• Amazon's Zoox is testing robotaxis in Las Vegas and San Francisco, with plans to expand to Austin and Miami.
news.Keywords: AI workloads, robotaxi development, simulation platform, autonomous driving, market opportunity

news.Title: Microsoft Just Had Its Worst Quarter Since 2008--Is This a Generational "Buy" Signal?
news.Content: Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) entered 2026 riding high. The tech giant had delivered solid double-digit gains for three consecutive years, including a spectacular 57% return in 2023. Then, metaphorically speaking, the wheels fell off. The world's third-largest technology company by market cap finished the first quarter of 2026 with its share price down 24%. This marked the steepest quarterly decline for Microsoft since late ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft (MSFT) experienced its steepest quarterly decline since late 2008, down 24% in Q1 2026, due to increased capital expenditures for AI infrastructure.
• The company plans to boost capex to $146 billion in fiscal 2026, primarily for AI infrastructure expansion.
• Microsoft's remaining performance obligations (RPOs) soared 110% YoY to $625 million, indicating a strong backlog.
• Wall Street remains bullish, with 54 out of 57 analysts rating the stock as a 'buy' or 'strong buy'.
news.Keywords: capital expenditure, AI infrastructure, RPO, analyst sentiment, stock performance

news.Title: Nvidia vs. Broadcom: The Smarter AI Stock to Buy in April
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Broadcom (NASDAQ: AVGO) are two of the top ways to invest in the artificial intelligence (AI) space. Many investors (like myself) may own both. However, there can only be one best buy for April. Let's take a look to see which stock has the advantage heading into April and what kind of upside is ahead. Will AI create ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's GPUs are the industry standard for AI computing, with its new Vera Rubin chip architecture expected to offer significant performance improvements.
• Nvidia expects $1 trillion in lifetime sales for Blackwell and Rubin chips by 2027, a substantial increase from previous projections.
• Broadcom designs custom AI chips for hyperscalers, expecting $100 billion in revenue from this segment by 2027.
• Nvidia's stock is considered cheaper from a forward P/E standpoint, and its growth rate was higher than Broadcom's last quarter.
news.Keywords: AI computing, GPU technology, custom AI chips, revenue projections, valuation
