news.Title: Buy This Nasdaq Index Fund. History Says It Could Soar More Than 100% in 5 Years.
news.Content: The Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQINDEX: ^IXIC) is one of three major U.S. stock market indexes. It includes more than 3,000 companies listed on the Nasdaq Stock Exchange. The Nasdaq-100, which tracks a subset of those companies, recorded an average five-year return of 103% (including dividends) during the past two decades. Put differently, history says the Nasdaq-100 could roughly double investors' money over the next five years. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Nasdaq-100 index, tracked by Invesco QQQ Trust (QQQ), has historically provided strong returns, with an average five-year return of 103% over two decades.
• The Nasdaq-100 is heavily exposed to AI stocks, with top holdings including Nvidia, Apple, Alphabet, Microsoft, and Amazon.
• The index has a reasonable expense ratio of 0.18%, but concentration risk exists with the top 10 holdings comprising nearly 50% of its performance.
• The Nasdaq Composite is in a market correction territory, historically a good time to invest, with potential for even better five-year returns.
news.Keywords: Nasdaq-100, AI stocks, index fund, market correction, concentration risk

news.Title: Is It Too Late to Buy Nvidia Stock?
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) has been one of the best-performing stocks in the market for the past five years, up 1,220% over that period. That has helped it grow to become the largest company in the world , with a market capitalization (market cap) of over $4.1 trillion. Nvidia's rise to the mountaintop is well deserved. The company has just seen explosive growth over the past several years. Its revenue has gone from ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) has grown revenue from $16.7 billion in fiscal 2021 to $215.9 billion last fiscal year, a nearly 13x increase.
• The company's growth is fueled by AI, with its GPUs and CUDA software platform establishing a wide moat.
• Nvidia's networking segment revenue surged 263% to $11 billion last quarter, transforming it into a data center platform company.
• Nvidia continues to evolve by developing LPUs and high-performance Vera CPUs to offer comprehensive AI data center solutions.

news.Title: Is It Too Late to Buy Nvidia Stock?
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) has been one of the best-performing stocks in the market for the past five years, up 1,220% over that period. That has helped it grow to become the largest company in the world , with a market capitalization (market cap) of over $4.1 trillion. Nvidia's rise to the mountaintop is well deserved. The company has just seen explosive growth over the past several years. Its revenue has gone from ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) has grown revenue from $16.7 billion in fiscal 2021 to $215.9 billion last fiscal year, a nearly 13x increase.
• The company's growth is fueled by AI, with its GPUs and CUDA software platform establishing a wide moat.
• Nvidia's networking segment revenue surged 263% to $11 billion last quarter, transforming it into a data center platform company.
• Nvidia continues to evolve by developing LPUs and high-performance Vera CPUs to offer comprehensive AI data center solutions.
news.Keywords: revenue growth, AI, GPUs, CUDA, data center platform

news.Title: Volatility Is Spiking. Here Are 3 Dividend Stocks You Can Buy Without Hesitation.
news.Content: Fear is in the air. Sure, the S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) is holding up pretty well in the face of significant uncertainty. However, implied volatility has risen sharply in recent weeks. Should investors stay away from all stocks with a 10-foot pole? Nope. Here are three dividend stocks you can buy with no hesitation. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article recommends three dividend stocks: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ), PepsiCo (PEP), and Walmart (WMT).
• Johnson & Johnson has a 63-year streak of dividend hikes and a stable healthcare business.
• PepsiCo offers a 3.7% forward dividend yield and has loyal brands that provide pricing power.
• Walmart is considered recession-resistant, with everyday low prices and a 53-year dividend increase streak.
news.Keywords: dividend stocks, consumer staples, healthcare, recession-resistant, dividend growth

news.Title: Americans Are Warming Up to Robotaxis -- and That's Big News for Alphabet and Tesla
news.Content: Would you feel anxious if a car with no driver showed up to take you to your destination? If so, you're not alone. A recent survey conducted by legal firm Murphy & Prachthauser found that 7 in 10 Americans would be at least somewhat apprehensive about riding in an autonomous rideshare vehicle. However, the numbers look much better with people who have actually ridden in a self-driving vehicle. Although ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Americans are warming up to robotaxis, with surveys showing increased comfort after experiencing autonomous rides.
• Alphabet's Waymo has logged over 20 million rides with a 93% customer satisfaction rate and a strong safety record.
• Tesla aims to scale its robotaxi services, leveraging its existing fleet equipped with FSD technology.
• Tesla's vision-only AI approach for autonomous driving could lower costs but may trade off safety compared to Waymo's LiDAR sensors.
news.Keywords: robotaxis, autonomous driving, customer satisfaction, market scaling, AI approach

news.Content: The arrival of artificial intelligence (AI) propelled many technology stocks skyward, but that changed in 2026. Still, the situation creates opportunities for the industrious investor to scoop up shares ...
news.AI_Summary:

• ServiceNow expects Q1 2026 subscription sales to rise 22% year-over-year to around $3.7 billion.
• Salesforce posted record revenue of $11.2 billion for its fiscal Q4 2026, with its Agentforce AI solutions showing strong adoption.

news.Title: 台股主動投資新利器　統一升級50主動式ETF即將開募
news.Content:
財經中心／綜合報導

在台股高檔震盪、個股表現分歧加劇的市場環境下，投資難度明顯升高。單純跟隨 台股加權指數 的被動投資策略，已難以滿足 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 在台股高檔震盪、個股表現分歧加劇的市場環境下，統一投信即將推出「統一台股升級50主動式ETF（00403A）」。
• 該ETF結合市值投資與主動選股策略，鎖定台股大型企業，並發掘具成長潛力的標的。
• 根據彭博與晨星資料，近十年來，表現排名前四分之一的台股主動式基金，展現出顯著的超額報酬能力。
• 00403A以市值前50大企業為核心配置，並將選股範圍延伸至第51至200大企業，預計4月22日至24日募集。
news.Keywords: ETF,主動式管理,市值,選股策略,資產配置

• 展望後市，股市波動仍將高度依賴美伊談判進展，投資人需持續關注談判消息對市場心理的影響。

news.Title: Better Artificial Intelligence Stock: Palantir vs. Oracle
news.Content: The artificial intelligence (AI) industry experienced upheaval in 2026. Wall Street soured on many AI stocks, but this creates opportunities for investors looking at the long term. Two AI businesses to consider investing in are Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) and Oracle (NYSE: ORCL) . The former gained prominence providing data analytics to government intelligence agencies, while the latter began ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Palantir's Q4 2025 revenue increased by 70% year-over-year to $1.4 billion, driven by its Artificial Intelligence Platform (AIP).
• Oracle's fiscal Q3 2026 revenue rose 22% year-over-year to $17.2 billion, with remaining performance obligations (RPO) totaling $553 billion, up 325% YoY.
• Palantir has no debt and total assets of $8.9 billion against $1.4 billion in liabilities at the end of 2025.
• Oracle has accumulated over $130 billion in debt to fund its cloud expansion.
• Despite Palantir's high P/S ratio, its stronger sales growth and financial health make it a preferred AI investment over Oracle.
news.Keywords: AI platform, cloud computing, revenue growth, valuation, balance sheet

news.Title: 【Hot台股】大盤狂漲1416點散戶動彈不得？網憂「川普：愚人節快樂」  專家：保留3成現金為宜

「川普：愚人節快樂」「去年清明節變盤，今年愚人節，都是翻身的機會」「開盤噴千點 收盤愚人節」「大家都變聰明了嗎？量這麼少，都沒人買了喔」「大盤怎麼跟死魚一樣O.O」「台股世界強啊」「小散戶幾 ...

• 永誠國際投顧分析師李忠興指出，此波反彈除了受惠於美股走強或地緣政治降溫，關鍵在於前一日融資大幅減肥，市場浮額已有效清洗。
• 李忠興認為，當前情勢與去年明顯不同，技術面中期趨勢仍偏多，短線若因利空拉回，反而是偏多思考下的布局機會。

news.Title: TSMC plans 3-nanometre chip production launch in Japan in 2028
news.Content: By Wen-Yee Lee TAIPEI, April 1 (Reuters) - TSMC, the world's largest contract chipmaker, is expected to launch ‌equipment installation and mass production of 3-nanometre wafers ...
news.AI_Summary:
• TSMC plans to launch equipment installation and mass production of 3-nanometre chips at its second factory in Japan in 2028.
• The second Japanese fab will have a monthly production capacity of 15,000 12-inch wafers using advanced 3-nanometre process technology.
• Total investment in TSMC's first and second fabs in Japan is expected to exceed $20 billion, with a combined monthly capacity of 100,000 wafers using less advanced technologies.
• TSMC's first fab in Japan began volume production in late 2024.
• Minority investors in TSMC's Japan unit include Sony Semiconductor Solutions Corporation, DENSO Corporation, and Toyota Motor Corporation.
news.Keywords: semiconductor manufacturing, advanced process technology, capital investment, global expansion, supply chain

news.Title: 〈焦點股〉台股重返3萬3 元大00631L分割後爆量強彈逾8%
news.Content: 伊朗總統釋出結束戰爭意願，停戰現曙光帶動全球股市全面回彈，台股今 (1) 日由權值股領軍強彈，大漲近 1400 點，站回 3 萬 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 伊朗總統釋出結束戰爭意願，停戰現曙光帶動全球股市全面回彈，台股今 (1) 日由權值股領軍強彈，大漲近 1400 點，站回 3 萬 3 大關。
• 元大台灣 50 正 2(00631L-TW) 甫完成分割恢復交易，成交金額強勢攻進 ETF 排行榜前三，漲幅飆破 8%。
• 法人表示，00631L 為追蹤台灣 50 指數單日報酬正向 2 倍，具槓桿效果其漲幅、反彈表現比原型 0050 還亮眼。
• 法人指出，目前台股在季線附近獲題材面支撐，若後續美伊兩國訊息保持正向，以目前台股指標企業獲利預估，要再突破新高機率不小。
news.Keywords: ETF,槓桿ETF,股市反彈,權值股,資產配置

news.Title: 中國手機晶片庫存修正，美系外資調降聯發科、京元電、聯電目標價
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者劉居全報導】美系外資在最新出爐的報告中表示，記憶體成本上漲影響中國智慧型手機需求，導致供應鏈訂單削減，根據最新供應鏈調查顯示 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美系外資報告指出，記憶體成本上漲影響中國智慧型手機需求，導致供應鏈訂單削減。
• 聯發科(2454)與高通在內的智慧手機SoC供應商，已開始下修在台積電(2330)4奈米製程的投片訂單，預估減幅達2萬-3萬片晶圓，出貨量下修約1500萬至2000萬顆。
• 美系外資同步調降聯發科、京元電子(2449)、聯電(2303)目標價，其中聯發科目標價由2088元下修至1988元。
• 美系外資強調台積電受影響有限，主要是AI及網通等客戶已快速承接釋出的4奈米產能。
news.Keywords: 手機晶片,庫存修正,外資報告,目標價下修,AI需求

news.Title: 別等3000元才後悔！台積電大狂噴 專家曝1800以下「閉眼買」背後藏寶圖
news.Content: 台積電今（1）日強勢反彈，早盤一度大漲逾4.5%，最高觸及1845元，重新站上季線關卡。不過，昨日台股血洗時，台積電股價暴跌，市場擔憂跌破1700 元，導致許多投資人錯失進場良 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電(2330)股價日前衝上2000元歷史天價後，受地緣政治影響回檔至1800元以下。
• 專家張錫強調公司基本面穩健，直言1800元以下是閉眼買的好時機，預估今年獲利成長四成，股價上看2500元，明年更有機會挑戰3000元。
• 法人預估2026年台積電EPS約為93.74元，以18倍本益比推算，股價落在1700至1800元區間。
• 法人預期2027年EPS將提升至122.26元，2028年上看165.99元，股價有機會達到3300元。
news.Keywords: 台積電,股價分析,AI趨勢,先進製程,長線投資

news.Title: 「不配息0050」009816盤中反彈逾3%！成交量衝7萬張 分析師：等拉回布局再買
news.Content: 受台積電上漲帶動，「不配息0050」009816今（1）日盤中上漲逾3%，股價一度來到10.61元，成交量快速放大至7萬張，啟發 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受台積電上漲帶動，「不配息0050」009816今（1）日盤中上漲逾3%，股價一度來到10.61元，成交量快速放大至7萬張。
• 啟發投顧分析師丁彥鈞認為，長線趨勢不變，操作上宜採「等回檔再買」策略。
• 009816成分股以台積電為核心，台積電目前先進製程需求強勁，產業基本面穩健。
• 丁彥鈞提醒，台積電股價波動多來自資金與消息面，ETF也會受影響，不宜在大漲時追價，應耐心等待下一波拉回再布局。
news.Keywords: ETF,台積電,技術分析,操作策略,拉回布局

• 其中，新光00904、元大0050、富邦0052、國泰00922與凱基009816共4檔高含積量ETF，3月受益人數攀升至歷史新高。

news.Content: 中東戰火有望停火，美股四大指數走揚。台股今（1）日狂漲1300點、重返3萬3。永誠國 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 中東戰火有望停火，美股四大指數走揚。台股今（1）日狂漲1300點、重返3萬3。
• 永誠國際投顧分析師藍登耀表示，今日成交量能呈現溫和上漲，籌碼面有助於後續的續航，且今日上漲盤勢有望延續到明日。
• 藍登耀認為，接下來包含記憶體、載板等族群都還是有機會存在，尤其在報價上漲的助力下，後續機會都還是存在。
• 他強調，今日的強勢格局應該是能從頭維持到尾，甚至明天都還有機會續漲，今日仍算是適當的介入點。

news.Title: 台積電回檔1800！專家：「閉眼買」明年衝3字頭
news.Content:
財經中心／李筱舲報導

台積電（2330）股價日前衝上2000元歷史天價後，受地緣政治影響回檔至1800元以下，引發市場震盪。對此，「多頭總司令」前國泰投信董事長張錫強調公司基本面穩健，直言1800 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電（2330）股價日前衝上2000元歷史天價後，受地緣政治影響回檔至1800元以下。
• 專家張錫強調公司基本面穩健，直言1800元以下是閉眼買的好時機，預估今年獲利成長四成，股價上看2500元，明年更有機會挑戰3000元。
• 摩爾投顧分析師江國中認為，此波修正屬於漲多後的技術性整理，法人對未來幾年的獲利預估，暗藏著「3000 元台積電」的入場券。
• 法人預期2027年EPS將提升至122.26元，2028年上看165.99元，股價有機會達到3300元。
news.Keywords: 台積電,股價分析,AI趨勢,先進製程,長線投資

news.Title: SEMI論壇解析矽光子量產關鍵，台積電積光電異質整合堆疊今年量產
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】SEMI國際半導體產業協會，透過旗下SEMI矽光子產業聯盟（SEMI Silicon Photonics Industry Alliance, SiPhIA）舉辦「矽光 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SEMI論壇解析矽光子量產關鍵，台積電(2330)COUPE平台的電子積體電路與光子積體電路進行異質整合堆疊，預計按計劃將於今年進入量產階段。
• 隨著AI算力需求持續爆發，資料中心對高速光互連架構的需求急遽攀升，預測2026年矽光子模組銷售佔比將超過五成。
• 台積電先進封裝整合四處處長侯上勇表示，CPO技術推進需要供應鏈各環節協同創新。
• 台積電期待透過SiPhIA的跨企業協作框架，與產業夥伴共同推進矽光子封裝技術標準建立與量產落地。
news.Keywords: 台積電,矽光子,AI數據中心,先進封裝,CPO

news.Title: 威盛：微捷創研與華立捷進行股份轉換案，基準日暫訂為6/16
news.Content:

(2388)威盛-代子公司微捷創研及華立捷公告董事會決議股份轉換案

1.併購種類(如合併、分割、收購或股份受讓):代子公司公告股份轉換

2.事實發生日:115/3/31

3.參與併購公司名稱(如合併另一方公司、分 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 威盛(2388)代子公司微捷創研及華立捷公告董事會決議股份轉換案，預計6月16日為基準日。
• 本次股份轉換案為子公司間依據企業併購法等相關法令，由微捷創研增發新股，以股份轉換方式取得華立捷全部已發行股份。
• 併購目的為加強雙方更緊密的運作以提高綜效，整合雙方資源、發揮規模經濟綜效，並提供客戶更完整供應鏈服務。
• 換股比例為微捷創研每1股普通股交換華立捷普通股4股，會計師評估交換比例尚屬合理。
news.Keywords: 併購,股份轉換,子公司,綜效,供應鏈

news.Title: 3 Tech Stocks That Are Growing Revenue Faster Than Nvidia
news.Content: Nvidia has become the most notable stock success story in the current artificial intelligence (AI) boom. Last year, the company had reported several quarters of triple-digit revenue growth, a notable accomplishment for a company with a $4 trillion market cap. Even in the current quarter, revenue grew by an astounding 73% from a year ago. This feat is difficult to match even for much smaller companies ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology reported $23.9 billion in revenue for fiscal Q2 2026, a 196% growth rate, driven by high-bandwidth memory (HBM) for AI applications.
• Analysts predict 191% revenue growth for Micron in the current fiscal year, with its stock up 260% over the last year.
• CoreWeave's Q4 revenue reached almost $1.6 billion, a 110% increase, driven by its AI-native cloud platform, with a backlog of $67 billion.
• Nebius Group's Q4 revenue of $228 million saw a 547% increase, driven by its AI-focused cloud platform.
• While Nebius Group has a strong financial position with $3.8 billion in cash and $4.1 billion in debt, its P/S ratio of 41 and recent stock surge may limit near-term upside.
news.Keywords: revenue growth, AI infrastructure, memory chips, cloud platform, valuation

news.Title: Kioxia部分產線EOL釋出，華邦電和旺宏可望受益
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】記憶體大廠Kioxia於2026年3月31日發布EOL（產品終止供應）通知，宣布將停止供 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 記憶體大廠Kioxia於2026年3月31日發布EOL通知，將停止供應包括15奈米、24奈米與32奈米的製程，及BiCS Flash第三代在內的多項NAND Flash產品。
• SLC等的台資NAND晶片供應商華邦電(2344)和旺宏(2337)，將可受益。
• Kioxia此舉是為將資源集中於更高層數3D NAND與先進產品。
• 華邦電與旺宏主攻SLC等非高階NAND晶片，Kioxia退出意味著供應減少，晶片報價可望因產出減少而上漲。
news.Keywords: 記憶體,NAND Flash,EOL,華邦電,旺宏

news.Content:

• 月產能達15,000片的12吋晶圓，預計自2028年開始進行設備安裝設定及開始晶圓量產。

news.Title: AI Data Centers Are Choking on Memory: Is Micron a Buy After Its Monster Run?
news.Content: Shares of Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) have soared over the past year due to a shortage of high-performance memory for data centers. The company could see strong financial performance over the next few years, as demand remains well above supply. The key question investors need to answer before buying Micron today is whether ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron's revenue tripled year-over-year to nearly $24 billion in the recent quarter, with earnings per share rising to $12.07 from $1.41.
• AI computing systems require advanced memory, and the industry is currently unable to meet demand, with Micron fulfilling only 50-67% of customer requests.
• The memory shortage is expected to persist through the end of 2026 and into next year, supporting higher earnings.
• Demand for memory is also growing in consumer devices and emerging applications like humanoid robots.
• Analysts project earnings per share to climb to $58 in fiscal 2026 and $98 in fiscal 2027, before potentially declining to $77 in fiscal 2028, indicating potential cyclicality.
news.Keywords: memory shortage, AI demand, revenue growth, gross margin, cyclical risk

news.Content: Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) has emerged as a major beneficiary of rising U.S. defense spending. However, investors need to assess this opportunity in the context of the company's valuation. Congress has already approved a $901 billion U.S. ...

• Palantir's U.S. commercial revenue grew 109% year-over-year to around $1.4 billion in fiscal 2025.

news.Title: Warren Buffett Made a $19.8 Billion Bet and It's Not on AI
news.Content: In his last quarter as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRKB) , legendary investor Warren Buffett made one very large buy. But he didn't buy shares of his largest position Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) , or his longtime holding Bank of America (NYSE: BAC) , or one of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Warren Buffett increased Berkshire Hathaway's stake in Chevron to $19.8 billion by investing over $1 billion.
• Chevron's share price lagged the S&P 500 in 2025, but has since risen 37% year-to-date in 2026.
• The increase in Chevron's stock price is attributed to potential opportunities in Venezuela and soaring global energy prices due to the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.
• Berkshire Hathaway has seen a 58% return on its latest Chevron investment in less than six months.
• Buffett also sold shares of Apple, Bank of America, and Amazon.
news.Keywords: energy sector, strategic investment, commodity prices, portfolio allocation, stock performance

news.Title: Duos Technologies Group Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
news.Content: Key Points Strategic pivot: New CEO Doug Recker said Duos will "completely divest the rail division" within ~60 days and is now fully dedicated to the data center market via its Duos Edge and Duos Technology Solutions units to free resources and cut SG&A. Commercial scale-up: After $45M and $65M capital raises, Duos says it has procured/manufactured 15 edge data centers and will deploy ~2,300 GPUs, including a GPU-as-a-Service contract for 2,304 NVIDIA GPUs expected to generate about $176M over 36 months and a 4.8 MW high-power colocation deal for a hyperscaler. Financial momentum: 2025 revenue rose to roughly $27M ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Duos Technologies Group (DUOT) is strategically pivoting to the data center market, divesting its rail division.
• The company procured/manufactured 15 edge data centers, deploying ~2,300 GPUs, including a $176M GPU-as-a-Service contract with Nvidia.
• 2025 revenue rose ~270% YoY to $27M with a 29% gross margin.
• Duos guided 2026 revenue of $50–$55M and has a pipeline of over $150 million for its new Technology Solutions division.
news.Keywords: data center, GPU deployment, revenue growth, strategic pivot, AI infrastructure

news.Title: Nvidia’s stock split history: Everything you need to know
news.Content: Companies conduct stock splits to allow investors to purchase their shares at a more affordable price. Tech giant and Magnificent 7 leader Nvidia is no exception, having split its stock several times in the more than 25 years it’s been a publicly traded company. If demand for the AI processing leader's shares continues to increase, pushing its stock price up further in the years to come, Nvidia may have to conduct more stock splits. Here’s a history of Nvidia’s stock splits, and a look at how high its share price would be today had it not multiplied ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia has conducted six stock splits in its history, with the most recent being a 10-for-1 split in June 2024.
• Stock splits increase the number of shares available for trading and make the stock more affordable for individual investors.
• Nvidia's stock price would be significantly higher today without these splits.
• Splits can also affect dividends per share and provide flexibility for employee stock options and buybacks.
news.Keywords: stock split, share price, affordability, investor access, corporate actions

news.Title: Mega-cap dividend stock targets $9 trillion valuation
news.Content: Meta Platforms recently disclosed a new stock option plan for its top executives that won't pay out unless the company's market cap skyrockets from roughly $1.36 trillion to $9 trillion by 2031 . That would make Meta worth more than twice Nvidia 's value , currently the world's most valuable company at around $4.1 trillion. For dividend stock investors watching Meta, the new plan provides a signal about where the company is betting its future and how confident it is getting there. Meta's executive compensation plan: the $9 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms (META) has a new stock option plan for executives tied to a market cap target of $9 trillion by 2031.
• This plan signals Meta's confidence in massive future success, potentially making it worth more than twice Nvidia's current value.
• Meta initiated its first-ever dividend in early 2024 and estimates 2026 dividend per share at $2.24, with a 12.6% CAGR through 2030.
• Free cash flow is projected to drop 75.1% in 2026 due to AI infrastructure investments but is expected to more than double by 2028.
news.Keywords: market cap, executive compensation, dividend, free cash flow, AI infrastructure

news.Title: 主動台股ETF打敗大盤 專家：市場短線波動 可留意低接機會
news.Content: 台股3月下挫3,643點，修正幅度達10.42%，不過；採取主動選股策略的主動台股ETF表現都優於大盤指數，其中，有四檔主動式台股ETF跌幅在3%以內，包括：主動統一台股增 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 儘管3月台股指數下挫10.42%，但主動式台股ETF表現優於大盤，其中統一台股增長、台新優勢成長及第一金台股優等ETF今年第一季漲幅達13%-17%。
• 專家指出，科技產業持續推動投資週期，雲端服務公司加碼AI基礎設施，預計今年美國四大CSP資本支出將達6,176億美元，年增約六成，台灣電子產業在高階晶片、伺服器等供應鏈具優勢。
• 預期至2027年前，台灣電子業將持續受惠雲端資本支出循環，營運能見度高、獲利動能強；AI強勁需求延續，預估今、明年台股企業獲利分別成長三成及兩成。
• 專家認為，台股指數短期修正幅度較大，但市場對算力需求不變，美伊戰爭帶來的波動反而提供低接機會；歷史數據顯示，台股大跌後長期而言多數轉為正報酬。
news.Keywords: 主動ETF,AI基礎設施,雲端支出,獲利成長,逢低接

news.Title: Nvidia’s $2 billion bet reveals its next big target
news.Content: Nvidia ( NVDA ) started as a video game chipmaker, but became so much more thanks to smart investments. Today, along with GPUs, it makes CPUs, networking equipment, and AI inference accelerators. According to the company’s 10-K form , in fiscal year 2026, its networking revenue totaled $31.4 billion. That was a pretty big jump from $13 billion in 2025. The form states: “Revenue from Data Center networking grew 142%, driven by the introduction and continued ramp of NVLink compute fabric for GB200 and GB300 systems and the growth of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia invested $2 billion in Lumentum Holdings (LITE) and Coherent Corp. (COHR), both networking companies focused on silicon photonics.
• Nvidia's networking revenue totaled $31.4 billion in fiscal year 2026, a significant jump from $13 billion in 2025.
• Nvidia is strengthening its position in silicon photonics through partnerships and investments to compete with Broadcom.
• Nvidia also partnered with Marvell Technology (MRVL), investing $2 billion and integrating Marvell's custom AI accelerators into Nvidia's NVLink Fusion platform.
news.Keywords: silicon photonics, networking, investment, strategic partnership, AI infrastructure

• OpenAI is generating $2 billion in revenue per month, growing four times faster than Google parent Alphabet and Meta.
• The funding round was led by Amazon ($50B), Nvidia ($30B), and SoftBank ($30B), with participation from Microsoft.
• The capital will fund OpenAI's data-center buildout, estimated at $600 billion by 2030.

news.Title: Ignore the Panic and Buy the Dip in Micron Stock, Says Bank of America
news.Content: Micron Technology (MU) has found itself caught in a familiar market pattern — a knee-jerk reaction to a change in the way we think about a particular type of technology. In this case, the recent introduction of TurboQuant from Alphabet (GOOGL) — a program that promises to cut memory usage in half — is presenting AI efficiency fears. While this may initially be seen as a negative for memory and storage-related companies as a whole, if ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Bank of America analysts suggest AI capital expenditures are driving memory usage, countering fears of efficiency gains from new technologies like Alphabet's TurboQuant.
• Micron's stock has fallen 28% from its 52-week high and 15% in the last five days, presenting a potential buying opportunity.
• Micron reported exceptional Q2 fiscal 2026 results with revenue of $23.86 billion (up from $8.05 billion YoY) and GAAP EPS of $12.07 (up from $1.41 YoY).
• Gross margins exceeded 74% in the most recent quarter, and the data-center segment revenue more than doubled to almost $5.7 billion.
• Memory is now considered a strategic, structural asset in AI infrastructure, with no signs of weakening demand due to efficiency gains.
news.Keywords: memory market, AI capex, stock valuation, gross margin, structural demand

news.Title: 1 AI Software Stock That Can Outperform Palantir Over the Next Year
news.Content: Few software stocks have matched Palantir 's (NASDAQ: PLTR) performance over the last few years. The company has seen its share price soar as it incorporated large language models into its software, advanced its data ontology framework, and won bigger government contracts. While Palantir's stock has been caught up in the broader sell-off among SaaS stocks , the company looks fairly resilient. Even so, investors should always be on the lookout for even better opportunities. And one software stock could come roaring back much faster than Palantir in 2026. Will AI create the world's ...
news.AI_Summary:

• Palantir's revenue grew 70% year-over-year in Q4, with an adjusted operating margin of 57%.

news.Title: Nvidia investors just had a surprising first quarter
news.Content: Reminder: A stock doesn't rise over time without encountering a few speed bumps along the way. And that includes AI chipmaker Nvidia ( NVDA ). news.AI_Summary:

• Despite a solid GTC conference, investors reacted with a 'sell the news' sentiment, questioning Nvidia's premium valuation.

• Analysts note continued uncertainty around the growth trajectory for Nvidia's data center business in 2027.
news.Keywords: stock performance, AI inference, valuation concerns, data center growth, market sentiment

news.Title: North Korea-linked hack hits largely invisible software that powers online services
news.Content: By AJ Vicens March 31 (Reuters) - Hackers linked to North Korea breached behind-the-scenes software that runs many common online functions in an effort to steal login information that could ‌enable further cyber operations, Google said on Tuesday. The hackers ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Hackers linked to North Korea breached Axios, a behind-the-scenes software used by many online functions, to steal login information.
• The breach occurred via a malicious software update, representing a supply chain attack.
• Google attributed the attack to UNC1069, a group known for targeting cryptocurrency and financial industries.
• The malicious software could infect macOS, Windows, and Linux systems, potentially reaching millions of environments.
news.Keywords: cybersecurity, supply chain attack, data breach, North Korea, malware

news.Title: 外資殺瘋 台股3月爆六大黑歷史
news.Content: 台股修正壓力未歇，3月上演跳水秀，苦寫六大黑歷史，包括月線重挫3,691點，寫史上最大跌點，終止連三紅，且單月成交量爆出17.96兆元新高，外資賣超9,682.13億元最多，上市櫃市值單月蒸發12.14兆元，股民單月平均虧87.0 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股3月修正壓力未歇，寫下月線重挫3,691點（史上最大跌點）、外資賣超9,682.13億元（單月最多）、上市櫃市值蒸發12.14兆元等六大黑歷史。
• 外資3月大舉提款9,682億元，創單月新高，有「殺瘋了」跡象；自營商3月賣超2,235.77億元，創史上單月最多。
• 三大法人合計3月拋售1.09兆元，為台股史上首度單月賣超破兆元紀錄；八大公股行庫3月買超2,211.11億元護盤，寫下單月買超最多。
• 專家預期4月調節壓力將緩解，基本面強勁帶動下，有機會穩住市場信心；AI、半導體等長期趨勢未變，短線震盪有助籌碼沉澱與估值修正。
news.Keywords: 台股修正,外資賣超,史上紀錄,公股護盤,AI趨勢

news.Title: 主動台股ETF 買氣熱
news.Content: 儘管市場動盪，但AI趨動的科技股浪潮推波助瀾下，今年2月台灣人持有基 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受AI趨動的科技股浪潮推波助瀾，今年2月台灣人持有基金規模再攀新高，來到17兆5,859億元，月增逾6,500億元。
• 整體境內境外基金買氣呈現淨流入。
• 其中，主動式台股ETF基金規模與增幅表現更為吸睛，到2026年2月底，規模達1,871億元，月增幅21.24％。
• 今年以來獲准或申報生效的基金中，七檔為主動式ETF基金，涵蓋美國科技、台股、高息和全球市場等類型。
news.Keywords: 基金規模,主動式ETF,AI科技股,淨流入,資產配置

news.Title: 11檔台股ETF 受益人暴增
news.Content: 今年以來台股走勢呈現高檔震盪、結構分化格局。在AI產業持續擴張與半導體供應鏈接單動能強勁帶動下，加權指數一度挑戰歷史高點，電子族群仍為盤面主軸，但隨著國際資金調節、主要央行政策反覆，以及 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 今年以來台股高檔震盪，儘管國際資金調節、地緣政治風險升溫，市場波動加劇，但ETF受益人數變化顯示資金逢震盪進場趨勢明確。
• 第一季共有11檔台股ETF受益人數增加逾萬人，以市值型與科技型ETF最受青睞，如元大台灣50（0050）、富邦科技（0052）、群益台灣精選高息（00919）、國泰台灣科技龍頭（00881）。
• 富邦科技ETF（0052）受益人數單季大幅增加逾17萬人，成長率達65.5％，反映市場對科技與AI題材的高度認同。
• 專家認為，AI產業發展方向明確，未來兩至三年AI資本支出維持高度成長已形成共識，台灣半導體供應鏈可望持續受惠。
news.Keywords: ETF受益人數,市值型ETF,科技型ETF,AI供應鏈,逢低布局

news.Title: 輝達Rubin改版不減量 台積接單穩
news.Content: 輝達（NVIDIA）新一代AI GPU「Rubin Ultra」傳出因量產與封裝難度考量，設計可能由市場預期的4顆GPU晶粒下修至2顆。供應鏈指出，目前晶圓 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達新一代AI GPU「Rubin Ultra」傳出因量產與封裝難度考量，設計可能由4顆GPU晶粒下修至2顆。
• 供應鏈指出，目前晶圓代工端規劃以雙晶粒（2-die）版本為主，但並未影響台積電整體投片規模，AI晶片需求仍維持強勁。
• 業者指出，Rubin投片節奏調整，輝達提高Blackwell世代投片比重，此變動反映產品架構優化與產能配置調整，對台積電營運影響有限。
• 業界分析，雙晶粒方案有助提升封裝成功率，並釋放部分產能轉供其他AI GPU或ASIC客戶，有利於台積電維持高稼動率。
news.Keywords: 輝達GPU,Rubin Ultra,台積電,投片規模,先進製程

news.Title: 台積電COUPE 預計今年量產
news.Content:
AI資料中心對高速互連需求爆發，矽光子技術邁入商轉關鍵期。SEMI國際半導體產業協會31日透過旗下矽光子產業聯盟 SiPhIA舉辦論壇，聚焦量產挑戰。

台積電指出，旗下 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AI資料中心對高速互連需求爆發，矽光子技術邁入商轉關鍵期，台積電旗下矽光子整合平台COUPE預計今年進入量產。
• 台積電COUPE平台透過SoIC技術將電子積體電路與光子積體電路進行異質整合堆疊，可大幅縮短訊號傳輸距離並降低功耗。
• SEMI引用產業數據預測，2026年矽光子模組在光收發器市場占比將突破五成，顯示光互連技術已由前瞻研發走向主流部署。
• 業界分析，台灣廠有機會從晶圓製造延伸至光電整合與測試驗證，提升整體供應鏈價值。
news.Keywords: 矽光子,COUPE平台,SoIC技術,高速互連,資料中心

news.Title: 獲利、績效紅不讓 台積電、緯穎創佳績
news.Content: 上市櫃公司去年度財報全數出爐，「護國神山」台積電（2330）再創佳績，再度同時拿下去年獲利王與現金王；績效王則由緯穎（6669）奪得，打敗蟬聯多年的大立光 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電去年全年稅後純益以1兆7,178億元、年增46％穩居獲利王；緯穎以全年EPS 275.06元奪得績效王。
• 受惠AI與先進製程需求強勁，台積電去年第四季合併營收首度突破兆元大關，全年EPS攀升至66.25元新高。
• 儘管基本面亮眼，台積電仍受中東戰事影響，股價跌破季線至1,760元；本土投顧維持樂觀看法，上調今年EPS預估至100元，目標價看至3,000元。
• 台積電去年現金及約當現金2.76兆元再度衛冕現金王；鴻海去年第四季營收創歷史新高，但獲利略低於預期。
news.Keywords: 獲利王,現金王,績效王,AI需求,先進製程

news.Title: 算力需求爆發 Foundry 2.0加速 台積市占續揚
news.Content: AI算力需求持續爆發，帶動全球半導體製造鏈全面升溫。研調機構IDC最新報告指出，在生成式AI與代理式AI（Agentic AI）應用推動下，推理端算力需求快速擴張，「Fo ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AI算力需求持續爆發，IDC預估2026年廣義晶圓代工2.0市場規模將突破3,600億美元，年增17%，台積電今年市占率有望進一步推升至44%。
• IDC資深研究經理分析，2026年半導體製造產業進入AI主導的穩健擴張週期，先進製程與先進封裝持續供不應求。
• 台積電持續擴充3奈米與2奈米產能，並放大CoWoS先進封裝產出，透過先進製程與封裝整合能力，成為AI算力供應鏈核心樞紐。
• 三星方面，隨SF2製程良率改善，營運動能亦見改善；英特爾製程進度加速，18A製程邁入量產，積極爭取外部客戶。
news.Keywords: AI算力,Foundry 2.0,晶圓代工,市占率,先進製程

news.Title: 15悍將EPS雙飆高 投信卡位
news.Content: 上市櫃公司去（2025）年獲利踩油門，衝上4.51兆元新高，個股中去年第四季及全年每股稅後純益（EPS）雙寫歷史新高約有66檔，進一步篩選投信3月買盤卡位 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 去年第四季及全年每股稅後純益（EPS）雙寫歷史新高的約有66檔個股，其中投信3月買盤著墨15檔，包含台積電、奇鋐、健策、旺矽等。
• 這15檔個股主要聚焦在AI股及記憶體股，都是未來長線趨勢股，今年獲利仍有機會持續向上。
• 美國四大雲端服務供應商（CSP）廠今年資本支出預計較去年成長6成，AI訂單能見度高。

news.Title: 多頭總司令張錫：台積1,800元以下閉眼買
news.Content: 中東戰事不休，台股31日失守32,000點，台積電也跌破季線收1,760元。有「多頭總司令」之稱的東海大學財金系客座教授張錫指出，台積電今年有望到2,500元、明年上看3 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 「多頭總司令」張錫認為，台積電今年有望到2,500元、明年上看3,000元，預估明年EPS 120元，以25倍本益比來看，股價3字頭合理。
• 張錫認為，儘管美伊戰爭短線紛擾，但台灣基本面不錯，AI剛性需求強勁，台積電跌到1,800元以下可閉眼買。
• 他指出，台灣科技業已能創造價值，毛利拉高，本益比自然也拉高，AI時代資金更高度集中在具成長性的龍頭公司。
• 張錫認為，台灣在台積電主導下，具備矽光子（CPO）供應鏈優勢，未來可能出現亞太區整合情境。
news.Keywords: 台積電目標價,AI需求,矽光子,本益比,龍頭股

news.Title: Market Volatility Is Spiking. Here's Exactly What Long-Term Investors Should Do.
news.Content: If it seems like the stock market has seen more volatility recently, you are not imagining things. The CBOE Volatility Index (VOLATILITYINDICES: ^VIX) , or VIX for short , has spiked to above 30 a few times in the past month. The index is widely referred to as a fear gauge, or the fear index, and it measures investor sentiment. The VIX, which was created in 1993, is actually based on option prices. The index looks at a swath of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) has spiked above 30, indicating investor anxiety.
• Historically, a VIX reading of 40 or above has signaled a good time to buy stocks, with the S&P 500 up over 90% of the time a year later.
• Long-term investors should continue dollar-cost averaging into major stock index funds.
• Investors with cash on the sidelines may find opportunities as the Nasdaq-100 is in correction territory and the S&P 500 is close behind.
news.Keywords: volatility, VIX, investor sentiment, market correction, dollar-cost averaging

news.Title: Prediction: This Will Be Alphabet's Stock Price in 5 Years
news.Content: Obviously, nobody owns a functioning crystal ball. And as the old adage goes, past performance is no guarantee of future results. Still, with a bit of well-reasoned conjecture, a company's past and present can paint a reasonably good picture of what's likely ahead. To this end, here's my prediction of what Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) stock's price will ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (GOOGL) stock price prediction assumes a trailing-12-month P/E ratio around 25 and a net profit margin of 30%.
• Revenue growth is projected to remain at 15% annually, led by cloud computing but slowed by advertising headwinds.
• Based on these assumptions, Alphabet's revenue could reach $800 billion by 2030, with net income of $240 billion, pushing the stock price to over $500.
• A faster AI adoption or commercial quantum computing offering could potentially drive the stock price closer to $560.
news.Keywords: stock price prediction, P/E ratio, revenue growth, AI, cloud computing

news.Title: Investment blogger warns about Micron stock after massive run
news.Content: Micron ( MU ) stock has rocketed over 300% in the past year on the back of AI-driven demand, even after falling over 30% following its mid-March earnings report . The company is delivering strong results in one of the tightest memory markets in years. Pricing is rising, margins are expanding, and demand remains strong across key end markets. That's got most Wall Street analysts bullish. Despite recent weakness, no major sell-side investment firms have sell ratings on Micron stock, according to TipRanks , and the average 12-month price target is $533, up 67%. Still, after a massive run, one ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron (MU) stock has risen over 300% in the past year, despite a recent 30% fall after its earnings report.
• The company is experiencing strong results in a tight memory market with rising prices and expanding margins.
• One blogger warns that expectations for Micron may have gone too far, even with favorable industry conditions.
• Micron reported record Q2 revenue of $23.86 billion with a 69.0% non-GAAP operating margin, and guided for Q3 revenue of $33.5 billion with an 81% gross margin.
news.Keywords: memory market, stock performance, earnings report, analyst expectations, semiconductor

news.Title: Wall Street resets Amazon stock price targets on AWS AI trends
news.Content: Amazon stock is down about 11% year-to-date, but Wall Street is starting to lean more bullish again. The shift comes as AWS growth reaccelerates, driven by strong demand for AI workloads. At the same time, Amazon’s advertising business continues to scale into a larger profit driver, giving the company a stronger long-term earnings base. That’s what makes the stock interesting right now. Amazon is pulling its business in two directions at once. Demand across cloud and AI is clearly strengthening, but the company is also preparing to spend heavily to support that growth. Amazon valuation snapshot Market cap: $2.14 trillion ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon stock is down 11% year-to-date, but Wall Street is becoming more bullish due to reaccelerating AWS growth driven by AI workloads.
• Citi and JPMorgan raised Amazon price targets to $285 and $280 respectively, expecting AWS to grow 28-37% in 2026-2027.
• AWS revenue rose 24% YoY in Q4 2025 to $35.6 billion, with operating margin at 35.0%.
• Amazon plans to spend roughly $200 billion in 2026 capital expenditures on AI infrastructure, impacting free cash flow.
news.Keywords: AWS growth, AI workloads, capital expenditure, price target, cloud computing

The core observation is that NVDA is now trading at a forward price-to-earnings ratio below the S&P 500 for the first time in more than a decade, even as the company continues to deliver some of the strongest earnings growth in the index. According to the Goldman Sachs trading desk note, Nvidia is trading at approximately 19.7 times forward earnings. The S&P ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Goldman Sachs notes a significant disconnect: Nvidia (NVDA) trades at a forward P/E below the S&P 500 for the first time in over a decade.
• Nvidia's Q4 revenue was $68.1 billion (up 73% YoY), with Data Center revenue at $62.3 billion (up 75% YoY).
• The valuation compression reflects broader repricing of high-growth tech stocks due to macro forces like interest rates and geopolitical tensions.
• Nvidia sees at least $1 trillion in purchase orders for Blackwell and Vera Rubin chips through 2027, and guided for $78 billion in Q1 revenue.
news.Keywords: valuation disconnect, P/E ratio, revenue growth, macro factors, AI infrastructure

news.Title: Elon Musk reveals 'plus side' of quantum computing breaking Bitcoin
news.Content: The world’s wealthiest person, Elon Musk , is known for his deep interest in Bitcoin (BTC) and rarely holds back from sharing his views whenever the topic comes up. So when Google issued a new warning about the potential threat quantum computing poses to Bitcoin, he quickly responded with ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Google warns that quantum computers could crack Bitcoin cryptography by 2029, potentially enabling theft of crypto assets.
• A quantum system could crack a real-time Bitcoin transaction in about nine minutes, requiring fewer qubits than previously estimated.
• Google recommends transitioning to post-quantum cryptography (PQC) to address these threats.
• Elon Musk commented that a 'plus side' of quantum computing is that forgotten wallet passwords could become accessible in the future.
news.Keywords: quantum computing, Bitcoin, cryptography, cybersecurity, crypto assets

news.Title: Has Salesforce split its stock? CRM's stock split history explained

news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: Trump Tax Law’s Affordable Housing Boost Hits Snag
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- The US government’s largest affordable housing program was supposed to be supercharged by President Donald Trump’s signature tax law. So far, that jolt hasn’t arrived. That’s because, investors and developers say, their efforts to take advantage of the dramatic expansion of the Low-Income Housing Tax Credit have bumped up against some unintended consequences. In particular, the law increased the potential size of any given affordable housing development deal eligible for the credit – but that, in turn, means few banks are able to finance them under the complex rules of the program. “The market has slowed pretty ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The US government's affordable housing program faces challenges due to unintended consequences of a tax law.
• Banks face limitations on financing large affordable housing deals due to caps on 'public welfare investments'.
• Proposed legislation aims to raise these caps, but its passage is uncertain.
• The lack of financing is stalling the development of new affordable housing units.
news.Keywords: Affordable Housing, Tax Credits, Financial Regulations, Housing Development, Investment Caps

news.Title: Unlocking Intrinsic Value: Analysis of Meta Platforms Inc
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . In this article, we will take a look into Meta Platforms Inc's ( NASDAQ:META ) DCF analysis, a reliable and data-driven approach to estimating its intrinsic value. Instead of using future free cash flow as in the traditional DCF model, the GuruFocus DCF calculator uses EPS without NRI as the default for the DCF model based on research that shows that historically stock prices have been more correlated with earnings than free cash ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms Inc.'s intrinsic value, calculated by GuruFocus's DCF model, is estimated at $730.56, suggesting it is modestly undervalued at its current trading price of $536.38.
• The DCF model uses EPS without NRI and a two-stage growth approach, with a 10-year growth stage at 22.70% and a terminal stage at 4%.
• A traditional DCF model based on free cash flow estimates the intrinsic value at $560.10, indicating fair valuation with a 4.23% margin of safety.
• The model's accuracy depends on various assumptions and projections about future earnings potential and growth rates.
news.Keywords: DCF Analysis, Intrinsic Value, Valuation Model, Margin of Safety, Financial Projections

• The Nasdaq 100 is in correction territory, trading at 21 times projected 12-month profits, a narrow gap with the S&P 500.
• Energy stocks have gained 39% year-to-date, benefiting from soaring oil prices due to the Iran war.
news.Keywords: Market Correction, Tech Sector Decline, Geopolitical Impact, Energy Stocks, AI Disruption

news.Title: This Monopoly Stock Powers Every AI Chip on the Planet, and It's Down Over 14% This Month
news.Content: It's rare to find a company that has a true monopoly on its industry. It's even rarer when that company has no meaningful competition in any form ready to break into the market and claim some of it. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue » And it's rarer still when that company isn't ...
news.AI_Summary:
• ASML Holding N.V. (ASML) is the sole provider of EUV lithography machines essential for producing advanced semiconductors used in AI.
• ASML's machines are critical for chip manufacturers producing 7nm or smaller semiconductors.
• The company is innovating its EUV technology, planning to boost machine power by 50% by the end of the decade.
• ASML's net bookings more than doubled in Q4 2025, indicating high and accelerating demand for its machines.
news.Keywords: EUV Lithography, Semiconductor Manufacturing, AI Chips, Market Monopoly, Demand Growth

news.Title: Trump’s Tax Cut Delivers at Least $65 Billion Windfall to Corporations
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Some of the country’s wealthiest corporations are calculating they owe far less to the Internal Revenue Service as a result of President Donald Trump’s overhauled tax code, underscoring how a law billed as a middle‑class cut also turned out to be a big win for Corporate America. Nearly a dozen of the 50 biggest US-listed companies attributed a drop in federal cash income taxes last year as a direct result of Trump’s $3.4 trillion sweeping tax law, according to a Bloomberg analysis of regulatory filings. In all, annual corporate tax revenues dropped by $65 billion following the law’s ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon.com Inc. saw a significant drop in federal cash income taxes in 2025, owing $2.8 billion down from over $7 billion in prior years.
• The company attributes this decrease to Trump's tax law, which it expects to continue reducing cash taxes in 2026.
• The tax law provided benefits across various sectors, including Big Tech, retailers, and manufacturers, through deductions and special preferences.
• Corporate tax revenues dropped by $65 billion annually following the law's passage.
news.Keywords: Tax Law Impact, Corporate Taxes, Tax Reduction, Regulatory Filings, Fiscal Policy

news.Title: This Unstoppable Vanguard ETF Is Beating the S&P 500, the Nasdaq-100, and the Dow Jones in 2026
news.Content: The U.S. stock market is off to a difficult start to 2026. Ongoing geopolitical tensions in the Middle East have sent the price of oil soaring, which is creating economic instability and clouding the earnings picture for corporate America. As a result, the S&P 500 , the Nasdaq-100 , and the Dow Jones Industrial Average have each suffered year-to-date declines of more than 5% so far. However, another index is bucking the losses to trade flat for the year. The Russell 2000 is home to approximately 2,000 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Vanguard Russell 2000 ETF (VTWO) is trading flat for the year, outperforming the S&P 500, Nasdaq-100, and Dow Jones.
• Small-cap stocks in the Russell 2000 are more insulated from global conflicts due to their domestic focus.
• The ETF's diversification and low weighting of top holdings (5.6%) contribute to steadier returns compared to concentrated indexes.
• Companies like Bloom Energy and Credo Technology within the ETF have shown significant stock price appreciation due to strong demand in their respective sectors.
news.Keywords: Small-Cap Stocks, ETF Performance, Diversification, Market Insulation, Sector Demand

news.Title: This Is the Cheapest "Magnificent Seven" Stock Right Now. Is it a Value Play or Value Trap?
news.Content: The once seemingly invincible "Magnificent Seven" stocks have not fared well this year. The Roundhill Magnificent Seven ETF has fallen by more than 9%, underperforming the broader market. Investors may see this as a buying opportunity, given that most still see immense potential with artificial intelligence (AI). But one should never buy a stock or an exchange-traded fund (ETF) simply because it is down. Valuation is also important. This is the cheapest Magnificent Seven stock right now. Is it a value play or a value trap? Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms (META) has the lowest valuation among the Magnificent Seven, trading at less than 20 times forward earnings.
• Meta projects significant capex in 2026 ($115-$135 billion) to support AI infrastructure, including third-party cloud providers and data centers.
• Investors are concerned about Zuckerberg's tendency to make large, potentially undisciplined bets on new technologies.
• Meta's ad revenue grew 24% YoY in 2025, with AI expected to enhance ad targeting and engagement.
news.Keywords: Magnificent Seven, Valuation Analysis, AI Capex, Advertising Revenue, Investment Discipline

news.Title: Got $3,000? 2 Cloud Stocks That Wall Street Analysts Raised Targets on This Month.
news.Content: Cloud computing stocks have been an interesting case this year. Although demand for cloud computing continues to surge, many of the stocks in this industry have sputtered. One of the reasons is the stocks have become too expensive and overvalued after three years of bull market gains. But there are other reasons specific to cloud stocks. Many are dealing with capacity constraints to handle the high demand, which has hurt their ability to maximize profits. Will AI create the world's first ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Arm Holdings (ARM) is launching its own CPU chip, the Arm AGI CPU, for data centers handling agentic AI workloads, with Meta Platforms as a key customer.
• Arm projects the new chips to generate $15 billion annually starting in 2031, significantly increasing total revenue and earnings.
• Needham upgraded Arm to a Buy with a $200 price target, citing its high-stakes bets and transformation for the better.
• Despite a high forward P/E ratio of 61, Arm is seen as a credible AI play due to the rise of agentic AI and the growing role of CPUs in AI data centers.
news.Keywords: CPU Chip, Agentic AI, Data Center Market, Semiconductor Design, Growth Potential

news.Title: York Space and Firefly Are Riding SpaceX's Coattails. Smaller Space Stocks Post Strong Gains.
news.Content: Last Wednesday was a great day to be a space investor. (Thursday and Friday, somewhat less so!) Rumors that SpaceX would file its IPO prospectus , which turned out to be false, set space stocks on fire. Shares of recent space IPOs York Space Systems (NYSE: YSS) and Firefly Aerospace (NASDAQ: FLY) shot up ...
news.AI_Summary:
• York Space Systems and Firefly Aerospace saw significant stock gains on rumors of SpaceX's IPO filing, but gave back gains afterward.
• SpaceX is rumored to be a $16 billion/year company with about $3 billion in annual profit, significantly larger than York and Firefly.
• York Space Systems has a market cap of $2.7 billion but is losing $84.5 million per year and burning $130 million in negative free cash flow.
• The potential SpaceX IPO could pull investors away from smaller space stocks like York and Firefly.
news.Keywords: Space IPO Rumors, Market Capitalization, Cash Burn, Free Cash Flow, Investor Sentiment

news.AI_Summary:
• 外媒點名台積電有望躋身「3兆美元俱樂部」，與輝達、蘋果、Alphabet等科技巨頭並列。
• 分析認為，台積電掌握AI與先進製程兩大關鍵戰力，是市場看好其長期成長的重要原因。
• 台積電身為全球最大晶圓代工廠，在先進製程領域具領先優勢，掌握約71%晶圓代工市占。
• 高效能運算、AI與資料中心相關晶片已占台積電營收約55%。

news.Title: Why 1 Top Analyst Says Apple Is a Screaming Buy Right Now
news.Content: Tech is a wreck. So far in 2026, the technology sector is the second-worst-performing sector in the S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) . Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) , which ranks as the world's second-largest technology company by market cap , is among the laggards. Shares of the iPhone maker are down more than 10% year to date. However, Wall Street remains generally bullish about Apple. The consensus ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Morgan Stanley analyst Erik Woodring believes Apple (AAPL) is a 'screaming buy,' with a price target suggesting nearly 28% upside.
• A survey indicates a record high number of consumers in the U.S. and China plan to upgrade to new iPhones.
• Apple is expected to be the only major global smartphone vendor gaining market share in 2026.
• Demand for foldable iPhones appears robust, with potential for significant revenue contribution.
news.Keywords: iPhone Upgrades, Market Share Gain, Foldable Phones, Consumer Demand, Analyst Optimism

news.Title: The Nasdaq Is Officially in a Correction. Here's What Investors Should Do, According to History.
news.Content: The Nasdaq-100 index tracks the performance of the top 100 companies (by value) listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange, excluding banks and other financial institutions. A whopping 60% of the index's portfolio is parked in the technology sector alone, so it has a high degree of exposure to rapidly growing artificial intelligence (AI) companies like Nvidia . As a result, the Nasdaq-100 often outperforms more diversified indexes like the S&P 500 , but it also experiences more volatility during periods of market turmoil. The index is currently in correction territory after declining by more than ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Nasdaq-100 index is in correction territory, down over 10% from its peak, due to spiking oil prices and AI disruption worries.
• Nvidia, the largest holding in the Nasdaq-100 (8.5% weighting), is impacted by broader market downturns.
• Concerns exist about a potential slowdown in AI data center infrastructure spending, particularly regarding OpenAI's commitments.
• History suggests that market corrections can present buying opportunities for patient investors.
news.Keywords: Market Correction, Nasdaq-100, AI Spending, Geopolitical Impact, Investment Opportunity

news.Title: Amazon Stock Investors Just Got Great News Concerning OpenAI and Robotaxis
news.Content: Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) shares have fallen 20% from their high due in part to concerns about the company's plan to spend about $200 billion on capital expenditures this year. Also, recession fears have resurfaced because the U.S.-Iran war has pushed oil prices to a multiyear high. That has hurt consumer discretionary stocks like Amazon. However, Amazon shareholders recently got some great news about the company's artificial intelligence and robotaxi businesses. Here are the important details. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon Web Services (AWS) and OpenAI expanded their partnership, with Amazon investing $50 billion and OpenAI committing $138 billion in AWS cloud services over eight years.
• OpenAI will consume about 2 gigawatts of Trainium capacity through AWS, adding credibility to Amazon's custom AI chips.
• AWS will offer a stateful runtime environment (SRE) powered by OpenAI models on Amazon Bedrock, enabling deeper integration than Microsoft Azure's stateless APIs.
• AWS reported 24% revenue growth in Q4, its fastest in over four years, and this partnership could accelerate that growth.
news.Keywords: Cloud Partnership, AI Investment, Custom AI Chips, Stateful Runtime, Revenue Acceleration

news.Title: Is Nvidia a Smart Buy for a Value Investor Right Now?
news.Content: The hottest tech stocks of the times generally aren't on the buy list of value investors -- and this is because they often trade at lofty valuations. Excitement about the prospects of these players prompts investors seeking growth to rush into these names. We've seen this over the past few years with technology stocks focused on artificial intelligence (AI). Companies from Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) to Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) saw their stock prices climb in the triple and quadruple ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) is considered a smart buy for value investors, trading at its lowest level in about a year.
• The company has reported explosive revenue gains (double and triple digits) due to its leading position in AI chips (GPUs).
• Nvidia's GPUs are the fastest, allowing customers to bring AI platforms to market sooner.
• Analysts expect annual revenue to climb 72% in the current full year, making the stock appear undervalued.
news.Keywords: Value Investing, AI Chips, GPU Market, Revenue Growth, Undervalued Stock

news.Title: 2 Beaten-Down AI Stocks to Buy Before the Next Bull Market
news.Content: Although it's still officially in a bull market overall, the artificial intelligence (AI) investment sector may have something to say about that claim. Many AI stocks are down more than 20% from their all-time highs, knocking them out of bull market territory on an individual stock basis. However, once geopolitical tensions stabilize and investors realize that AI spending will last for many more years, some of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft (MSFT) stock is down over 30% from its highs, presenting a contrarian buy opportunity.
• Azure's revenue rose 39% year over year in Q2 FY26, contributing to Microsoft's overall 17% revenue growth.
• Concerns about AI agents rewriting software are seen as unfounded for Microsoft's business-centric products.
• Broadcom (AVGO) is expected to see monster growth from its custom AI chip business, projecting $100 billion or greater revenue by the end of next year.
news.Keywords: Contrarian Buy, AI Stocks, Cloud Computing, Custom AI Chips, Growth Potential

news.Content: 【時報編譯柳繼剛綜合外電報導】受到外資大舉賣超3.8兆韓元的衝擊，韓國股市31日大幅下跌224.84點或4 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受外資大舉賣超3.8兆韓元的衝擊，韓國股市31日大幅下跌224.84點或4.26%，收在5052.46點。
• 韓元匯價走貶，創17年來最低，兌一美元在1,530.1價位附近。
• 分析師表示，伊朗危機加上油價上漲，推高股票的風險溢酬，韓企獲利預估可能下修。
• 個股中，三星電子大跌5.16%，SK海力士重挫7.56%。
news.Keywords: 韓股,外資賣超,韓元,中東衝突,記憶體

news.Title: 攻邊緣AI商機，磐儀擬辦理上限2千萬股私募案，引進策略投資人
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者王宜弘報導】IPC廠磐儀(3594)搶攻邊緣AI商機，週二(31日)董事會決議辦理私募 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• IPC廠磐儀(3594)為搶攻邊緣AI商機，董事會決議辦理私募現金增資，引進策略投資人，私募股數不超過2千萬股。
• 磐儀去年稅後盈餘4666萬元，每股盈餘0.49元，獲利下滑主因是美國對等關稅及新台幣匯率波動。
• 磐儀董事會決議配發0.4元現金股利，發放率81%，殖利率逾1%。
• 磐儀與聯發科(2454)合資成立磐旭智能，劍指工業手持物聯網裝置市場，今年營運可望爆發。
news.Keywords: 磐儀,邊緣AI,私募,聯發科,營運

• 計畫將融合台灣文化靈魂的古典樂，帶入全台校園、社區與公共領域，共同守護在地文化。
• 聯發科董事長蔡明介表示，將影響力擴大至在地人文的文化永續推廣。
• 初期活動將涵蓋馬祖場（4月16-19日）及屏東場（5月21-23日）。

news.Title: The Best Quantum Computing Stock to Buy With $1,000 Right Now
news.Content: While the world fixates on Nvidia 's (NASDAQ: NVDA) chips fueling today's artificial intelligence (AI) boom, the company is quietly positioning itself as a foundational player in quantum computing. With a modest sum of $1,000 to invest, Nvidia stands out as the smartest quantum AI play -- not because it builds the hardware, but because ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia is positioning itself as a foundational player in quantum computing by developing software that bridges classical supercomputers and quantum systems.
• The company's CUDA software platform is being extended into quantum toolkits, allowing simulations on Nvidia GPUs that would take years on ordinary computers.
• Nvidia's ecosystem makes quantum experimentation scalable and affordable, offering investors exposure to quantum AI progress beyond raw chip sales.
• The company's data center business generates billions in profit, funding its quantum roadmap, and its ecosystem creates a unique flywheel advantage.
• Investors may not be pricing in ancillary AI-driven growth from quantum simulation royalties, hybrid cloud integrations, and enterprise software licensing.
news.Keywords: quantum computing, AI, software platform, CUDA, hybrid computing

news.Title: Beyond Nvidia: This Under-the-Radar AI Stock Is Up Nearly 300% Over the Past Year
news.Content: Nvidia has been a great investment over the past few years, and I still think it's a great stock pick now. However, many investors are looking for alternatives or new ways to invest in the artificial intelligence (AI) space, and I think I've identified ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron (MU) stock has seen significant gains, up nearly 300% over the past year, and is considered a strong investment in the AI space.
• Micron is a critical supplier of High Bandwidth Memory (HBM) for AI computing chips, with the HBM market expected to grow from $35 billion in 2025 to $100 billion by 2028.
• The company currently cannot meet total HBM demand, with capacity only meeting half to two-thirds of demand until 2027.
• Despite Google's TurboQuant algorithm reducing memory demand, it only affects one part of large language models, and overall memory demand is expected to remain strong.
• Micron expects significant revenue growth, projecting $33.5 billion next quarter, up from $23.9 billion this quarter.
news.Keywords: AI, memory, HBM, demand, growth trajectory

news.Title: 聯發科推動文化永續傳統，首度藝企合作發起「臺灣共鳴－公益音樂行腳」
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】IC設計龍頭聯發科(2454)今日宣布首度藝企合作，與專精台灣傳統音樂的灣聲樂團，共同發起「臺灣共鳴－公益音樂行腳」計畫 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• IC設計龍頭聯發科(2454)宣布首度藝企合作，與灣聲樂團共同發起「臺灣共鳴－公益音樂行腳」計畫。
• 計畫將融合臺灣文化靈魂的古典樂，帶入全臺校園、社區與公共領域，提升大眾文化近用性。
• 聯發科董事長蔡明介表示，將影響力擴大至在地人文的文化永續推廣。
• 灣聲樂團成立於2017年，是臺灣唯一以演出「臺灣音樂」為核心訴求的職業樂團。

news.Title: 《台北股市》台股居3萬點高檔逾千檔股價破年線 QIC提四策略助力企業
news.Content: 【時報記者張佳琪台北報導】台股穩居3萬點之上，日成交金額8000億元幾乎成為常態，使得台股已晉升全球前十大的關鍵資本市場。不過，仍有1071家、高達50%的公司股價跌破年線，寬量國際(QIC)創辦人暨執行長李鴻基今(31)日對 ...

• 台股穩居3萬點之上，日成交金額8000億元，但仍有1071家公司股價跌破年線，比重高達50%。

• QIC提出「四大行動綱領」：找回成長道路、論述長期願景、定義關鍵資訊、強化ESG行動。

news.Content: Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN ) is one of the 10 best stocks that recently issued new debt . On March 25, Citi increased its price target on Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) from $265 to ...
news.AI_Summary:

• Estimates for Amazon Web Services (AWS) were raised, driven by AI demand, with predictions of 28% year-over-year revenue growth in Q1 and 37% in 2027.

• While Amazon is a strong investment, other AI stocks may offer greater upside potential and less downside risk.

news.Title: Is the AI Bubble Bursting? Here Are 2 Top Stocks to Buy the Dip on When It Does.
news.Content: Artificial intelligence (AI) companies have driven the stock market higher in the past few years. Now, they may be contributing to it returning to Earth. Rapidly growing AI entities like OpenAI are scaling back commitments to chip spending and canceling projects such as video generator Sora, which could reduce overall chip spending. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI bubble may be bursting, with companies like OpenAI scaling back chip spending, potentially leading to a stock market bear market.
• This downturn presents a buying opportunity for long-term investors to acquire stocks at discounted prices.
• Airbnb (ABNB) is mentioned as a potential dip-buy, with consistent market share gains and 11% revenue growth last quarter.
• Interactive Brokers (IBKR) is also highlighted as a potential dip-buy, with 4.65 million active accounts and 31% year-over-year growth.
• Both ABNB and IBKR are seen as potentially attractive at lower prices if the AI bubble pops.
news.Keywords: AI bubble, bear market, dip-buying, tech stocks, market downturn

news.Title: 【盤後焦點】台股下跌795點創史上第12大跌點　3月重挫3691.5點
news.Content: （中央社記者曾仁凱台北2026年3月31日電）中東戰事與能源市場動盪，引發投資人擔憂，台積電今天早盤一度翻紅撐盤，午盤後賣壓湧現，台股盤中最多下殺812點，終場下跌79 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 中東戰事與能源市場動盪，引發投資人擔憂，台積電今天早盤一度翻紅撐盤，午盤後賣壓湧現，台股盤中最多下殺812點，終場下跌795.17點，為台股第12大收盤跌點。
• 指數跌破季線32181點，失守32000點關卡，累計3月重挫3691.5點。
• 三大權值股方面，台積電 (2330) 終場下跌20元或1.12%，收在全日最低點1760元。
• 國泰證期顧問處協理蔡明翰分析，台股現在是短空長多，AI基本面沒有太大改變，但短線受中東局勢干擾，牽動油價、通膨等，加上台股相對美股位階高太多，短線面臨修正壓力。
news.Keywords: 台股,下跌,台積電,季線,中東戰事

news.Title: Agentic AI Could Be the Next Big Breakthrough -- and This Tech Giant May Already Be Ahead
news.Content: Artificial intelligence (AI) is evolving fast. But the next phase may not just be about smarter models -- it could be about systems that actually take action. This new category of software, called agentic AI, is designed to take basic instructions about a task, then complete the steps to handle that task, make decisions, and operate with minimal additional human input. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Agentic AI, systems that can take action and operate with minimal human input, represents the next phase of AI evolution.
• The market for agentic AI is projected to grow from $5.2 billion in 2024 to $197 billion by 2034.
• Alibaba Group is actively building applied, agent-driven tools like its Wukong platform (an enterprise AI control center) and Accio Work (AI to run business operations).
• These products position Alibaba not just as an AI model builder, but as a provider of AI systems that can run real businesses.
• Alibaba's position as a leading cloud infrastructure provider in China offers a platform to deploy these tools at scale, though competition is intense.
news.Keywords: agentic AI, AI systems, automation, Alibaba, market growth

• 2025年累計有30萬人次參與，創下歷史新高，較前一年成長3倍。

news.Title: 《熱門族群》記憶體回檔 重演2025年DeepSeek誤判？
news.Content: 【時報記者葉時安台北報導】記憶體軍心渙散？隨Google的TurboQuant壓縮演算法發布後，且終端需求不振，近期記憶體現貨價格出現鬆動，尤其DRAM相關產品價格，記憶體大廠美光周一股價重挫9.8%，延續財報公布後的拋 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Google發表TurboQuant壓縮演算法，引發市場對記憶體需求前景疑慮，衝擊股價明顯拉回，但記憶體族群跌深反彈可期。
• 野村證券預料，記憶體多頭循環將走得比油價上漲更久。
• 南亞科私募引入Sandisk、鎧俠、Solidigm、Cisco等四「大咖」業者入股，可望確保長期穩定需求。
• 法人看好AI需求將支撐記憶體超級周期延續，企業級SSD及邊緣AI領域個股前景正向。
news.Keywords: 記憶體,Google,TurboQuant,南亞科,AI

news.Title: 南亞科等4檔跌停！美光崩3成爆記憶體大屠殺「劉德音防線」崩潰
news.Content: 美光財報後股價持續走弱，單日重挫近10%，收在321.8美元，自3月中旬公布財報以來，累計跌幅已達3成，不僅回吐前波漲幅，也 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美光財報後股價持續走弱，單日重挫近10%，累計跌幅已達3成，跌破前台積電董事長劉德音的成本區間。
• 市場解讀此波修正與Google推出新一代AI壓縮技術「TurboQuant」有關，擔憂未來AI對記憶體需求強度可能變化。
• 法人對產業長線仍持正面看法，認為技術演進不至於改變整體需求趨勢。
• 美光基本面仍維持強勁，客戶實際取得供貨量仍低於需求水準，高階記憶體產品如HBM4產能更已提前被預訂。
news.Keywords: 美光,記憶體,南亞科,跌停,AI

news.Title: 多頭總司令張錫：AI時代避開鬼故事擁抱基本面 跟著台積電走就對了
news.Content: 近期美、台股市同步陷入劇烈震盪，S&P 500 指數甚至跌破季線，引發投資人恐慌。對此，有「台股多頭總司令」之稱的國泰投信前董事長、東海大學財金系客座教授張錫於受訪時指出，台股憑藉強大的 AI 半導體供應鏈與內資資金 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 「台股多頭總司令」張錫指出，台股憑藉強大的AI半導體供應鏈與內資資金支撐，表現相對抗跌，指數回檔破季線反而是極佳買點。
• 他強調，台股已進入K型化時代，資金將更集中於具成長性的龍頭企業，建議避開跟不上AI的鬼故事公司。
• 張錫直言，「只要台積電持續成長，台股就不可能進入空頭。」
• 他認為，台灣企業應積極與資本市場溝通，利用上市籌資來壯大規模。
news.Keywords: 台股,多頭,台積電,AI,基本面

news.Title: 台股多頭總司令張錫：台積電1,800元以下閉眼買！明年上看3字頭、大盤4萬點要來了
news.Content: 美伊戰事不休，台股近日持續震盪，31日早盤最多下跌486點，跌破季線32,190點，台積電表現抗跌來到1,790元，素有「多頭總司 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 前國泰投信董事長張錫指出，台積電明年上看3,000元，預估EPS 125元，以25倍本益比來看，股價3字頭是合理的。
• 他認為，台股因具備AI剛性需求強勁、台灣位處AI重要供應鏈等基本面優勢，明年大盤有望站上4萬點。
• 張錫建議，台積電跌到1,800元以下可閉眼買，今年台股走勢與去年應會一樣，第一季修正、第四季再衝上來。
• 目前要擔心的是通膨，美國今年不至於會升息，但降息機會降低。
news.Keywords: 台積電,目標價,台股,AI,基本面

news.Title: 4月恐有大事發生？財經專家點名「他」更可怕
news.Content:
財經中心／李汶臻報導

2026年第一季進入尾聲，全球金融市場正屏息以待4月的到來。財訊傳媒董事長謝金河31日在臉書發文以「科技七雄的考驗時刻」為題指出，回顧美國總統川普上任以來，每年的3、4月經常有 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 財訊傳媒董事長謝金河點名，美國科技巨頭正遭遇劇烈調整，其中輝達(Nvidia)股價跌破年線，市值瀕臨跌破4兆美元關卡。
• 相較之下，台積電ADR、ASML、Intel等上游製造端是少數今年沒有下跌的個股。
• 謝金河認為，這代表半導體上游製造端仍有「天險可守」，在全球股市大調整浪潮中展現相對韌性。
• 他認為，4月可能會有大事發生，而輝達比特斯拉更可怕。
news.Keywords: 科技股,台積電,輝達,特斯拉,AI

news.Title: Rivian and Lucid can operate like Tesla after new legislative win
news.Content: Tesla has always occupied a special place in the U.S. automotive landscape as one of the few original equipment manufacturers that does not have to adhere to state dealership franchise laws that have been in place for decades, but now rivals EV Rivian and Lucid are getting the same treatment in at least one state. The traditional dealership model forces consumers to visit showrooms where a third party acts as a middleman in the sale of the vehicle to them. "By bypassing the dealership, Tesla offers customers a more transparent buying experience with set prices and minimal negotiations," according to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Washington state has passed a bill allowing electric vehicle (EV) manufacturers Rivian and Lucid to sell vehicles directly to consumers, mirroring Tesla's exemption.
• Tesla has historically operated without state dealership franchise laws, offering a more transparent buying experience.
• Traditional dealerships have lobbied states to maintain franchise laws, impacting OEM sales models.
• About half of U.S. states have eased direct EV sales restrictions, while others maintain bans.
• This legislative win for Rivian and Lucid will increase competition for Tesla in direct-to-consumer sales in Washington state.
news.Keywords: EV sales, direct-to-consumer, dealership laws, Washington state, automotive

news.AI_Summary:
• 川普對伊朗發出新的警告，稱將攻擊能源設施，導致油價飆升，市場尋找技術性的「底部」。
• 市場基本上不再考慮透過談判來結束戰爭，正在為軍事敵對行動的急遽升級做準備。
• 高盛警告，市場定價存在錯誤，過度解讀了石油引發的通膨風險，忽略了能源價格對需求的抑制作用。
• 摩根士丹利策略師Michael Wilson表示，標普的回落已經接近尾聲，獲利成長有助於抵禦經濟衰退。
news.Keywords: 美股,油價,通膨,戰爭風險,獲利成長

news.Title: Nvidia's Rubin Chip Arrives in Late 2026. Is Now the Time to Buy This Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock?
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) is the poster child of the artificial intelligence (AI) industry. Its high-powered chips are the brains that power AI. The company's leading position in the chip industry isn't lost on Wall Street, with the stock up 50% over the past year and over 18,000% over the past decade. That said, Nvidia's stock is down nearly 20% from its 52-week high, and it has a ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's stock is down nearly 20% from its 52-week high, with a new chip platform, Rubin, expected in late 2026.
• The stock's P/E ratio is 34x, significantly lower than its five-year average of 64x, but still expensive compared to the broader tech sector.
• Rising oil and natural gas prices could increase electricity costs, making AI more expensive to use and build infrastructure for.
• Higher energy costs might also lead to a broader economic pullback, potentially pausing AI infrastructure spending.
• Investors are advised to keep Nvidia on their watchlist, as the AI bubble may continue to deflate, offering better entry points later.
news.Keywords: Nvidia, AI, valuation, energy prices, market correction

news.Title: 3 Beaten-Down Software Stocks: 2 to Avoid and 1 to Buy
news.Content: Shares of software companies have taken a beating in 2026 as investors reassess valuations and the potential risks introduced by artificial intelligence (AI). Three software stocks worth calling out are industry leaders ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW) , Salesforce (NYSE: CRM) , and Adobe (NASDAQ: ADBE) . All three have seen their stocks slide sharply year to date. But a cheaper stock isn't always an attractive one. For investors looking to buy the dip, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Software stocks have declined in 2026 due to reassessed valuations and AI risks, affecting ServiceNow, Salesforce, and Adobe.
• ServiceNow shows strong growth with subscription revenue up 21% to $3.47 billion and cRPO up 25% to $12.85 billion, but trades at a high P/E of ~63.
• Salesforce's total revenue grew 10% to $41.5 billion in fiscal 2026, with AI offerings driving $2.9 billion in Q4 recurring revenue, but its core business has cooled.
• Adobe's stock fell 31% year-to-date but still delivered 12% revenue growth to $6.4 billion in Q1 fiscal 2026, with $10.3 billion in trailing-12-month free cash flow.
• Adobe is considered the clear winner among the three due to its solid fundamental performance and a P/E ratio of just 14, suggesting its recent slide may be an overreaction.
news.Keywords: software stocks, valuation, growth, earnings, market sentiment

news.Title: Alphabet vs. Amazon: Both AI Stocks Have Been Hammered, but One Looks Like a Better Buy Now
news.Content: Tech stocks have been slammed in 2026, with recent trading days compounding the pain for investors. Even industry leaders like Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) and Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) have seen their shares take a hit. As of this writing, the two stocks are both down about 13% year to date. With both tech companies investing aggressively in artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure, the recent ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Both Alphabet (GOOGL) and Amazon (AMZN) stocks are down about 13% year-to-date, presenting potential buying opportunities amid aggressive AI infrastructure investment.
• Amazon's AWS saw revenue growth of 24% year-over-year to $35.6 billion in Q4 2025, driven by AI workloads, with expected capital expenditures of $200 billion in 2026.
• Alphabet's Google Cloud revenue jumped 48% year-over-year to $17.7 billion in Q4 2025, with AI driving significant benefits across its ecosystem.
• Alphabet anticipates 2026 capital expenditures between $175 billion and $185 billion.
• Alphabet is considered the better buy due to its faster cloud growth (48% vs. 24%) and slightly cheaper valuation (P/E of ~25 vs. ~28 for Amazon).
news.Keywords: Alphabet, Amazon, AI, cloud growth, valuation

news.Title: Does This Impressive Chart Justify Palantir's High Valuation?
news.Content: Business has been booming for data analytics company Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) in recent years. Its artificial intelligence (AI) platform has won over numerous commercial and government customers alike. Its growth rate has been solid, as have its margins. The one sticking point with many investors these days ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Palantir Technologies (PLTR) has seen booming business driven by its AI platform, with U.S. commercial revenue up 137% in Q4 2025.
• The company's Rule of 40 score is 127%, reflecting strong revenue growth and adjusted operating margin.
• Despite impressive growth, Palantir's market cap of $330 billion on less than $5 billion in annual revenue suggests a steep valuation.
• Sales growth of 70% last quarter may be difficult to sustain, and the stock is down 23% year-to-date.
• The high valuation leaves little margin of safety, and investors should think twice before buying due to potential limited returns or losses.
news.Keywords: Palantir, AI, valuation, growth, market share

news.Title: Is QQQ Still Worth Buying After the Market's Recent Slide?
news.Content: Investors in the Invesco QQQ ETF (NASDAQ: QQQ) are currently dealing with something they've rarely had to over the past few years: a sharp pullback. The fund is about 8% off its all-time high as I write this. The last time it fell more than 10% was about a year ago during ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Invesco QQQ ETF is down 8% from its all-time high, but tech sector valuations are considered reasonable compared to the broader market.
• The tech sector's forward P/E ratio is 21, narrowly trailing the S&P 500's 20, with strong projected earnings growth for 2026 (36%) and 2027 (24%).
• Top QQQ holdings include Nvidia, Apple, Microsoft, Amazon, and Tesla.
• AI spending is a significant factor, with companies committing billions, but the ultimate return on investment remains uncertain.
• The current pullback is viewed as a prime buy-the-dip opportunity for long-term investors willing to hold.
news.Keywords: QQQ ETF, tech stocks, valuation, earnings growth, AI spending

news.Title: How Much Further Could Tesla Stock Fall?
news.Content: It has been a painful start to 2026 for Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) investors. With shares trading at about $356 as of this writing, the company has lost more than a fifth of its value since the start of the year. A decline of this magnitude might look like a tempting entry point. But is this pullback a genuine buying opportunity, or could shares of the electric-car maker fall even further? Ultimately, I think a strong case could be made for the stock going significantly lower. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's stock has fallen over a fifth year-to-date, trading at $356, with a potential for further decline.
• The company's operating margin contracted to 5.7% in Q4, and EPS plunged 60% year-over-year to $0.24, resulting in a P/E ratio of ~330.
• Full-year vehicle deliveries fell 9% and automotive revenue declined 10% year-over-year, with sequential deliveries expected to drop 13% in Q1.
• Heavy investment in autonomous driving, custom chips, and humanoid robots increases risk, with capital expenditures topping $8.5 billion in 2025.
• While FSD subscriptions and energy storage show growth, the core EV business faces pressure, and the stock's valuation is considered expensive.
news.Keywords: Tesla, EV, margins, valuation, deliveries, AI investment

news.Title: Everyone Is Rotating Out of Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks. Here's Why That Could Be a Costly Mistake in 2026.
news.Content: The S&P 500' s 7% year-to-date pullback has been largely led by artificial intelligence (AI) stocks suddenly being seen as liabilities rather than assets. Microsoft is 26% below where it ended last year, while Palantir Technologies is off by nearly 20%. IBM is down 20% since the end of 2025, and Oracle shares are 28% lower. This swell of disinterest is understandable, though. Many of these tickers were already struggling with steep valuations stemming from a little too much hype about AI's potential upside. When Microsoft, Alphabet , Oracle, and Amazon all recently ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AI stocks, including Microsoft and Palantir, have seen significant pullbacks, with Microsoft down 26% and Palantir down nearly 20% year-to-date.
• This sell-off is attributed to steep valuations and concerns about the high cost of AI infrastructure investment.
• Despite the correction, AI solutions are still in high demand, and the industry's stocks may offer more upside than downside.
• Unlike dot-com stocks, current AI companies have real cash flows and better fundamentals, making them less speculative.
• Analysts expect continued profit growth for AI companies, with Nvidia projected to increase EPS by 74% this fiscal year.
news.Keywords: AI stocks, market correction, valuation, fundamentals, earnings growth

news.Title: Meta Platforms Just Made Entergy a Top Stock to Buy... and It Pays a 2.49% Dividend
news.Content: The artificial intelligence market in the U.S. has already grown into a multi‑billion‑dollar space, with estimates putting its value north of $40B and projecting strong double‑digit growth through the end of this decade. That kind of expansion needs a huge amount of reliable power in the real world, and this is where Entergy (ETR) quietly steps into focus as more than just another regulated utility. Meta Platforms (META) has picked Entergy for a large data center project and agreed to back new natural gas capacity, structured so Meta pays its full cost of service. Alongside that growth angle, Entergy’s board ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Entergy (ETR) is positioned to benefit from surging AI demand, with Meta Platforms selecting it for a large data center project.
• Meta will cover the full cost of service for new natural gas capacity, supporting Entergy's infrastructure investments.
• Entergy's stock is up 20% year-to-date and 31% over the past year, trading at a premium P/E of 26.28x.
• The company reported Q4 2025 profit of $240.5 million on revenue of $2.96 billion, with operating cash flow up 30.97% in 2025.

news.Title: Was Artificial Intelligence (AI) Just the Biggest Hype Cycle of This Generation? Here's What the Numbers Actually Say.
news.Content: Investors always look for the next big growth area, an innovation or trend that may transform business or our daily lives. That's because getting in on companies involved could produce mind-blowing returns. In recent years, investors identified artificial intelligence (AI) as the next major thing -- and they piled into shares of companies driving this technology. Names such as AI chip designer Nvidia , cloud player Alphabet , and networking expert Broadcom soared, leading the S&P 500 to record levels and significant gains. The benchmark advanced nearly 80% over the past three calendar years. Will AI create the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AI stocks like Nvidia, Alphabet, and Broadcom have soared, but have recently lost momentum due to concerns about valuations, AI spending pace, and economic uncertainty.
• Evidence suggests AI-driven growth is meeting expectations, with AWS reaching a $142 billion annual revenue run rate.
• Palantir Technologies is seeing faster and larger contract expansions, with one utility company increasing its annual contract value from $7 million to $31 million.
• These examples indicate that AI is delivering results and meeting user expectations.
• Despite recent headwinds, the numbers suggest AI is not falling short of its initial promises.
news.Keywords: AI, hype cycle, growth, revenue, market momentum

news.Title: Micron Stock Cools Off — Is MU Now Too Cheap to Ignore?
news.Content: After a powerful rally over the past year, Micron (MU) stock has recently lost some momentum, declining 32% from its 52-week high of $471.34. The pullback reflects profit-taking by investors following the strong run-up, as well as emerging concerns about potential shifts in demand in the memory market. The recent uncertainty stems from developments in the artificial intelligence (AI) ecosystem. Alphabet (GOOGL) recently introduced TurboQuant, which lowers the memory requirements of AI models. Since memory and storage capacity are critical ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron (MU) stock has declined 32% from its 52-week high due to profit-taking and concerns about AI developments like Google's TurboQuant algorithm.
• TurboQuant could lower memory requirements for AI models, potentially slowing memory hardware demand growth.
• Despite this, the broader outlook for Micron remains constructive, with strong long-term demand expected for its memory and storage technologies.
• Micron delivered record Q2 revenue of $23.9 billion (up 75% sequentially, 196% YoY), driven by DRAM and NAND segments.
• The recent pullback has made Micron's valuation too cheap to ignore, with consolidated gross margin reaching 75%.
news.Keywords: Micron, AI, memory, valuation, earnings

• A wait-and-see approach is recommended for Tesla due to valuation concerns and uncertainties surrounding potential merged entity financials.

news.Title: Amazon Just Lost a Key AI Chip Executive. Is That Bad News for AMZN Stock?

The ability to design powerful, cost-efficient AI hardware has become a defining advantage, and Amazon has been pushing hard with Amazon Trainium, its in-house accelerators built for training and running large AI models. Trainium has been gaining serious traction, especially with heavy usage from Anthropic’s Claude models, putting Amazon firmly in the AI infrastructure game. Behind that momentum was Gadi Hutt, a ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon lost a key AI chip executive, Gadi Hutt, from Annapurna Labs, marking the second senior departure from the semiconductor startup.

news.Title: Google Just Announced Really Bad News for Micron and Sandisk
news.Content: The impact of artificial intelligence (AI) has been far-reaching, changing the tech landscape as we know it. The scramble to adopt AI has shifted the demand for data centers into high gear, and foundries are churning out AI-capable semiconductors as fast as they ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Google's new TurboQuant AI algorithm could significantly reduce memory usage (by at least 6x) and increase speed (up to 8x) with zero accuracy loss.
• This breakthrough could reduce the need for scarce memory chips like NAND flash, potentially impacting Micron and Sandisk.
• The news is worse for Sandisk, as nearly all its revenue comes from NAND, while Micron has lower exposure.
• While reduced demand could lower prices and hurt sales, some commentators suggest lower prices might increase AI adoption and overall memory usage.
• Investors should maintain a balanced portfolio and avoid knee-jerk reactions to fast-moving developments in the AI field.
news.Keywords: Google, AI algorithm, memory chips, Micron, Sandisk

news.Title: The Art of Valuation: Discovering Broadcom Inc's Intrinsic Value
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . news.AI_Summary:

• The traditional DCF model using Free Cash Flow per Share estimates an intrinsic value of $185.59, indicating it is modestly overvalued with a -62.01% margin of safety.
• The article highlights the importance of future earnings potential, growth, and predictability in DCF analysis.
